taskParams.rawScript:
#!/bin/bash
echo "======= start: get multiple max(ts) independently ========="
# ClickHouse 配置
CK_HOST="10.113.226.23"
CK_PORT="8123"
CK_USER="root"
CK_PASS="FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY"
CK_DB="alphafeed"
CK_TABLE1="dwd_gl_balance"
TABLE_PARTITION="month_dt"
# CK_TABLE2="nc_"

# 辅助函数：执行 SQL 并返回原始响应
run_ck_query() {
    local sql="$1"
    local encoded=$(echo "$sql" | sed 's/ /%20/g; s/'\''/%27/g')
    curl -u "$CK_USER:$CK_PASS" -s "http://$CK_HOST:$CK_PORT/?query=$encoded"
}

# 辅助函数：验证是否为合法时间格式，否则 fallback
get_valid_time_or_fallback() {
    local resp="$1"
    if [[ "$resp" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}\ [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then
        echo "$resp"
    else
        date -d "2015-01-01 00:00:00" +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"
    fi
}
# === 查询1：dwd_po_order_detail ===
SQL1="SELECT max(ts) FROM $CK_DB.$CK_TABLE1 WHERE $TABLE_PARTITION >= '$[add_months(yyyy-MM,-1)]'"
RESP1=$(run_ck_query "$SQL1")
LAST_RUN_TIME=$(get_valid_time_or_fallback "$RESP1")
echo "Query1 result: [$RESP1] → LAST_RUN_TIME = $LAST_RUN_TIME"
echo '${setValue(LAST_RUN_TIME='$LAST_RUN_TIME')}'
# === 查询2：nc_===
# SQL2=...
# ...

echo "======= End ======="

taskDefinitionList.name: 1dwd_gl_balance
taskDefinitionList.description: 总账科目余额表

taskParams.sql:
select
      a.pk_org as d_corp_id
     ,d.code  as d_corp_code --公司编码
     ,d.name   as d_corp_name --公司名称
     ,a.year   as years --年  度
     ,a.period as months  --期间
     ,a.year||'-'||a.period as month_dt --年月
     ,b.pk_account as d_subject_id --科目主键
     ,c.code as d_subject_code --科目编码
     ,b.name as d_subject_name --科目名称
     ,SUM(a.debitamount)OVER(PARTITION BY a.year ,d.code,c.code,a.period ) AS f_debitamount --借方
     ,SUM(a.creditamount)OVER(PARTITION BY a.year ,d.code,c.code,a.period ) AS f_creditamount --贷方
     ,SUM(a.debitamount-a.creditamount)OVER(PARTITION BY a.year ,d.code,c.code,a.period ) AS f_period_amount --发生额
     ,SUM(a.debitamount-a.creditamount)OVER(PARTITION BY a.year ,d.code,c.code ORDER BY a.period )-a.debitamount+a.creditamount AS f_opening_balance
     ,SUM(a.debitamount-a.creditamount)OVER(PARTITION BY a.year ,d.code,c.code ORDER BY a.period ) AS f_balance
     ,row_number() over (partition by  a.year ,d.code,c.code,a.period order by a.period) as rn
     ,a.ts as ts_char
from gl_balance a
         left join bd_accasoa b on a.pk_accasoa=b.pk_accasoa ---科目名称
         left join bd_account c on b.pk_account =c.pk_account---科目编码
         left join org_financeorg d on a.pk_org=d.pk_financeorg ---公司
where a.dr=0
and a.ts >'${LAST_RUN_TIME}'

taskDefinitionList.name: 1.1-2sub-dws_oa_cg_wlbj_ck_2h
taskDefinitionList.description:
--=====※※※※※※※※※※※※※※  dwd_oa_cg_wlbj  ※※※※※※※※※※※※※※=====--
 
 -- ==================================================
-- 表名：dwd_oa_cg_wlbj
-- source: oa
-- 表名：formtable_main_147_dt1 流程明细表,formtable_main_147流程主表,多个维度表（组织、物料、用户等）
-- target: ck
-- 表名：dwd_oa_cg_wlbj
-- 说明：DWD层，OA系统采购业务物料报价主题宽表，经过清洗和整合
-- 分区：按 month_dt（年月）分区，形成采购物料报价表
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建时间：2025-08-11
-- toYYYYMM(biz_dt)为分区，分区存储的是数字类型
-- ✅ 推荐 WHERE biz_dt >= '2025-08-01' AND biz_dt < '2025-09-01'
-- ⚠️可用但不推荐 WHERE toYYYYMM(biz_dt) = 202508
-- 特殊说明：首次抽数使用fr数据源数据直抽，2018年12月10日正式切换说明该表历史数据可能用了别的表名，但没有抽数逻辑，故对于历史数据只能从fr系统完整copy
-- ==================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_oa_cg_wlbj
(
    -- ✅ 维度类（预留主键字段，初期用编码，后期可填充主键）
    d_corp_id         String     DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '公司主键（预留，未来关联 组织 填充）',
    d_corp_code       String     NOT NULL COMMENT '公司编码（来源 GSBM）',
    d_corp_name       String     COMMENT '公司名称',

    d_material_id     String     DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '物料主键（预留，未来关联 物料 填充）',
    d_material_code   FixedString(10) COMMENT '物料编码',
    d_material_name   String COMMENT '物料名称',
--指标类
    f_price_ton  	  Decimal(15, 2) COMMENT '单吨报价',
    f_freight_amt     Decimal(15, 2) COMMENT '运费', 

--展示类
    input_by   String COMMENT '填报人员',

--日期类
    biz_dt     Date COMMENT '报价日期',
	updt       FixedString(19)  COMMENT '更新日期'
)
ENGINE = MergeTree()
PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(biz_dt)  -- 按年月分区，如 202508
ORDER BY (d_corp_id, d_material_id,biz_dt)     
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
COMMENT 'DWD层，OA系统采购业务物料报价主题宽表，经过清洗和整合';

taskParams.sql:
select
    d_region_code,
    d_region_name,
    d_corp_id,
    d_corp_code,
    d_corp_name,
    d_material_id,
    d_material_code,
    d_material_name,
    f_price_ton,
    f_price_ton_avg30,
    f_price_ton_avg365,
    f_price_ton_avg,
    f_price_ton_avgall,
    biz_dt,
    today() as updt
from
    (
        SELECT
            dictGet('dim_unit_dict2', 'd_region_code', d_corp_code) as d_region_code,
            dictGet('dim_unit_dict2', 'd_region_name', d_corp_code) as d_region_name,
            dictGet('dim_unit_dict2', 'd_corp_id', d_corp_code) as d_corp_id,
            d_corp_code,
            dictGet('dim_unit_dict2', 'd_corp_name', d_corp_code) as d_corp_name,
            dictGet('dim_material_dict2', 'd_material_id', d_material_code) as d_material_id,
            d_material_code,
            d_material_name,
            f_price_ton,
            biz_dt,
            -- 过去 30 行
            round(avg(f_price_ton) over (
                partition by d_corp_code, d_material_code
                order by biz_dt
                rows between 30 preceding and current row
                ),3) as f_price_ton_avg30,

            -- 使用 ROWS 近似：过去 365 行（假设每天一条）
            round(avg(f_price_ton) over (
                partition by d_corp_code, d_material_code
                order by biz_dt
                rows between 365 preceding and current row
                ),3) as f_price_ton_avg365,
            -- 使用 ROWS 近似：所有日期移动平均
            round(avg(f_price_ton) over (
                partition by d_corp_code, d_material_code
                order by biz_dt
                ),3) as f_price_ton_avg,
                        round(avg(f_price_ton) over (
                partition by d_material_code
                ),3) as f_price_ton_avgall,
            -- 排名
            row_number() over (
                partition by d_corp_code, d_material_code
                order by biz_dt desc
                ) as rn
        FROM dwd_oa_cg_wlbj
        --WHERE biz_dt >= today() - INTERVAL 365 day
        )
where rn=1

 -- ==================================================
-- 表名：dwd_oa_cg_wlbj
-- source: oa
-- 表名：formtable_main_147_dt1 流程明细表,formtable_main_147流程主表,多个维度表（组织、物料、用户等）
-- target: ck

-- 分区：按 month_dt（年月）分区，形成采购物料报价表
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建时间：2025-08-11
-- toYYYYMM(biz_dt)为分区，分区存储的是数字类型
-- ✅ 推荐 WHERE biz_dt >= '2025-08-01' AND biz_dt < '2025-09-01'
-- ⚠️可用但不推荐 WHERE toYYYYMM(biz_dt) = 202508
-- 特殊说明：首次抽数使用fr数据源数据直抽，2018年12月10日正式切换说明该表历史数据可能用了别的表名，但没有抽数逻辑，故对于历史数据只能从fr系统完整copy
-- ==================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_oa_cg_wlbj

ENGINE = MergeTree()
PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(biz_dt)  -- 按年月分区，如 202508

taskParams.sql:
--SELECT
--    trim(A.GSBM) as d_corp_code, --公司编码
--    A.GSMC as d_corp_name, --公司名称
--    trim(A.WLBM) as d_material_code, --物料编码
--    A.WLMC as d_material_name, --物料名称
--
--    A.DCBJ as f_price_ton, --到厂报价 单吨报价
--    A.YF as f_freight_amt, --运费
--
--    A.tbr as input_by, --填报人
--
--    TO_DATE(TRIM(A.BJRQ), 'YYYY-MM-DD') as biz_dt, --报价日期
--    TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updt

--
--FROM cg_wlbj a

SELECT 
trim(A.GSBM) as d_corp_code, --公司编码
A.GSMC as d_corp_name, --公司名称
trim(A.WLBM) as d_material_code, --物料编码
A.WLMC as d_material_name, --物料名称

A.DCBJ as f_price_ton, --到厂报价 单吨报价
-- ✅ 核心：365天移动平均（自动处理同一天多条记录）
--round(AVG(A.DCBJ) OVER (
--  PARTITION BY A.GSBM, A.WLBM
--  ORDER BY TO_DATE(TRIM(A.BJRQ), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
--  RANGE BETWEEN INTERVAL '365' DAY (3) PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
--  ),3) AS f_price_ton_365avg,
A.YF as f_freight_amt, --运费

D.LASTNAME as input_by, --填报人

TO_DATE(TRIM(A.BJRQ), 'YYYY-MM-DD') as biz_dt, --报价日期
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updt

FROM formtable_main_147_dt1 A --流程明细表
LEFT JOIN formtable_main_147 B --流程主表
ON A.MAINID = B.ID
LEFT JOIN workflow_requestbase C --工作流请求基本信息表
ON B.REQUESTID = C.REQUESTID
LEFT JOIN HrmResource D --人力资源表
ON D.ID = B.SHENQR

--LEFT JOIN hrmdepartment E --部门表
--ON E.ID = B.SHENQBM
--LEFT JOIN hrmsubcompany F --分部表
--ON F.ID = B.SUOSGS
--LEFT JOIN hrmjobtitles G --岗位表
--ON G.ID = B.ZHIW

WHERE 1=1
AND A.BJRQ >='${YEAR_MONTH_S}'
AND A.BJRQ <'${YEAR_MONTH_E}'
AND C.currentnodetype = 3 --归档

taskParams.sql:
select
    b.material_pk as d_material_id
     ,case when  c.corp_pk=b.corp_pk then material_pk
           else b.material_pk||c.corp_pk end as d_material_uid
     ,b.material_code as d_material_code
     ,b.material_name as d_material_name
     ,b.material_type as d_material_type
     ,b.class_code1   as d_class_code1
     ,b.class_name1   as d_class_name1
     ,b.class_code2   as d_class_code2
     ,b.class_name2   as d_class_name2
     ,b.class_code4   as d_class_code4
     ,b.class_name4   as d_class_name4
     ,b.class_code6   as d_class_code6
     ,b.class_name6   as d_class_name6
     ,c.corp_pk 		 as d_corp_id_product
     ,a.gsbm 		 as d_corp_code_product
     ,a.gsmc 		 as d_corp_name_product
     ,b.corp_pk 		 as d_corp_id_defined
     ,b.corp_code 	 as d_corp_code_defined
     ,b.corp_name 	 as d_corp_name_defined
     ,case when c.corp_pk=b.corp_pk then ''
           else c.corp_pk end as d_corp_joinid
     ,case when c.corp_pk=b.corp_pk then '自产'
           else '代工' end as d_production_type
     ,sum(rksl) 		 as f_inbound_qty
     ,sysdate as updt
from kc_ccprk1 a
         left join dim_material b
                   on a.wlbm=b.material_code
         left join dim_unit c
                   on c.org_type='公司'
                       and a.gsbm=c.corp_code
where rq >= to_char(add_months(trunc(sysdate), -12), 'yyyy-mm')
group by
    b.material_pk
       ,b.material_code
       ,b.material_name
       ,b.material_type
       ,b.class_code1
       ,b.class_name1
       ,b.class_code2
       ,b.class_name2
       ,b.class_code4
       ,b.class_name4
       ,b.class_code6
       ,b.class_name6
       ,c.corp_pk
       ,a.gsbm
       ,a.gsmc
       ,b.corp_pk
       ,b.corp_code
       ,b.corp_name

taskDefinitionList.name: 1.5sub-dwd_plcy_discount_detail_nctock_ysnap_2h
taskDefinitionList.description: dwd_plcy_discount_detail_ysnap nc返利政策表 按年分区更新

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    d_corp_id,
    d_corp_code,
    d_corp_name,
    d_client_id,
    d_client_code,
    d_client_name,
    d_plcytype_id,
    d_plcytypename,
    d_plcy_id,
    d_plcy_code,
    d_plcy_name,
    d_mar_combine_name,
    d_mar_dim_flag,
    d_mar_dim_flagname,
    d_material_dim,
    bremoveflag,
    d_material_dim_id,
    d_material_dim_code,
    d_material_dim_name,
    d_class_id,
    d_material_id,
    f_total_disamt,
    f_total_max_disamt,
    f_min_disqty,
    f_max_disqty,
    f_disprice_ton,
    f_disprice_real_ton,
    dmakedate,
    vnote,
    fstatusflag,
    dbegindate,
    denddate,
    fperiodflag,
    fprmtypeflag,
    year_dt
FROM (
----6=物料组合
         select
             --'sr_plcy' 						as d_discount_type, /**折扣类型：返利折扣d**/

             plcy.pk_org 					as d_corp_id,/**公司id**/
             o.code 							as d_corp_code,/**公司**/
             o.name 							as d_corp_name,/**公司**/
             sr_plcy_cust.ccustomerid 		as d_client_id,/**客户id**/
             cust.code  						as d_client_code,/**客户编码**/
             cust.name  						as d_client_name,/**客户名称**/

----核心对象
             plcy.ctrantypeid 				as d_plcytype_id ,/** 政策项目id*/
             bd_billtype.billtypename 		as d_plcytypename,/**政策项目**/
             plcy.pk_plcy					as d_plcy_id,/**返利政策主实体id**/
             plcy.vcode						as d_plcy_code,/**政策编号**/
             plcy.vname						as d_plcy_name,/**政策名称**/
             sr_marcombine.vname 			as d_mar_combine_name,/**物料组合名称**/
             plcy.fmardimenflag				as d_mar_dim_flag,/**归类=物料维度指标设定方式 0=全部物料，1=产品线，2=品牌，3=物料基本分类，4=物料销售分类，5=物料，6=物料组合 -->sr_plcy_mar **/
             '6物料组合-分类'     				as d_mar_dim_flagname,

             case when length(invcl.code)=2 then 'class_code2'
                  when length(invcl.code)=4 then 'class_code4'
                  when length(invcl.code)=6 then 'class_code6'
                 end 						as d_material_dim,/**物料维度设定**/
             sr_marcombine_b.bremoveflag,/**y排除 n保留 默认保留**/
             invcl.pk_marbasclass 			as d_material_dim_id,/**物料维度设定主键**/
             invcl.code 						as d_material_dim_code,/**物料维度设定编码**/
             invcl.name 						as d_material_dim_name,/**物料维度设定名称**/
             --(case when bd_billtype.pk_billtypecode= '4620-cxx-06' then plcy.ctopmny else null end) directcashback,/**直接返金**/
             sr_marcombine_b.cmarbaseclassid as d_class_id,/**2 4 6位 为空则代表物料**/
             sr_marcombine_b.cmaterialid		as d_material_id,/**物料主键 为空则代表分类**/


             plcy.crebatemny					as f_total_disamt,/**已返利金额**/
             case when plcy.ctopmny is null then 99999999 else plcy.ctopmny	end
                 as f_total_max_disamt, /**返利金额上限**/
             sr_plcy_caldet.njudgevaluefrom 	as f_min_disqty,/**下限数量(吨)**/
             sr_plcy_caldet.njudgevalueto 	as f_max_disqty,/**上限数量(吨)**/
             sr_plcy_caldet.nprice			as f_disprice_ton,/**折扣金额(元/吨)**/
             case when sr_marcombine_b.bremoveflag='Y' then -sr_plcy_caldet.nprice else sr_plcy_caldet.nprice end
                 as f_disprice_real_ton,/**折扣金额(元/吨)带负号可以抵消**/


             plcy.dmakedate,/**申请日期**/
             plcy.vnote,/**政策描述**/
             plcy.fstatusflag,/**返利政策状态 0=自由，1=审批中，2=审批不通过，3=审批通过，5=关闭**/
             plcy.dbegindate,/**生效日期**/
             plcy.denddate,/**失效日期**/


             plcy.fperiodflag,/**执行周期=返利周期 0=月，1=季，2=半年，3=年，4=非周期**/
             plcy.fprmtypeflag,/**促销参与返利方式 1=计量计奖，2=不计量不计奖，3=计量不计奖，4=自定义**/

             plcy.fyearflag    as year_dt/**年度 **/

         from sr_plcy plcy
----o组织
                  left join  org_orgs o on plcy.pk_org=o.pk_org
----c客户
                  inner join sr_plcy_cust on sr_plcy_cust.pk_plcy=plcy.pk_plcy and sr_plcy_cust.dr=0
                  inner join bd_customer cust on cust.pk_customer=sr_plcy_cust.ccustomerid
----m物料(sr_plcy_mar 含所有归类方式 确定方式后再去关联物料)
                  left join sr_plcy_mar plcymar on plcymar.pk_plcy=plcy.pk_plcy and plcymar.dr=0
--6物料组合
                  left join sr_marcombine on sr_marcombine.pk_marcombine= plcymar.cmarcombineid and sr_marcombine.dr=0
                  left join sr_marcombine_b on sr_marcombine.pk_marcombine=sr_marcombine_b.pk_marcombine
--分类
                  join bd_marbasclass invcl on invcl.pk_marbasclass=sr_marcombine_b.cmarbaseclassid
----b单据类型
                  left join bd_billtype on bd_billtype.pk_billtypeid=plcy.ctrantypeid
----cal计算
                  left join sr_plcy_calrule on sr_plcy_calrule.pk_plcy=plcy.pk_plcy and sr_plcy_calrule.dr=0
                  left join (
             select pk_plcy_calrule,cgrandrowno,njudgevaluefrom,nprice
                  ,njudgevalueto
                  ,row_number() over (partition by pk_plcy_calrule order by cgrandrowno desc) as rn
             from sr_plcy_caldet
             where dr='0'
         ) sr_plcy_caldet
                            on sr_plcy_caldet.rn=1 and sr_plcy_caldet.pk_plcy_calrule=sr_plcy_calrule.pk_plcy_calrule

         where plcy.dr = '0'
           and plcy.fyearflag='${YEAR_DT}'
           and plcy.fmardimenflag  ='6'
         --and plcy.vcode='202502263146'

         union all
----6=物料组合-物料
         select
             --'sr_plcy' 						as d_discount_type, /**折扣类型：返利折扣d**/

             plcy.pk_org 					as d_corp_id,/**公司id**/
             o.code 							as d_corp_code,/**公司**/
             o.name 							as d_corp_name,/**公司**/
             sr_plcy_cust.ccustomerid 		as d_client_id,/**客户id**/
             cust.code  						as d_client_code,/**客户编码**/
             cust.name  						as d_client_name,/**客户名称**/

----核心对象
             plcy.ctrantypeid 				as d_plcytype_id ,/** 政策项目id*/
             bd_billtype.billtypename 		as d_plcytypename,/**政策项目**/
             plcy.pk_plcy					as d_plcy_id,/**返利政策主实体id**/
             plcy.vcode						as d_plcy_code,/**政策编号**/
             plcy.vname						as d_plcy_name,/**政策名称**/
             sr_marcombine.vname 			as d_mar_combine_name,/**物料组合名称**/
             plcy.fmardimenflag				as d_mar_dim_flag,/**归类=物料维度指标设定方式 0=全部物料，1=产品线，2=品牌，3=物料基本分类，4=物料销售分类，5=物料，6=物料组合 -->sr_plcy_mar **/
             '6物料组合-物料' 					as d_mar_dim_flagname,

             'material_code' 				as  d_material_dim,/**物料维度设定**/
             sr_marcombine_b.bremoveflag,/**y排除 n保留 默认保留**/
             inv.pk_material  				as d_material_dim_id,/**物料维度设定主键**/
             inv.code  						as d_material_dim_code,/**物料维度设定编码**/
             inv.name  						as d_material_dim_name,/**物料维度设定名称**/
             --(case when bd_billtype.pk_billtypecode= '4620-cxx-06' then plcy.ctopmny else null end) directcashback,/**直接返金**/
             sr_marcombine_b.cmarbaseclassid as d_class_id,/**2 4 6位 为空则代表物料**/
             sr_marcombine_b.cmaterialid		as d_material_id,/**物料主键 为空则代表分类**/


             plcy.crebatemny					as f_total_disamt,/**已返利金额**/
             case when plcy.ctopmny is null then 99999999 else plcy.ctopmny	end
                 as f_total_max_disamt, /**返利金额上限**/
             sr_plcy_caldet.njudgevaluefrom 	as f_min_disqty,/**下限数量(吨)**/
             sr_plcy_caldet.njudgevalueto 	as f_max_disqty,/**上限数量(吨)**/
             sr_plcy_caldet.nprice			as f_disprice_ton,/**折扣金额(元/吨)**/
             case when sr_marcombine_b.bremoveflag='Y' then -sr_plcy_caldet.nprice else sr_plcy_caldet.nprice end
                 as f_disprice_real_ton,/**折扣金额(元/吨)带负号可以抵消**/


             plcy.dmakedate,/**申请日期**/
             plcy.vnote,/**政策描述**/
             plcy.fstatusflag,/**返利政策状态 0=自由，1=审批中，2=审批不通过，3=审批通过，5=关闭**/

             plcy.dbegindate,/**生效日期**/
             plcy.denddate,/**失效日期**/


             plcy.fperiodflag,/**执行周期=返利周期 0=月，1=季，2=半年，3=年，4=非周期**/
             plcy.fprmtypeflag,/**促销参与返利方式 1=计量计奖，2=不计量不计奖，3=计量不计奖，4=自定义**/
             plcy.fyearflag    as year_dt/**年度 **/

         from sr_plcy plcy
----o组织
                  left join  org_orgs o on plcy.pk_org=o.pk_org
----c客户
                  inner join sr_plcy_cust on sr_plcy_cust.pk_plcy=plcy.pk_plcy and sr_plcy_cust.dr=0
                  inner join bd_customer cust on cust.pk_customer=sr_plcy_cust.ccustomerid
----m物料(sr_plcy_mar 含所有归类方式 确定方式后再去关联物料)

                  left join sr_marcombine on sr_marcombine.pk_marcombine= plcymar.cmarcombineid and sr_marcombine.dr=0

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    b.name         AS d_channel_name,      -- 维度：渠道名称
    b.code         AS d_channel_code,      -- 维度：渠道编码
    b.pk_type      AS d_channel_id,        -- 维度：渠道ID
    a.pk_org       AS d_corp_id,           -- 维度：公司ID
    c.code         AS d_corp_code,         -- 维度：公司编码
    c.name         AS d_corp_name,         -- 维度：公司名称
    a.pk_material  AS d_material_id,       -- 维度：物料ID
    d.code         AS d_material_code,     -- 维度：物料编码
    d.name         AS d_material_name,     -- 维度：物料名称
    g.name         AS measdoc_name,        -- 属性：计量单位名称

    a.pk_customer  AS d_client_id,         -- 维度：客户ID
    e.code         AS d_client_code,       -- 维度：客户编码
    e.name         AS d_client_name,       -- 维度：客户名称
    e2.code        AS client_dclass_code,   -- 维度：客户分类编码 K1 K2 K3 K其他 K2为内部客户
    e2.name        AS client_dclass_name, -- 维度：客户分类名称
    a.nprice1      AS f_price,             -- 事实：价格
    d.enablestate,                         -- 属性：启用状态 1=未启用，2=已启用，3=已停用
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.pk_org, a.pk_material ORDER BY a.pk_customer, b.pk_type, a.dmodifydate DESC, a.nprice1) AS rn,
    f.user_name    AS modify_name,         -- 属性：修改人姓名
    a.dmodifydate  AS modify_dt,           -- 属性：修改日期
    SYSDATE            AS updt            -- 属性：当前月份

FROM prm_tariff a
         LEFT JOIN bd_channeltype b ON a.pk_channeltype = b.pk_type
         LEFT JOIN org_salesorg c ON a.pk_org = c.pk_salesorg
         LEFT JOIN bd_material_v d ON a.pk_material = d.pk_source
         LEFT JOIN bd_customer e ON a.pk_customer = e.pk_customer
         LEFT JOIN bd_custclass  e2 ON e.pk_custclass = e2.pk_custclass
         LEFT JOIN sm_user f ON a.modifier = f.cuserid
         LEFT JOIN bd_measdoc g ON a.pk_unit = g.pk_measdoc
WHERE b.code <> '32'
  AND a.dr = 0

	-- ================== 区域与公司 ==================
	 a.d_region_name
	,a.d_corp_id
	,a.d_corp_code
	,a.d_corp_name
	,a.d_town_id
	,a.d_town_name
	-- ================== 客户信息 ==================
	,a.d_client_id
	,a.d_client_code
	,a.d_client_name
	-- ================== 渠道信息 ==================
	,a.d_channel_id
	,a.d_channel_name
	-- ================== 产品分类（6级）==================
	,a.d_class_code2
	,a.d_class_name2
	,a.d_class_code4
	,a.d_class_name4
	,a.d_class_code6
	,a.d_class_name6
	-- ================== 产品信息 ==================
	,a.d_product_id
	,a.d_product_code
	,a.d_product_name
	,a.d_measure_name
	-- ================== 配方信息 ==================
	,a.d_formula_id
	,a.d_formula_code
	,a.d_formula_name
    ,case when b.f_cost_ton<>0  then '公司配方'  when b.f_cost_ton=0  and b2.f_product_qty<>0 then '澳华平均'  when b.f_cost_ton=0  and b2.f_product_qty=0 then '缺失配方' end as d_formula_source

-- ================== 1.1 销售数据（本月）==================	
	,a.f_sale_qty					--销量
	,a.f_sale_gift_qty				--赠送数量
	,a.f_rebate_qty					--返利数量
	
	,a.f_list_sale_amt				--挂牌销售金额 
	,a.f_sale_amt 					--销售金额
	,a.f_discount_amt				--折扣金额
	,-a.f_base_discount_amt 	as f_base_discount_amt --基础折扣金额 
	,-a.f_prm_discount_amt	 	as f_prm_discount_amt  --促销折扣金额
	,a.f_rebate_amt 				--返利金额
	,a.f_cost_amt 					--成本金额(包含赠送)
	 
	,if(a.f_sale_qty = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_list_sale_amt, a.f_sale_qty)) 		as f_list_sale_ton		--单吨挂牌价
	--1.1.1折扣：基准+促销
	,if(a.f_sale_qty = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_discount_amt, a.f_sale_qty))	 		as f_discount_ton		--单吨折扣
	,if(a.f_sale_qty = 0, NULL, divide(-a.f_base_discount_amt, a.f_sale_qty)) 	as f_base_discount_ton	--单吨基础折扣金额（加权均价）
	,if(a.f_sale_qty = 0, NULL, divide(-a.f_prm_discount_amt, a.f_sale_qty)) 	as f_prm_discount_ton	--单吨促销折扣金额（加权均价）
	--1.1.2返利
	,if(a.f_rebate_qty = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_rebate_amt, a.f_rebate_qty))	 	as f_rebate_ton			--单吨返利金额（加权均价）
     --1.1.3买赠
     ,if(a.f_sale_qty_year=0,0,if(e.f_product_qty = 0, e2.f_cost_price, divide(e.f_cost_total, e.f_product_qty))*a.f_sale_gift_qty/a.f_sale_qty_year) 		as f_gift_cost_ton
     --1.1总折扣=买赠+返利+折扣
     ,if(a.f_sale_qty_year=0,0,if(e.f_product_qty = 0, e2.f_cost_price, divide(e.f_cost_total, e.f_product_qty))*a.f_sale_gift_qty/a.f_sale_qty_year) +if(a.f_rebate_qty = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_rebate_amt, a.f_rebate_qty))+if(a.f_sale_qty = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_discount_amt, a.f_sale_qty))
                                                                                                                                                                                as f_total_dicount_ton

     -- ================== 1.2 销售数据（今年累计）==================
    ,a.f_sale_qty_year			--今年销量
	,a.f_sale_gift_qty_year		--今年赠送数量
	,a.f_rebate_qty_year		--今年返利数量
	
	,a.f_list_sale_amt_year		--今年挂牌销售金额 
	,a.f_sale_amt_year 			--今年销售金额
	,a.f_discount_amt_year		--今年折扣金额
	,-a.f_base_discount_amt_year as f_base_discount_amt_year --今年基础折扣金额 
	,-a.f_prm_discount_amt_year	 as f_prm_discount_amt_year  --今年促销折扣金额
	,a.f_rebate_amt_year 		--今年返利金额
	,a.f_cost_amt_year 			--今年成本金额(包含赠送)
	
	,if(a.f_sale_qty_year = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_list_sale_amt_year, a.f_sale_qty_year)) 	as f_list_sale_year_ton        	--今年单吨挂牌价
	--1.2.1折扣：基准+促销
	,if(a.f_sale_qty_year = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_discount_amt_year, a.f_sale_qty_year))	 	as f_discount_year_ton         	--今年单吨折扣
	,if(a.f_sale_qty_year = 0, NULL, divide(-a.f_base_discount_amt_year, a.f_sale_qty_year))as f_base_discount_year_ton    	--今年单吨基础折扣金额（加权均价）
	,if(a.f_sale_qty_year = 0, NULL, divide(-a.f_prm_discount_amt_year, a.f_sale_qty_year)) as f_prm_discount_year_ton  	--今年单吨促销折扣金额（加权均价）
	--1.2.2返利
	,if(a.f_rebate_qty_year = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_rebate_amt_year, a.f_rebate_qty_year))	as f_rebate_year_ton  			--今年单吨返利金额（加权均价）
     --1.2.3买赠
     ,if(a.f_sale_qty_year=0,0,if(e.f_product_qty = 0, e2.f_cost_price, divide(e.f_cost_total, e.f_product_qty))*a.f_sale_gift_qty_year/a.f_sale_qty_year) 	as f_gift_cost_year_ton
     --1.2总折扣=买赠+返利+折扣
     ,if(a.f_sale_qty_year=0,0,if(e.f_product_qty = 0, e2.f_cost_price, divide(e.f_cost_total, e.f_product_qty))*a.f_sale_gift_qty_year/a.f_sale_qty_year) +if(a.f_rebate_qty_year = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_rebate_amt_year, a.f_rebate_qty_year))+if(a.f_sale_qty_year = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_discount_amt_year, a.f_sale_qty_year))
                                                                                                                                                                                as f_total_dicount_year_ton
     -- ================== 1.3 销售数据（去年同期）==================
     ,a.f_sale_qty_lastyear			--去年销量
	
	,a.f_list_sale_amt_lastyear		--去年挂牌销售金额 
	,a.f_sale_amt_lastyear 			--去年销售金额
	,a.f_discount_amt_lastyear		--去年折扣金额
	,-a.f_base_discount_amt_lastyear as f_base_discount_amt_lastyear --去年基础折扣金额 
	,-a.f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear	 as f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear  --去年促销折扣金额
	,a.f_cost_amt_lastyear 			--去年成本金额(包含赠送)
	
		 
	,if(a.f_sale_qty_lastyear = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_list_sale_amt_lastyear, a.f_sale_qty_lastyear)) 	 as f_list_sale_lastyear_ton      --去年单吨挂牌价
	--1.3.1折扣：基准+促销
	,if(a.f_sale_qty_lastyear = 0, NULL, divide(a.f_discount_amt_lastyear, a.f_sale_qty_lastyear))	 	 as f_discount_lastyear_ton       --去年单吨折扣
	,if(a.f_sale_qty_lastyear = 0, NULL, divide(-a.f_base_discount_amt_lastyear, a.f_sale_qty_lastyear)) as f_base_discount_lastyear_ton  --去年单吨基础折扣金额（加权均价）
	,if(a.f_sale_qty_lastyear = 0, NULL, divide(-a.f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear, a.f_sale_qty_lastyear))  as f_prm_discount_lastyear_ton   --去年单吨促销折扣金额（加权均价）
					
	-- ================== 2. 其他数据 ==================
	
	
	--2.1配方成本（最新/库存/在途）
	,case when b.f_cost_ton =0  then if(b2.f_product_qty = 0, NULL, divide(b2.f_cost_02_03_total, b2.f_product_qty)) else b.f_cost_ton end as f_formula_cost_ton 				--综合单吨配方成本：依次用最新报价 30天在途价格 库存价
	,case when b.f_latest_cost_ton=0 then if(b2.f_product_qty = 0, NULL, divide(b2.f_cost_02_03_total, b2.f_product_qty)) else b.f_latest_cost_ton end as f_formula_latest_cost_ton 		--单吨最新报价配方成本
	,case when b.f_stock_cost_ton =0 then if(b2.f_product_qty = 0, NULL, divide(b2.f_cost_02_03_total, b2.f_product_qty)) else b.f_stock_cost_ton end as f_formula_stock_cost_ton			--单吨库存价格配方成本
	,case when b.f_transit_cost_ton_avg30 =0 then if(b2.f_product_qty = 0, NULL, divide(b2.f_cost_02_03_total, b2.f_product_qty)) else b.f_transit_cost_ton_avg30 end as f_formula_transit_cost_ton_avg30 --单吨30天在途价格配方成本
	
	--2.2包装袋信息
	,c.d_row_id 				as d_packaging_id					--包装袋主键
	,c.d_row_code 				as d_packaging_code					--包装袋编码
	,c.d_row_name 				as d_packaging_name                 --包装袋名称
	,c.d_row_measure			as d_packaging_measure              --包装袋计量单位
	,c.f_ratio_num				as f_packaging_num_ton              --包装袋单吨用量
	
	--2.3产品定价
	,case when d.f_price =0  then d2.f_price else  d.f_price end 					as f_product_price_ton				--各公司产品定价

	--2.4制造成本
	,if(e.f_product_qty = 0, e2.f_cost_01_price, divide(e.f_cost_01_total1, e.f_product_qty)) 	  as f_factory_cost_ton 		--单吨成品制造成本
	,if(e.f_product_qty = 0, e2.f_cost_02_03_price, divide(e.f_cost_02_03_total, e.f_product_qty)) as f_material_cost_ton 		--单吨配方制造成本
	,if(e.f_product_qty = 0, e2.f_cost_0203_price, divide(e.f_cost_0203_total1, e.f_product_qty))  as f_packaging_cost_ton 		--单吨包装成本
	
	-- ==================3基线预留指标（默认0）==================
	,0.0000 as f_manufacturing_cost_baseline_ton
	,0.0000 as f_manufacturing_cost_ton_diff	
	,0.0000 as f_gross_profit_ton_computed 	
	,0.0000 as f_gross_profit_red_line 		
	,0.0000 as f_standard_sale_amt_ton 		
	,0.0000 as f_baseline_discount_ton 		
	
	
	-- ================== 4主键与分区 ==================
	,concat(${MONTHDT},a.d_corp_id, a.d_client_id, a.d_product_id) as uuiq_id 
	,'${MONTH_DT}' as month_dt  --月分区
from (
    select
         dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', d_corp_id) as d_region_name
         ,d_corp_id as d_corp_id
         ,dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_code', d_corp_id) as d_corp_code
         ,dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_name', d_corp_id) as d_corp_name
		 
         ,dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'd_town_id', (d_client_id,d_corp_id)) as d_town_id
         --,dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'd_town_code', (d_client_id,d_corp_id)) as d_town_code
         ,dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'd_town_name', (d_client_id,d_corp_id)) as d_town_name
         ,d_client_id as d_client_id
         ,dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'd_client_code', (d_client_id,d_corp_id)) as d_client_code
         ,dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'd_client_name', (d_client_id,d_corp_id)) as d_client_name
		 ,max(d_channel_id) as d_channel_id,max(d_channel_name) as d_channel_name
		 
         ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code2', d_material_id)  	as d_class_code2
         ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name2', d_material_id)  	as d_class_name2
         ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code4', d_material_id)  	as d_class_code4
         ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name4', d_material_id)  	as d_class_name4
         ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)  	as d_class_code6
         ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name6', d_material_id)  	as d_class_name6
         ,d_material_id as d_product_id
         ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_code', d_material_id)  	as d_product_code
         ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', d_material_id)  	as d_product_name
         ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_name', d_material_id)  	as d_measure_name
         ,dictGet('dim_formula_product_dict3', 'd_row_id', d_material_id)  	as d_formula_id
         ,dictGet('dim_formula_product_dict3', 'd_row_code',d_material_id)  as d_formula_code
         ,dictGet('dim_formula_product_dict3', 'd_row_name', d_material_id)  as d_formula_name
		 
         ,sum(f_sale_qty) 										as f_sale_qty					--销量
         ,sum(f_sale_gift_qty) 									as f_sale_gift_qty				--赠送数量
         ,sum(f_rebate_qty) 									as f_rebate_qty					--返利数量
		 
         ,sum(f_list_sale_amt) 									as f_list_sale_amt				--挂牌销售金额 
         ,sum(f_sale_amt) 										as f_sale_amt 					--销售金额
         ,sum(f_discount_amt) 									as f_discount_amt				--折扣金额
         ,sum(f_base_discount_amt) 								as f_base_discount_amt			--基础折扣金额 
         ,sum(f_prm_discount_amt) 								as f_prm_discount_amt			--促销折扣金额
         ,sum(f_rebate_amt) 									as f_rebate_amt 				--返利金额
         ,sum(f_cost_amt) 										as f_cost_amt 					--成本金额(包含赠送)

		 

         ,sum(f_sale_qty_year) 									as f_sale_qty_year			--今年销量
         ,sum(f_sale_gift_qty_year) 							as f_sale_gift_qty_year		--今年赠送数量
         ,sum(f_rebate_qty_year) 								as f_rebate_qty_year		--今年返利数量
		 
         ,sum(f_list_sale_amt_year) 							as f_list_sale_amt_year		--今年挂牌销售金额 
         ,sum(f_sale_amt_year) 									as f_sale_amt_year 			--今年销售金额
         ,sum(f_discount_amt_year) 								as f_discount_amt_year		--今年折扣金额
         ,sum(f_base_discount_amt_year) 						as f_base_discount_amt_year	--今年基础折扣金额 
         ,sum(f_prm_discount_amt_year) 							as f_prm_discount_amt_year	--今年促销折扣金额
         ,sum(f_rebate_amt_year) 								as f_rebate_amt_year 		--今年返利金额
         ,sum(f_cost_amt_year) 									as f_cost_amt_year 			--今年成本金额(包含赠送)
		 
		 
         ,sum(f_sale_qty_lastyear) 								as f_sale_qty_lastyear			--去年销量
         --,sum(f_sale_gift_qty_lastyear) 						as f_sale_gift_qty_lastyear		--去年赠送数量
         --,sum(f_rebate_qty_lastyear) 							as f_rebate_qty_lastyear		--去年返利数量
		 
         ,sum(f_list_sale_amt_lastyear) 						as f_list_sale_amt_lastyear		--去年挂牌销售金额 
         ,sum(f_sale_amt_lastyear) 								as f_sale_amt_lastyear 			--去年销售金额
         ,sum(f_discount_amt_lastyear) 							as f_discount_amt_lastyear		--去年折扣金额
         ,sum(f_base_discount_amt_lastyear) 					as f_base_discount_amt_lastyear	--去年基础折扣金额 
         ,sum(f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear) 						as f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear	--去年促销折扣金额
         --,sum(f_rebate_amt_lastyear) 							as f_rebate_amt_lastyear 		--去年返利金额
         ,sum(f_cost_amt_lastyear) 								as f_cost_amt_lastyear 			--去年成本金额(包含赠送)



	from(
           select  d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id,channeltype_id as d_channel_id,channeltype_name as d_channel_name
                 ,sum(f_sale_num) 					as f_sale_qty			--销量
                 ,0 								as f_sale_gift_qty		--赠送数量
                 ,0 								as f_rebate_qty			--返利数量
                 ,sum(f_total_amount) 				as f_list_sale_amt   	--挂牌销售金额
                 ,sum(f_sale_amount) 				as f_sale_amt 			--销售金额
                 ,sum(f_discount_amount) 			as f_discount_amt			--折扣额
				 ,sum(f_base_discount)				as f_base_discount_amt      --基础折扣金额
				 ,sum(f_promotion_discount)  		as f_prm_discount_amt --促销折扣金额
                 ,0									as f_rebate_amt 		--返利金额
                 ,sum(f_cost_amount) 				as f_cost_amt 			--成本金额(包含赠送)

                 ,0	as f_sale_qty_year					--本年销量
                 ,0	as f_sale_gift_qty_year				--本年赠送数量
                 ,0	as f_rebate_qty_year				--本年返利数量
                 ,0	as f_list_sale_amt_year   			--本年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0	as f_sale_amt_year 					--本年销售金额
                 ,0	as f_discount_amt_year				--本年折扣额
				 ,0	as f_base_discount_amt_year      	--本年基础折扣金额
				 ,0	as f_prm_discount_amt_year 			--本年促销折扣金额
                 ,0	as f_rebate_amt_year 				--本年返利金额
                 ,0	as f_cost_amt_year 					--本年成本金额(包含赠送)

                 ,0	as f_sale_qty_lastyear					--去年销量
                 --,0	as f_sale_gift_qty_lastyear			--去年赠送数量
                 --,0	as f_rebate_qty_lastyear			--去年返利数量
                 ,0	as f_list_sale_amt_lastyear   			--去年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0	as f_sale_amt_lastyear 					--去年销售金额
                 ,0	as f_discount_amt_lastyear				--去年折扣额
				 ,0	as f_base_discount_amt_lastyear      	--去年基础折扣金额
				 ,0	as f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear 			--去年促销折扣金额
                 --,0	as f_rebate_amt_lastyear 			--去年返利金额
                 ,0	as f_cost_amt_lastyear 					--去年成本金额(包含赠送)
				 



            from  dwd_so_profit a
            where month_dt='${MONTH_DT}' 
              and is_gift='N'
            GROUP BY  d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id,channeltype_id,channeltype_name

			
            union all
           select  d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id,channeltype_id as d_channel_id,channeltype_name as d_channel_name
                 ,0 as f_sale_qty				--销量
                 ,0 as f_sale_gift_qty			--赠送数量
                 ,0 as f_rebate_qty				--返利数量
                 ,0 as f_list_sale_amt   		--挂牌销售金额
                 ,0 as f_sale_amt 				--销售金额
                 ,0 as f_discount_amt			--折扣额
				 ,0 as f_base_discount_amt      --基础折扣金额
				 ,0 as f_prm_discount_amt 		--促销折扣金额
                 ,0 as f_rebate_amt 			--返利金额
                 ,0 as f_cost_amt 				--成本金额(包含赠送)

                 ,sum(f_sale_num) 					as f_sale_qty_year			--今年销量
                 ,0 								as f_sale_gift_qty_year		--今年赠送数量
                 ,0 								as f_rebate_qty_year		--今年返利数量
                 ,sum(f_total_amount) 			    as f_list_sale_amt_year   	--今年挂牌销售金额
                 ,sum(f_sale_amount) 				as f_sale_amt_year 			--今年销售金额
                 ,sum(f_discount_amount) 			as f_discount_amt_year		--今年折扣额
				 ,sum(f_base_discount)				as f_base_discount_amt_year --今年基础折扣金额
				 ,sum(f_promotion_discount)  		as f_prm_discount_amt_year 	--今年促销折扣金额
                 ,0									as f_rebate_amt_year 		--今年返利金额
                 ,sum(f_cost_amount) 				as f_cost_amt_year 			--今年成本金额(包含赠送)


                 ,0	as f_sale_qty_lastyear					--去年销量
                 --,0	as f_sale_gift_qty_lastyear			--去年赠送数量
                 --,0	as f_rebate_qty_lastyear			--去年返利数量
                 ,0	as f_list_sale_amt_lastyear   			--去年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0	as f_sale_amt_lastyear 					--去年销售金额
                 ,0	as f_discount_amt_lastyear				--去年折扣额
				 ,0	as f_base_discount_amt_lastyear      	--去年基础折扣金额
				 ,0	as f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear 			--去年促销折扣金额
                 --,0	as f_rebate_amt_lastyear 			--去年返利金额
                 ,0	as f_cost_amt_lastyear 					--去年成本金额(包含赠送)
				 

            from  dwd_so_profit a
            where month_dt>='${YEAR_STA}'
              and month_dt<='${MONTH_DT}'
              and is_gift='N'
            GROUP BY  d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id,channeltype_id,channeltype_name
            union all
            select  d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id,channeltype_id as d_channel_id,channeltype_name as d_channel_name
                 ,0 as f_sale_qty				--销量
                 ,0 as f_sale_gift_qty			--赠送数量
                 ,0 as f_rebate_qty				--返利数量
                 ,0 as f_list_sale_amt   		--挂牌销售金额
                 ,0 as f_sale_amt 				--销售金额
                 ,0 as f_discount_amt			--折扣额
				 ,0 as f_base_discount_amt      --基础折扣金额
				 ,0 as f_prm_discount_amt 		--促销折扣金额
                 ,0 as f_rebate_amt 			--返利金额
                 ,0 as f_cost_amt 				--成本金额(包含赠送)

                 ,0	as f_sale_qty_year					--本年销量
                 ,0	as f_sale_gift_qty_year				--本年赠送数量
                 ,0	as f_rebate_qty_year				--本年返利数量
                 ,0	as f_list_sale_amt_year   			--本年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0	as f_sale_amt_year 					--本年销售金额
                 ,0	as f_discount_amt_year				--本年折扣额
				 ,0	as f_base_discount_amt_year      	--本年基础折扣金额
				 ,0	as f_prm_discount_amt_year 			--本年促销折扣金额
                 ,0	as f_rebate_amt_year 				--本年返利金额
                 ,0	as f_cost_amt_year 					--本年成本金额(包含赠送)


                 ,sum(f_sale_num) 					as f_sale_qty_lastyear			--去年销量
                 --,0 								as f_sale_gift_qty_lastyear		--去年赠送数量
                 --,0 								as f_rebate_qty_lastyear		--去年返利数量
                 ,sum(f_total_amount) 				as f_list_sale_amt_lastyear   	--去年挂牌销售金额
                 ,sum(f_sale_amount) 				as f_sale_amt_lastyear 			--去年销售金额
                 ,sum(f_discount_amount) 			as f_discount_amt_lastyear		--去年折扣额
				 ,sum(f_base_discount)				as f_base_discount_amt_lastyear --去年基础折扣金额
				 ,sum(f_promotion_discount)  		as f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear 	--去年促销折扣金额
                 --,0								as f_rebate_amt_lastyear 		--去年返利金额
                 ,sum(f_cost_amount) 				as f_cost_amt_lastyear 			--去年成本金额(包含赠送)

            from  dwd_so_profit a
            where month_dt>='${LASTYEAR_STA}'
              and month_dt<='${LASTYEAR_END}' 
              and is_gift='N'
            GROUP BY  d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id,channeltype_id,channeltype_name
			
            union all--赠送数量 当月当年	
			
            select  d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id,channeltype_id as d_channel_id,channeltype_name as d_channel_name

                 ,0 as f_sale_qty			--销量
                 ,sum(if(month_dt = '${MONTH_DT}', f_gift_num, 0))as f_sale_gift_qty --赠送数量
                 ,0 as f_rebate_qty			--返利数量
                 ,0 as f_list_sale_amt   	--挂牌销售金额
                 ,0 as f_sale_amt 			--销售金额
                 ,0 as f_discount_amt		--折扣额
				 ,0 as f_base_discount_amt  --基础折扣金额
				 ,0 as f_prm_discount_amt 	--促销折扣金额
                 ,0	as f_rebate_amt 		--返利金额
                 ,0 as f_cost_amt 			--成本金额(包含赠送)

                 ,0	as f_sale_qty_year					--本年销量
                 ,sum(f_gift_num) 	as f_sale_gift_qty_year	--本年赠送数量
                 ,0	as f_rebate_qty_year				--本年返利数量
                 ,0	as f_list_sale_amt_year   			--本年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0	as f_sale_amt_year 					--本年销售金额
                 ,0	as f_discount_amt_year				--本年折扣额
				 ,0	as f_base_discount_amt_year      	--本年基础折扣金额
				 ,0	as f_prm_discount_amt_year 			--本年促销折扣金额
                 ,0	as f_rebate_amt_year 				--本年返利金额
                 ,0	as f_cost_amt_year 					--本年成本金额(包含赠送)

                 ,0	as f_sale_qty_lastyear					--去年销量
                 --,0	as f_sale_gift_qty_lastyear			--去年赠送数量
                 --,0	as f_rebate_qty_lastyear			--去年返利数量
                 ,0	as f_list_sale_amt_lastyear   			--去年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0	as f_sale_amt_lastyear 					--去年销售金额
                 ,0	as f_discount_amt_lastyear				--去年折扣额
				 ,0	as f_base_discount_amt_lastyear      	--去年基础折扣金额
				 ,0	as f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear 			--去年促销折扣金额
                 --,0	as f_rebate_amt_lastyear 			--去年返利金额
                 ,0	as f_cost_amt_lastyear 					--去年成本金额(包含赠送)
				 
            from  dwd_so_profit a
            where month_dt>='${YEAR_STA}'
              and month_dt<='${MONTH_DT}'
              and is_gift='Y'
            GROUP BY  d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id,channeltype_id,channeltype_name
			
            union all--返利 当月当年			
            select  d_corp_id as d_corp_id,d_client_id as d_client_id,d_material_id as d_material_id
				 ,'' as d_channel_id
				 ,'' as d_channel_name
                 ,0 as f_sale_qty			--销量
                 ,0 as f_sale_gift_qty 		--赠送数量
                 ,sum(if(biz_mth = '${MONTH_DT}', f_rebate_qty, 0)) as f_rebate_qty_mth	--返利数量
                 ,0 as f_list_sale_amt   	--挂牌销售金额
                 ,0 as f_sale_amt 			--销售金额
                 ,0 as f_discount_amt		--折扣额
				 ,0 as f_base_discount_amt  --基础折扣金额
				 ,0 as f_prm_discount_amt 	--促销折扣金额
                 ,sum(if(biz_mth = '${MONTH_DT}', f_rebate_amt, 0))	as f_rebate_amt_mth --返利金额
                 ,0 as f_cost_amt 			--成本金额(包含赠送)		
			

                 ,0	as f_sale_qty_year					--本年销量
                 ,0 as f_sale_gift_qty_year				--本年赠送数量
                 ,sum(f_rebate_qty) as f_rebate_qty_year		--本年返利数量
                 ,0	as f_list_sale_amt_year   			--本年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0	as f_sale_amt_year 					--本年销售金额
                 ,0	as f_discount_amt_year				--本年折扣额
				 ,0	as f_base_discount_amt_year      	--本年基础折扣金额
				 ,0	as f_prm_discount_amt_year 			--本年促销折扣金额
                 ,sum(f_rebate_amt)	as f_rebate_amt_year 	  --本年返利金额
                 ,0	as f_cost_amt_year 					--本年成本金额(包含赠送)

                 ,0	as f_sale_qty_lastyear					--去年销量
                 --,0	as f_sale_gift_qty_lastyear			--去年赠送数量
                 --,0	as f_rebate_qty_lastyear			--去年返利数量
                 ,0	as f_list_sale_amt_lastyear   			--去年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0	as f_sale_amt_lastyear 					--去年销售金额
                 ,0	as f_discount_amt_lastyear				--去年折扣额
				 ,0	as f_base_discount_amt_lastyear      	--去年基础折扣金额
				 ,0	as f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear 			--去年促销折扣金额
                 --,0	as f_rebate_amt_lastyear 			--去年返利金额
                 ,0	as f_cost_amt_lastyear 					--去年成本金额(包含赠送)

            from  dwd_cust_rebate_actual_m a
            where biz_mth>='${YEAR_STA}'
              and biz_mth<='${MONTH_DT}'
			  and d_billtype_code<>'35-Cxx-01'
            GROUP BY  d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id	
			
            union all--预收款返利（f_rebate_qty此时代表的是返利金额，需要处理为返利数量） 当月当年			
            select  a.d_corp_id,a.d_client_id,a.d_material_id
				 ,'' as d_channel_id
				 ,'' as d_channel_name

                 ,0 as f_sale_qty			--销量
                 ,0 as f_sale_gift_qty 		--赠送数量
                 ,sum(b.f_rebate_qty) 							as f_rebate_qty_mth	--返利数量
                 ,0 as f_list_sale_amt   	--挂牌销售金额
                 ,0 as f_sale_amt 			--销售金额
                 ,0 as f_discount_amt		--折扣额
				 ,0 as f_base_discount_amt  --基础折扣金额
				 ,0 as f_prm_discount_amt 	--促销折扣金额
                 ,sum(if(biz_mth = '${MONTH_DT}', f_rebate_amt, 0))	as f_rebate_amt_mth --返利金额
                 ,0 as f_cost_amt 			--成本金额(包含赠送)		



                 ,0 as f_sale_qty_year			--本年销量
                 ,0 as f_sale_gift_qty_year 	--本年赠送数量
                 ,sum(b.f_rebate_qty_year) 						as f_rebate_qty_year --本年返利数量
                 ,0 as f_list_sale_amt_year   	--本年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0 as f_sale_amt_year 			--本年销售金额
                 ,0 as f_discount_amt_year		--本年折扣额
				 ,0 as f_base_discount_amt_year --本年基础折扣金额
				 ,0 as f_prm_discount_amt_year 	--本年促销折扣金额
                 ,sum( f_rebate_amt)	as f_rebate_amt_year --本年返利金额
                 ,0 as f_cost_amt_year 			--本年成本金额(包含赠送)	


                 ,0	as f_sale_qty_lastyear					--去年销量
                 --,0	as f_sale_gift_qty_lastyear			--去年赠送数量
                 --,0	as f_rebate_qty_lastyear			--去年返利数量
                 ,0	as f_list_sale_amt_lastyear   			--去年挂牌销售金额
                 ,0	as f_sale_amt_lastyear 					--去年销售金额
                 ,0	as f_discount_amt_lastyear				--去年折扣额
				 ,0	as f_base_discount_amt_lastyear      	--去年基础折扣金额
				 ,0	as f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear 			--去年促销折扣金额
                 --,0	as f_rebate_amt_lastyear 			--去年返利金额
                 ,0	as f_cost_amt_lastyear 					--去年成本金额(包含赠送)


            from  dwd_cust_rebate_actual_m a
			---用当月销量 当年销量近似替代返利数量
			left join(
			select d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id
				 ,sum(if(month_dt = '${MONTH_DT}', f_gift_num, 0)) as f_rebate_qty--返利数量
				 ,sum(f_gift_num) as f_rebate_qty_year --本年返利数量
			from dwd_so_profit 
            where month_dt>='${YEAR_STA}'
              and month_dt<='${MONTH_DT}'
              and is_gift='Y'
			group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id
			) b 
			on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
			and a.d_client_id=b.d_client_id
			and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
            where biz_mth>='${YEAR_STA}'
              and biz_mth<='${MONTH_DT}'
			  and d_billtype_code='35-Cxx-01'
            GROUP BY  a.d_corp_id,a.d_client_id,a.d_material_id
)

group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id
) a

		   --公司+产品关联成本
	left join (
	
		select d_corp_id,d_product_id
		    ,toDecimal128(sum(f_row_ratio_num*f_price_kg)/count(distinct d_formula_id),4) as f_cost_ton
		    ,toDecimal128(sum(f_row_ratio_num*f_latest_price_kg)/count(distinct d_formula_id),4) as f_latest_cost_ton
		    ,toDecimal128(sum(f_row_ratio_num*f_stock_price_kg)/count(distinct d_formula_id),4) as f_stock_cost_ton
		    ,toDecimal128(sum(f_row_ratio_num*f_transit_price_kg_avg30)/count(distinct d_formula_id),4) as f_transit_cost_ton_avg30
		from dim_fact_row_price_snap
		where toYYYYMM(updt)=${MONTHDT}
		group by d_corp_id,d_product_id
	) b
		on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
		and a.d_product_id=b.d_product_id
		   --无法关联上的直接关联成本 该成本为所有公司均价
		left join (
		
		select d_product_id
			,toDecimal128(sum(f_product_sum12_qty),4) as f_product_qty   --产量
			,toDecimal128(sum(f_cost_01_total+f_cost_02_total),4) as f_cost_total --总成本
			,toDecimal128(sum(f_cost_01_total),4) as f_cost_01_total1 --制造成本
			,toDecimal128(sum(f_cost_02_total),4) as f_cost_02_total1 --配方成本（不含包装）
			,toDecimal128(sum(f_cost_02_total-f_cost_0203_total),4) as f_cost_02_03_total --配方成本（不含包装）
			,toDecimal128(sum(f_cost_0203_total),4) as f_cost_0203_total1 --包装成本
	    from dws_product_subject_cost
	    where biz_mth='${MONTH_DT_L1}'  --取上月
	    group by d_product_id
		) b2
		on a.d_product_id=b2.d_product_id
		
	   --包装袋通过公司+产品关联
	left join (
	
	select d_corp_id,d_formula_id,d_formula_code,d_formula_name,d_row_code,d_row_name,d_row_id,d_row_measure,f_ratio_num
	    from dim_formula_product_dictpack
	
	) c
	on a.d_product_id=c.d_formula_id
	and a.d_corp_id=c.d_corp_id
	
	   --产品价格通过公司+产品关联
	left join (
	
	        select d_corp_id,d_material_id as d_product_id,d_channel_id
			,ifNull(avg(if(f_price=1,null,f_price)),0) as f_price
	        from dwd_price_maintenance_snap
	        where toYYYYMM(updt)=${MONTHDT}
            --and client_dclass_code<>'K2'
	        group by d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_channel_id
            having 	  f_price<>1
	
	) d
	on a.d_product_id=d.d_product_id
	and a.d_corp_id=d.d_corp_id
	and a.d_channel_id=d.d_channel_id
	and a.d_channel_id<>'A'
	   --关联不上的使用澳华集团产品平均价格 通过产品关联
	left join (
	
	        select d_material_id as d_product_id,d_channel_id
			,ifNull(avg(if(f_price=1,null,f_price)),0) as f_price
	        from dwd_price_maintenance_snap
	        where toYYYYMM(updt)=${MONTHDT}
            --and client_dclass_code<>'K2'
	        group by d_material_id,d_channel_id
            having 	  f_price<>1
	
	) d2
	on a.d_product_id=d2.d_product_id
	and a.d_channel_id=d2.d_channel_id
	and a.d_channel_id<>'A'
		    --优先用公司id+产品id
		left join (
			select d_corp_id,d_product_id
			,sum(f_product_sum12_qty) as f_product_qty   --产量
			,sum(f_cost_01_total+f_cost_02_total) as f_cost_total --总成本
			,sum(f_cost_01_total) as f_cost_01_total1 --制造成本
			,sum(f_cost_02_total) as f_cost_02_total1 --配方成本（不含包装）
			,sum(f_cost_02_total-f_cost_0203_total) as f_cost_02_03_total --配方成本（不含包装）
			,sum(f_cost_0203_total) as f_cost_0203_total1 --包装成本
		    from dws_product_subject_cost
		    where biz_mth='${MONTH_DT_L1}'  --取上月
		    group by d_corp_id,d_product_id
		) e
		on a.d_product_id=e.d_product_id
		and a.d_corp_id=e.d_corp_id 
		    --若无法关联 则用集团产品平均值 即不用添加公司
		left join (
			select d_product_id
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,null,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_price --总成本 
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,null,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_01_price --制造成本 
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,null,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total-f_cost_0203_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_02_03_price --配方成本（不含包装）
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,null,divide(sum(f_cost_0203_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_0203_price --包装成本
		    from dws_product_subject_cost
		    where biz_mth='${MONTH_DT_L1}'  --取上月
		    group by d_product_id
		) e2
		on a.d_product_id=e2.d_product_id 
	
	where a.d_class_code2 in('21','22')

taskDefinitionList.name: 1.3sub-dim_fact_row_price_snap_ck_2h
taskDefinitionList.description: dim_fact_row_price_snap采购原料最新报价 库存价格 在途价格 快照表

taskParams.sql:
select  a.d_corp_id,a.d_corp_code,a.d_corp_name,
        a.d_corp_joinid,a.d_production_type,
        a.d_product_id,a.d_product_code,a.d_product_name,
        a.d_formula_id,a.d_formula_code,a.d_formula_name,
        a.d_row_id,a.d_row_code,a.d_row_name,
        a.f_row_ratio_num,a.f_product_ratio_num,
        round(b.f_price_ton/1000,3) as f_latest_price_kg,
        round(b.f_price_ton_avg30/1000,3) as f_latest_price_kg_avg30,
        round(b.f_price_ton_avg365/1000,3) as f_latest_price_kg_avg365,
        round(b.f_price_ton_avgall/1000,3) as f_latest_price_kg_avgall,
        round(case when b.f_price_ton=toDecimal128(0,6) then  case when c.measdoc_name='吨' then toDecimal128(c.f_day_price/1000,6) else f_day_price  end
              else  toDecimal128(b.f_price_ton/1000,6) end,3) as f_price_kg,
        case when c.measdoc_name='吨' then c.f_day_price/1000 else f_day_price  end as f_stock_price_kg,
        case when c.measdoc_name='吨' then c.f_daywill_price/1000 else c.f_daywill_price end as f_transit_price_kg_avg30,
        a.updt
from dim_row_product_snap a
         left join dws_oa_cg_wlbj b --原料最新报价
                   on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
                       and a.d_row_id=b.d_material_id
          and b.updt=today()
         left join dws_ia_material_day_stock c --原料最新库存价&在途价格
                   on c.bill_dt=today()
                       and a.d_corp_id=c.d_corp_id
                       and a.d_row_id=c.d_material_id
    where toYYYYMM(a.updt)=${MONTHDT}

select 
	toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}')
 day) as bill_dt,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
    a.d_corp_id as d_corp_id,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_busi_status', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_busi_status,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_code,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_name,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_sname', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_sname,
    a.d_material_id as d_material_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_code', a.d_material_id) as d_material_code,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', a.d_material_id) as d_material_name,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_code1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_name1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_name',  a.d_material_id) as measdoc_name,
    if(or(a.f_day_price=0,a.f_day_price is null ),toDecimal128(a.f_stock_price,6),toDecimal128(a.f_day_price,6)) as f_day_price,
	a.f_stock_price,
	a.f_opening_price,
	a.f_opening_qty,
    a.f_day_qty as f_day_qty,
    a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty as f_day_amt,
    a.f_po_inbound_qty0 as f_po_inbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_po_inbound_amt0 as f_po_inbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty0 as f_material_outbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty0*a.f_day_price as f_material_outbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_inbound_qty0 as f_inbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_inbound_qty0*a.f_day_price as f_inbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_outbound_qty0 as f_outbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_outbound_qty0*a.f_day_price  as f_outbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_inbound_flow0 as f_inbound_mth_flow,
    a.f_outbound_flow0 as f_outbound_mth_flow,
	
    a.f_other_inbound_qty as f_other_inbound_qty,
    a.f_other_inbound_qty*a.f_day_price  as f_other_inbound_mth_amt,	
    a.f_other_outbound_qty as f_other_outbound_qty,
    a.f_other_outbound_qty*a.f_day_price  as f_other_outbound_mth_amt,	
	
    a.f_po_inbound_qty_today as f_po_inbound_qty_today,
    a.f_po_inbound_amt_today as f_po_inbound_amt_today ,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty_today as f_material_outbound_qty_today,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_material_outbound_amt_today,
    a.f_inbound_qty_today as f_inbound_qty_today,
    a.f_inbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_inbound_amt_today,
    a.f_outbound_qty_today as f_outbound_qty_today,
    a.f_outbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_outbound_amt_today,
    a.f_inbound_flow_today as f_inbound_flow_today,
    a.f_outbound_flow_today as f_outbound_flow_today,
    a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1 as f_daywill_qty,
    if(a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1=0,0,(a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty +b.f_transit30d_amt)/(a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1)) as f_daywill_price,
    a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty +b.f_transit30d_amt as f_daywill_amt,
    b.f_order_qty1 as f_order_qty1,
    b.f_order_amt1 as f_order_amt1,
    b.f_order_price as f_order_price,
    b.f_receipt_qty1 as f_receipt_qty1,
    b.f_transit_qty1 as f_transit_qty1,
    b.f_transit_amt as f_transit_amt,
    b.f_transit_price as f_transit_price,
    b.f_transit30d_qty1 as f_transit30d_qty1,
    b.f_transit30d_amt as f_transit30d_amt,
    b.f_transit30d_price as f_transit30d_price,
	b.f_receipt_rate as f_receipt_rate, 
    a.month_dt as month_dt,
	now() as ts,
    a.bill_ts as bill_ts


from (
select  a.month_dt,max(a.bill_ts) as bill_ts
	  ,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
     ,toDecimal128(sum(if(a.delete_tag = 1, 0, f_amt)),10) /nullIf(sum(if(a.delete_tag = 1, 0, a.f_qty)),0) as f_day_price
	 ,max(if(a.delete_tag = 2, a.f_stock_price, 0)) as f_stock_price
	 ,sum(if(d_tag='期初',f_opening_price,0))  as f_opening_price --期初单价
     ,sum(if(d_tag='期初',f_qty,0))  as f_opening_qty --期初数量
     ,sum(a.f_qty)  as f_day_qty1 
     ,sum(a.f_qty_flow)  as f_day_qty 
	  
     ,sum(a.f_po_inbound_qty) as f_po_inbound_qty0
	 ,sum(a.f_po_inbound_amt) as f_po_inbound_amt0
     ,sum(a.f_material_outbound_qty) as f_material_outbound_qty0
     ,sum(a.f_inbound_qty11) as f_inbound_qty0
     ,sum(a.f_outbound_qty11) as f_outbound_qty0
     ,sum(a.f_inbound_flow) as f_inbound_flow0
     ,sum(a.f_outbound_flow) as f_outbound_flow0
	 
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_po_inbound_qty,0)) as f_po_inbound_qty_today
	 ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_po_inbound_amt,0)) as f_po_inbound_amt_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_material_outbound_qty,0)) as f_material_outbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_inbound_qty11,0)) as f_inbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_outbound_qty11,0)) as f_outbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_inbound_flow,0)) as f_inbound_flow_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_outbound_flow,0)) as f_outbound_flow_today
     ,sum(a.f_other_inbound_qty) as f_other_inbound_qty
     ,sum(a.f_other_outbound_qty) as f_other_outbound_qty
	 

from(
        select  toDateTime(a.current_month_dt||'-01 00:00:00') as bill_ts
			 ,31 as date_tag
             ,a.current_month_dt as month_dt
             ,'期初' as d_tag
             ,d_corp_id,d_material_id
             ,f_amt
             ,f_qty 
             ,f_qty as f_qty_flow 
			 ,f_price as f_opening_price
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_material_outbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_outbound_qty
			 ,0 as delete_tag
			 ,0 as f_stock_price
        from dwd_ia_monthnab_snap a
        where a.current_month_dt = '${MONTH_DT}'
          and dr='0'
		union all 
		select a.bill_ts
			 ,31 as date_tag
			 ,'${MONTH_DT}' as month_dt
			 ,'结转单' as d_tag
			 ,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_qty 
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_qty_flow 
			 ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_opening_price
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_material_outbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_outbound_qty
			 ,2 as delete_tag
			 ,a.f_stock_price as f_stock_price
		from(
			select bill_ts,month_dt,d_corp_id,d_material_id,f_stock_price
				,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY d_corp_id, d_material_id ORDER BY month_dt DESC) as rn
			from (
				select  toDateTime(a.month_dt||'-01 00:00:00') as bill_ts,a.month_dt,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
					,sum(f_cost_amount)/sum(f_num) as f_stock_price
				from dwd_so_cost a
				where a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L6DT}'
				and a.month_dt <= '${MONTH_L1DT}'
				and a.dr='0'
				group by a.month_dt,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
				having  sum(f_num)>0
				)
			)a
		where a.rn=1
        union all
        select bill_ts
			 ,case when toDate(bill_ts) =toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day)  then 0 when toDate(bill_ts) =toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') +1 day) then -1  else 30 end as date_tag 
             ,month_dt
			 ,multiIf(a.d_billtype_id='1001A410000000005YSX','采购入库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025DH','材料出库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025CW','转库入库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025DL','转库出库',a.f_inbound_qty<>0 ,'入库' , a.f_outbound_qty<>0, '出库' ,'其它') as d_tag
             ,d_corp_id,d_material_id
             ,if(and(f_price<>0,f_inbound_qty<>0,is_gift<>'Y'),f_amt,0) as f_amt
             ,if(and(f_price<>0,f_inbound_qty<>0,is_gift<>'Y'),f_inbound_qty,0) as f_qty 
             ,f_inbound_qty-f_outbound_qty as f_qty_flow 
			 ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_opening_price
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX' ,a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_po_inbound_qty
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX' ,a.f_amt ,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_po_inbound_amt
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025DH' ,a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_material_outbound_qty
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id <> '0001A4100000000025CW',a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10) ) AS f_inbound_qty11 
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id <> '0001A4100000000025DL',a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_outbound_qty11 
             ,f_inbound_qty as f_inbound_flow
             ,f_outbound_qty as f_outbound_flow
             --其它入库
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025CV' ,a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_other_inbound_qty 
             --其它出库
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025DK' ,a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_other_outbound_qty   
			 ,case when a.d_class_code1= '2' and  a.f_price = 1 then 1 else 0 end as delete_tag
			 ,0 as f_stock_price
        from dwd_ic_flow a
        where month_dt ='${MONTH_DT}'
        and dr='0'
		and bill_dt <=toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day) 
        ) a
group by a.month_dt, a.d_corp_id, a.d_material_id 
) a 
left join(
	select 
		d_corp_id,
		d_material_id,
        sum(f_order_qty) as f_order_qty1,
        sum(f_order_amt) as f_order_amt1,
        if(sum(f_order_qty)=0,0,sum(f_order_amt)/sum(f_order_qty)) as f_order_price,
        sum(f_receipt_qty) as f_receipt_qty1,
        sum(f_transit_qty) as f_transit_qty1,
        sum(f_transit_qty*f_order_price1) as f_transit_amt,
        if( sum(f_transit_qty)=0,0,sum(f_transit_qty*f_order_price1)/sum(f_transit_qty)) as f_transit_price,
        sum(f_transit30d_qty) as f_transit30d_qty1,
        sum(f_transit30d_qty*f_order_price1) as f_transit30d_amt,
        if( sum(f_transit30d_qty)=0,0,sum(f_transit30d_qty*f_order_price1)/sum(f_transit30d_qty)) as f_transit30d_price,
	    if(sum(f_order_qty)=0,0,sum(f_receipt_qty)/sum(f_order_qty)) as f_receipt_rate 
	from(
		select a.d_supplier_id
			,a.d_corp_id
		
			,a.d_material_id
			,a.purchase_order_code
			,a.plan_arrv_dt1 as plan_arrv_dt
			,a.contract_type
			,a.d_delivery_method
			,a.d_pay_term_name
			,a.d_pay_point_name

			,b.purchase_last_receipt_dt
			,a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_qty 
			,a.f_order_amt+a.f_freight_amt*a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_amt 
			,a.f_freight_amt*a.f_order_qty1 as f_freight_amt 
			,a.f_order_amt as f_order_amt1 
			,a.f_order_amt/a.f_order_qty1+a.f_freight_amt as f_order_price 
			,a.f_order_amt/a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_price1 
			,b.f_receipt_qty
			,b.f_receipt_amt
			,if(b.f_receipt_qty=0,0, b.f_receipt_amt/b.f_receipt_qty) as f_receipt_price 
		
			,a.f_order_qty1-b.f_receipt_qty as f_transit_qty 
			,if(plan_arrv_dt1-today()<=30,a.f_order_qty1-b.f_receipt_qty ,0)as f_transit30d_qty 
			,abs(b.f_receipt_qty-a.f_order_qty1)/a.f_order_qty1 as f_receipt_rate
		
		from(
				SELECT
					d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_bill_code as purchase_order_code
					,toDate(plan_arrv_dt)  as plan_arrv_dt1
					,argMax(contract_type,ts) as contract_type
					,argMax(d_delivery_method,ts) as d_delivery_method
					,argMax(d_pay_term_name,ts) as d_pay_term_name
					,argMax(d_pay_point_name,ts) as d_pay_point_name
		
					,sum(f_order_qty) as f_order_qty1

					,sum(if(measdoc_name='吨' , f_freight_amt,f_freight_amt/1000)) as f_freight_amt
					,toDecimal128(sum(toDecimal64(f_order_qty,2)*toDecimal64(f_unit_price,6)),6) as f_order_amt
				FROM v_dwd_po_order_detail
				where 1=1
				AND   toDate(creation_ts) <= toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day) 
				group by d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_bill_code,toDate(plan_arrv_dt)
				)a
				left join(
			SELECT d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,first_billcode as purchase_order_code
				,max(bill_dt) as purchase_last_receipt_dt
				,sum(f_inbound_qty) as f_receipt_qty,sum(f_amt) as f_receipt_amt

			FROM dwd_ic_flow
			WHERE month_dt>='${PO_LIMIT_MTH}'
			and dr='0'
			and   d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX'
			and   bill_dt <=toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day) 
			group by d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,first_billcode
		
			)b
						on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
							and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
							and a.d_supplier_id=b.d_supplier_id
							and a.purchase_order_code=b.purchase_order_code
			where b.f_receipt_qty-a.f_order_qty1<=0
		)
		group by d_corp_id,d_material_id
)b
on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
ORDER BY 
    a.month_dt,
    a.d_corp_id,
    a.d_material_id,
	a.bill_ts

taskDefinitionList.name: dws_ia_material_day_stock_1_5

taskParams.sql:
select 
	toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}')
 day) as bill_dt,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
    a.d_corp_id as d_corp_id,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_busi_status', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_busi_status,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_code,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_name,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_sname', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_sname,
    a.d_material_id as d_material_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_code', a.d_material_id) as d_material_code,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', a.d_material_id) as d_material_name,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_code1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_name1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_name',  a.d_material_id) as measdoc_name,


    if(or(a.f_day_price=0,a.f_day_price is null ),toDecimal128(a.f_stock_price,6),toDecimal128(a.f_day_price,6)) as f_day_price,
	a.f_stock_price,
	a.f_opening_price,
	a.f_opening_qty,
    a.f_day_qty as f_day_qty,
    a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty as f_day_amt,
	
    a.f_po_inbound_qty0 as f_po_inbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_po_inbound_amt0 as f_po_inbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty0 as f_material_outbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty0*a.f_day_price as f_material_outbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_inbound_qty0 as f_inbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_inbound_qty0*a.f_day_price as f_inbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_outbound_qty0 as f_outbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_outbound_qty0*a.f_day_price  as f_outbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_inbound_flow0 as f_inbound_mth_flow,
    a.f_outbound_flow0 as f_outbound_mth_flow,
	
    a.f_other_inbound_qty as f_other_inbound_qty,
    a.f_other_inbound_qty*a.f_day_price  as f_other_inbound_mth_amt,	
    a.f_other_outbound_qty as f_other_outbound_qty,
    a.f_other_outbound_qty*a.f_day_price  as f_other_outbound_mth_amt,	

    a.f_po_inbound_qty_today as f_po_inbound_qty_today,
    a.f_po_inbound_amt_today as f_po_inbound_amt_today ,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty_today as f_material_outbound_qty_today,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_material_outbound_amt_today,
    a.f_inbound_qty_today as f_inbound_qty_today,
    a.f_inbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_inbound_amt_today,
    a.f_outbound_qty_today as f_outbound_qty_today,
    a.f_outbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_outbound_amt_today,
    a.f_inbound_flow_today as f_inbound_flow_today,
    a.f_outbound_flow_today as f_outbound_flow_today,

    a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1 as f_daywill_qty,
    if(a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1=0,0,(a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty +b.f_transit30d_amt)/(a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1)) as f_daywill_price,
    a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty +b.f_transit30d_amt as f_daywill_amt,
    
    b.f_order_qty1 as f_order_qty1,
    b.f_order_amt1 as f_order_amt1,
    b.f_order_price as f_order_price,
    b.f_receipt_qty1 as f_receipt_qty1,
    b.f_transit_qty1 as f_transit_qty1,
    b.f_transit_amt as f_transit_amt,
    b.f_transit_price as f_transit_price,
    b.f_transit30d_qty1 as f_transit30d_qty1,
    b.f_transit30d_amt as f_transit30d_amt,
    b.f_transit30d_price as f_transit30d_price,
	b.f_receipt_rate as f_receipt_rate, 
    a.month_dt as month_dt,
	now() as ts,
    a.bill_ts as bill_ts


from (
select  a.month_dt,max(a.bill_ts) as bill_ts
	  ,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
     ,toDecimal128(sum(if(a.delete_tag = 1, 0, f_amt)),10) /nullIf(sum(if(a.delete_tag = 1, 0, a.f_qty)),0) as f_day_price
	 ,max(if(a.delete_tag = 2, a.f_stock_price, 0)) as f_stock_price
	 ,sum(if(d_tag='期初',f_opening_price,0))  as f_opening_price --期初单价
     ,sum(if(d_tag='期初',f_qty,0))  as f_opening_qty --期初数量
     ,sum(a.f_qty)  as f_day_qty1 
     ,sum(f_qty_flow)  as f_day_qty 
	  
     ,sum(f_po_inbound_qty) as f_po_inbound_qty0
	 ,sum(f_po_inbound_amt) as f_po_inbound_amt0
     ,sum(f_material_outbound_qty) as f_material_outbound_qty0
     ,sum(f_inbound_qty11) as f_inbound_qty0
     ,sum(f_outbound_qty11) as f_outbound_qty0
     ,sum(f_inbound_flow) as f_inbound_flow0
     ,sum(f_outbound_flow) as f_outbound_flow0
	 
     ,sum(if(date_tag=0,f_po_inbound_qty,0)) as f_po_inbound_qty_today
	 ,sum(if(date_tag=0,f_po_inbound_amt,0)) as f_po_inbound_amt_today
     ,sum(if(date_tag=0,f_material_outbound_qty,0)) as f_material_outbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(date_tag=0,f_inbound_qty11,0)) as f_inbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(date_tag=0,f_outbound_qty11,0)) as f_outbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(date_tag=0,f_inbound_flow,0)) as f_inbound_flow_today
     ,sum(if(date_tag=0,f_outbound_flow,0)) as f_outbound_flow_today
     ,sum(a.f_other_inbound_qty) as f_other_inbound_qty
     ,sum(a.f_other_outbound_qty) as f_other_outbound_qty

from(
        select  toDateTime(a.current_month_dt||'-01 00:00:00') as bill_ts
			 ,31 as date_tag
             ,'${MONTH_DT}' as   month_dt
             ,'期初' as d_tag
             ,d_corp_id,d_material_id
             ,f_amt
             ,f_qty 
             ,f_qty as f_qty_flow 
			 ,f_price as f_opening_price
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_material_outbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_outbound_qty
			 ,0 as delete_tag
			 ,0 as f_stock_price
        from dwd_ia_monthnab_snap a
        where a.current_month_dt = '${MONTH_L1DT}'
          and dr='0'
		union all 
		select a.bill_ts
			 ,31 as date_tag
			 ,'${MONTH_DT}' as month_dt
			 ,'结转单' as d_tag
			 ,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_qty 
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_qty_flow 
			 ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_opening_price
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_material_outbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_outbound_qty
			 ,2 as delete_tag
			 ,a.f_stock_price as f_stock_price
		from(
			select bill_ts,month_dt,d_corp_id,d_material_id,f_stock_price
				,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY d_corp_id, d_material_id ORDER BY month_dt DESC) as rn
			from (
				select  toDateTime(a.month_dt||'-01 00:00:00') as bill_ts,a.month_dt,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
					,sum(f_cost_amount)/sum(f_num) as f_stock_price
				from dwd_so_cost a
				where a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L6DT}'
				and a.month_dt <= '${MONTH_L1DT}'
				and a.dr='0'
				group by a.month_dt,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
				having  sum(f_num)>0
				)
			)a
		where a.rn=1
        union all
        select bill_ts
			 ,case when toDate(bill_ts) =toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}')
 day)  then 0 
				   when toDate(bill_ts) =toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}')
+1 day) then -1  
				   else 30 end as date_tag 
             ,'${MONTH_DT}' as month_dt
             ,multiIf(a.d_billtype_id='1001A410000000005YSX','采购入库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025DH','材料出库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025CW','转库入库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025DL','转库出库',a.f_inbound_qty<>0 ,'入库' , a.f_outbound_qty<>0, '出库' ,'其它') as d_tag
             ,d_corp_id,d_material_id
             ,if(and(f_price<>0,f_inbound_qty<>0,is_gift<>'Y'),f_amt,0) as f_amt
             ,if(and(f_price<>0,f_inbound_qty<>0,is_gift<>'Y'),f_inbound_qty,0) as f_qty 
             ,f_inbound_qty-f_outbound_qty as f_qty_flow 
			 ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_opening_price
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX' ,a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_po_inbound_qty
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX' ,a.f_amt ,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_po_inbound_amt
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025DH' ,a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_material_outbound_qty
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id <> '0001A4100000000025CW',a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10) ) AS f_inbound_qty11 
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id <> '0001A4100000000025DL',a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_outbound_qty11 
             ,f_inbound_qty as f_inbound_flow
             ,f_outbound_qty as f_outbound_flow
             --其它入库
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025CV' ,a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_other_inbound_qty 
             --其它出库
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025DK' ,a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_other_outbound_qty  
			 ,case when a.d_class_code1= '2' and  a.f_price = 1 then 1 else 0 end as delete_tag
			 ,0 as f_stock_price
        from dwd_ic_flow a
        where a.month_dt IN ('${MONTH_L1DT}','${MONTH_DT}')
        and dr='0'
		and bill_dt <=toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}')
 day) 

        ) a
group by a.month_dt, a.d_corp_id, a.d_material_id 
) a 
left join(
	select 
		d_corp_id,
		d_material_id,
        sum(f_order_qty) as f_order_qty1,
        sum(f_order_amt) as f_order_amt1,
        if(sum(f_order_qty)=0,0,sum(f_order_amt)/sum(f_order_qty)) as f_order_price,
        sum(f_receipt_qty) as f_receipt_qty1,
        sum(f_transit_qty) as f_transit_qty1,
        sum(f_transit_qty*f_order_price1) as f_transit_amt,
        if( sum(f_transit_qty)=0,0,sum(f_transit_qty*f_order_price1)/sum(f_transit_qty)) as f_transit_price,
        sum(f_transit30d_qty) as f_transit30d_qty1,
        sum(f_transit30d_qty*f_order_price1) as f_transit30d_amt,
        if( sum(f_transit30d_qty)=0,0,sum(f_transit30d_qty*f_order_price1)/sum(f_transit30d_qty)) as f_transit30d_price,
	    if(sum(f_order_qty)=0,0,sum(f_receipt_qty)/sum(f_order_qty)) as f_receipt_rate 
	from(
		select a.d_supplier_id
			,a.d_corp_id
		
			,a.d_material_id
			,a.purchase_order_code
			,a.plan_arrv_dt1 as plan_arrv_dt
			,a.contract_type
			,a.d_delivery_method
			,a.d_pay_term_name
			,a.d_pay_point_name

			,b.purchase_last_receipt_dt
			,a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_qty 
			,a.f_order_amt+a.f_freight_amt*a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_amt 
			,a.f_freight_amt*a.f_order_qty1 as f_freight_amt 
			,a.f_order_amt as f_order_amt1 
			,a.f_order_amt/a.f_order_qty1+a.f_freight_amt as f_order_price 
			,a.f_order_amt/a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_price1 
			,b.f_receipt_qty
			,b.f_receipt_amt
			,if(b.f_receipt_qty=0,0, b.f_receipt_amt/b.f_receipt_qty) as f_receipt_price 
		
			,a.f_order_qty1-b.f_receipt_qty as f_transit_qty 
			,if(plan_arrv_dt1-today()<=30,a.f_order_qty1-b.f_receipt_qty ,0)as f_transit30d_qty 
			,abs(b.f_receipt_qty-a.f_order_qty1)/a.f_order_qty1 as f_receipt_rate
		
		from(
				SELECT
					d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_bill_code as purchase_order_code
					,toDate(plan_arrv_dt)  as plan_arrv_dt1
					,argMax(contract_type,ts) as contract_type
					,argMax(d_delivery_method,ts) as d_delivery_method
					,argMax(d_pay_term_name,ts) as d_pay_term_name
					,argMax(d_pay_point_name,ts) as d_pay_point_name
		
					,sum(f_order_qty) as f_order_qty1

					,sum(if(measdoc_name='吨' , f_freight_amt,f_freight_amt/1000)) as f_freight_amt
					,toDecimal128(sum(toDecimal64(f_order_qty,2)*toDecimal64(f_unit_price,6)),6) as f_order_amt
				FROM v_dwd_po_order_detail
				where 1=1
				AND   toDate(creation_ts) <= toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}')
 day) 
				group by d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_bill_code,toDate(plan_arrv_dt)
				)a
				left join(
			SELECT d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,first_billcode as purchase_order_code
				,max(bill_dt) as purchase_last_receipt_dt
				,sum(f_inbound_qty) as f_receipt_qty,sum(f_amt) as f_receipt_amt

			FROM dwd_ic_flow
			WHERE month_dt>='${PO_LIMIT_MTH}'
			and dr='0'
			and   d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX'
			and   bill_dt <=toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}')
 day) 
			group by d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,first_billcode
		
			)b
						on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
							and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
							and a.d_supplier_id=b.d_supplier_id
							and a.purchase_order_code=b.purchase_order_code
			where b.f_receipt_qty-a.f_order_qty1<=0
		)
		group by d_corp_id,d_material_id
)b
on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
ORDER BY 
    a.month_dt,
    a.d_corp_id,
    a.d_material_id,
	a.bill_ts

taskParams.rawScript:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

# ====================== ClickHouse 配置 ======================
CH_HOST="10.113.226.23"
CH_PORT="8123"                    # HTTP 接口端口（默认8123）
CH_USER="root"
CH_PASSWORD="FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY"
CH_DATABASE="alphafeed"
TARGET_TABLE="dws_ia_material_day_stock"

# ====================== Dolphin 参数打印 ======================
echo "🚀 DolphinScheduler Shell 任务启动 - 动态循环跑数"
echo "PO_LIMIT_MTH   = ${PO_LIMIT_MTH}"
echo "TARGET_TABLE   = ${TARGET_TABLE}"



# ====================== curl 执行函数（推荐写法） ======================
run_ck_query() {
    local sql="$1"
    echo "→ 执行 SQL..."
    RESPONSE=$(curl -sS -u "${CH_USER}:${CH_PASSWORD}" \
        --data-binary "${sql}" \
        "http://${CH_HOST}:${CH_PORT}/?database=${CH_DATABASE}&wait_end_of_query=1" \
        -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}")
    
    HTTP_STATUS=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | tail -n1 | cut -d: -f2)
    BODY=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | head -n -1)
    
    if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" -ge 200 ] && [ "$HTTP_STATUS" -lt 300 ]; then
        echo "✅ 执行成功"
        echo "$BODY"
        return 0
    else
        echo "❌ 执行失败 HTTP $HTTP_STATUS"
        echo "$BODY"
        return 1
    fi
}


# ====================== 固定跑 3月份（1号到31号） ======================
MONTH_DT="2026-03"           # 要跑的月份
MONTH_L1DT="2026-02"		 # 成本结存表跑L1
MONTH_L6DT="2025-10"		 # 成本结存表跑L6
LAST_DAY=31                  # 3月份固定31天
echo "📅 固定运行 ${MONTH_DT} 月 1号 ~ ${LAST_DAY}号"

# ====================== 开始动态循环 ======================
for DAY in $(seq 1 ${LAST_DAY}); do
	# 计算 INT_NUM（距离今天的天数）
	INT_NUM=$(( ( $(date -d "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" +%s) - $(date -d "${MONTH_DT}-${DAY}" +%s) ) / 86400 ))
