	echo "===================================="
    echo "🚀 执行 ${MONTH_DT}-${DAY} | INT_NUM=${INT_NUM}"
    
    TARGET_DATE=$(date -d "${MONTH_DT}-${DAY}" +%Y-%m-%d)
    echo "📅 当前计算日期 bill_dt = ${TARGET_DATE}"

    # 删除分区
    if [ -n "${TARGET_TABLE}" ]; then
        DROP_SQL="ALTER TABLE ${TARGET_TABLE} DROP PARTITION   '${TARGET_DATE}'"
        echo "🗑️ 执行删除分区: ${DROP_SQL}"
        run_ck_query "$DROP_SQL"
    fi

    # ====================== 执行主 SQL ======================
    echo "🔥 执行第 ${DAY} 天主查询..."
    INSERT_SQL="
INSERT INTO ${TARGET_TABLE}	
(
    bill_dt, d_region_name, d_corp_id, d_corp_busi_status, d_corp_code, 
    d_corp_name, d_corp_sname, d_material_id, d_material_code, d_material_name,
    d_class_code1, d_class_name1, measdoc_name, f_day_price, f_stock_price,f_opening_price,f_opening_qty,f_day_qty, 
    f_day_amt, f_po_inbound_mth_qty, f_po_inbound_mth_amt, 
    f_material_outbound_mth_qty, f_material_outbound_mth_amt,
    f_inbound_mth_qty, f_inbound_mth_amt, f_outbound_mth_qty, f_outbound_mth_amt,
    f_inbound_mth_flow, f_outbound_mth_flow,
	f_other_inbound_qty,f_other_inbound_mth_amt,f_other_outbound_qty,f_other_outbound_mth_amt,
    f_po_inbound_qty_today, f_po_inbound_amt_today, f_material_outbound_qty_today,
    f_material_outbound_amt_today, f_inbound_qty_today, f_inbound_amt_today,
    f_outbound_qty_today, f_outbound_amt_today, f_inbound_flow_today, f_outbound_flow_today,
    f_daywill_qty, f_daywill_price, f_daywill_amt,
    f_order_qty1, f_order_amt1, f_order_price, f_receipt_qty1, f_transit_qty1,
    f_transit_amt, f_transit_price, f_transit30d_qty1, f_transit30d_amt,
    f_transit30d_price, f_receipt_rate, month_dt, ts, bill_ts
)
select 
	toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}')
 day) as bill_dt,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
    a.d_corp_id as d_corp_id,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_busi_status', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_busi_status,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_code,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_name,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_sname', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_sname,
    a.d_material_id as d_material_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_code', a.d_material_id) as d_material_code,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', a.d_material_id) as d_material_name,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_code1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_name1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_name',  a.d_material_id) as measdoc_name,
    if(or(a.f_day_price=0,a.f_day_price is null ),toDecimal128(a.f_stock_price,6),toDecimal128(a.f_day_price,6)) as f_day_price,
	a.f_stock_price,
	a.f_opening_price,
	a.f_opening_qty,
    a.f_day_qty as f_day_qty,
    a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty as f_day_amt,
    a.f_po_inbound_qty0 as f_po_inbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_po_inbound_amt0 as f_po_inbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty0 as f_material_outbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty0*a.f_day_price as f_material_outbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_inbound_qty0 as f_inbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_inbound_qty0*a.f_day_price as f_inbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_outbound_qty0 as f_outbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_outbound_qty0*a.f_day_price  as f_outbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_inbound_flow0 as f_inbound_mth_flow,
    a.f_outbound_flow0 as f_outbound_mth_flow,
	
    a.f_other_inbound_qty as f_other_inbound_qty,
    a.f_other_inbound_qty*a.f_day_price  as f_other_inbound_mth_amt,	
    a.f_other_outbound_qty as f_other_outbound_qty,
    a.f_other_outbound_qty*a.f_day_price  as f_other_outbound_mth_amt,	
	
    a.f_po_inbound_qty_today as f_po_inbound_qty_today,
    a.f_po_inbound_amt_today as f_po_inbound_amt_today ,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty_today as f_material_outbound_qty_today,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_material_outbound_amt_today,
    a.f_inbound_qty_today as f_inbound_qty_today,
    a.f_inbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_inbound_amt_today,
    a.f_outbound_qty_today as f_outbound_qty_today,
    a.f_outbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_outbound_amt_today,
    a.f_inbound_flow_today as f_inbound_flow_today,
    a.f_outbound_flow_today as f_outbound_flow_today,
    a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1 as f_daywill_qty,
    if(a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1=0,0,(a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty +b.f_transit30d_amt)/(a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1)) as f_daywill_price,
    a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty +b.f_transit30d_amt as f_daywill_amt,
    b.f_order_qty1 as f_order_qty1,
    b.f_order_amt1 as f_order_amt1,
    b.f_order_price as f_order_price,
    b.f_receipt_qty1 as f_receipt_qty1,
    b.f_transit_qty1 as f_transit_qty1,
    b.f_transit_amt as f_transit_amt,
    b.f_transit_price as f_transit_price,
    b.f_transit30d_qty1 as f_transit30d_qty1,
    b.f_transit30d_amt as f_transit30d_amt,
    b.f_transit30d_price as f_transit30d_price,
	b.f_receipt_rate as f_receipt_rate, 
    a.month_dt as month_dt,
	now() as ts,
    a.bill_ts as bill_ts


from (
select  a.month_dt,max(a.bill_ts) as bill_ts
	  ,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
     ,toDecimal128(sum(if(a.delete_tag = 1, 0, f_amt)),10) /nullIf(sum(if(a.delete_tag = 1, 0, a.f_qty)),0) as f_day_price
	 ,max(if(a.delete_tag = 2, a.f_stock_price, 0)) as f_stock_price
	 ,sum(if(d_tag='期初',f_opening_price,0))  as f_opening_price --期初单价
     ,sum(if(d_tag='期初',f_qty,0))  as f_opening_qty --期初数量
     ,sum(a.f_qty)  as f_day_qty1 
     ,sum(a.f_qty_flow)  as f_day_qty 
	  
     ,sum(a.f_po_inbound_qty) as f_po_inbound_qty0
	 ,sum(a.f_po_inbound_amt) as f_po_inbound_amt0
     ,sum(a.f_material_outbound_qty) as f_material_outbound_qty0
     ,sum(a.f_inbound_qty11) as f_inbound_qty0
     ,sum(a.f_outbound_qty11) as f_outbound_qty0
     ,sum(a.f_inbound_flow) as f_inbound_flow0
     ,sum(a.f_outbound_flow) as f_outbound_flow0
	 
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_po_inbound_qty,0)) as f_po_inbound_qty_today
	 ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_po_inbound_amt,0)) as f_po_inbound_amt_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_material_outbound_qty,0)) as f_material_outbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_inbound_qty11,0)) as f_inbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_outbound_qty11,0)) as f_outbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_inbound_flow,0)) as f_inbound_flow_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_outbound_flow,0)) as f_outbound_flow_today
     ,sum(a.f_other_inbound_qty) as f_other_inbound_qty
     ,sum(a.f_other_outbound_qty) as f_other_outbound_qty
	 

from(
        select  toDateTime(a.current_month_dt||'-01 00:00:00') as bill_ts
			 ,31 as date_tag
             ,a.current_month_dt as month_dt
             ,'期初' as d_tag
             ,d_corp_id,d_material_id
             ,f_amt
             ,f_qty 
             ,f_qty as f_qty_flow 
			 ,f_price as f_opening_price
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_material_outbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_outbound_qty
			 ,0 as delete_tag
			 ,0 as f_stock_price
        from dwd_ia_monthnab_snap a
        where a.current_month_dt = '${MONTH_DT}'
          and dr='0'
		union all 
		select a.bill_ts
			 ,31 as date_tag
			 ,'${MONTH_DT}' as month_dt
			 ,'结转单' as d_tag
			 ,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_qty 
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_qty_flow 
			 ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_opening_price
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_material_outbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_outbound_qty
			 ,2 as delete_tag
			 ,a.f_stock_price as f_stock_price
		from(
			select bill_ts,month_dt,d_corp_id,d_material_id,f_stock_price
				,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY d_corp_id, d_material_id ORDER BY month_dt DESC) as rn
			from (
				select  toDateTime(a.month_dt||'-01 00:00:00') as bill_ts,a.month_dt,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
					,sum(f_cost_amount)/sum(f_num) as f_stock_price
				from dwd_so_cost a
				where a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L6DT}'
				and a.month_dt <= '${MONTH_L1DT}'
				and a.dr='0'
				group by a.month_dt,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
				having  sum(f_num)>0
				)
			)a
		where a.rn=1
        union all
        select bill_ts
			 ,case when toDate(bill_ts) =toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day)  then 0 when toDate(bill_ts) =toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') +1 day) then -1  else 30 end as date_tag 
             ,month_dt
			 ,multiIf(a.d_billtype_id='1001A410000000005YSX','采购入库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025DH','材料出库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025CW','转库入库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025DL','转库出库',a.f_inbound_qty<>0 ,'入库' , a.f_outbound_qty<>0, '出库' ,'其它') as d_tag
             ,d_corp_id,d_material_id
             ,if(and(f_price<>0,f_inbound_qty<>0,is_gift<>'Y'),f_amt,0) as f_amt
             ,if(and(f_price<>0,f_inbound_qty<>0,is_gift<>'Y'),f_inbound_qty,0) as f_qty 
             ,f_inbound_qty-f_outbound_qty as f_qty_flow 
			 ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_opening_price
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX' ,a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_po_inbound_qty
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX' ,a.f_amt ,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_po_inbound_amt
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025DH' ,a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_material_outbound_qty
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id <> '0001A4100000000025CW',a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10) ) AS f_inbound_qty11 
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id <> '0001A4100000000025DL',a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_outbound_qty11 
             ,f_inbound_qty as f_inbound_flow
             ,f_outbound_qty as f_outbound_flow
             --其它入库
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025CV' ,a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_other_inbound_qty 
             --其它出库
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025DK' ,a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_other_outbound_qty   
			 ,case when a.d_class_code1= '2' and  a.f_price = 1 then 1 else 0 end as delete_tag
			 ,0 as f_stock_price
        from dwd_ic_flow a
        where month_dt ='${MONTH_DT}'
        and dr='0'
		and bill_dt <=toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day) 
        ) a
group by a.month_dt, a.d_corp_id, a.d_material_id 
) a 
left join(
	select 
		d_corp_id,
		d_material_id,
        sum(f_order_qty) as f_order_qty1,
        sum(f_order_amt) as f_order_amt1,
        if(sum(f_order_qty)=0,0,sum(f_order_amt)/sum(f_order_qty)) as f_order_price,
        sum(f_receipt_qty) as f_receipt_qty1,
        sum(f_transit_qty) as f_transit_qty1,
        sum(f_transit_qty*f_order_price1) as f_transit_amt,
        if( sum(f_transit_qty)=0,0,sum(f_transit_qty*f_order_price1)/sum(f_transit_qty)) as f_transit_price,
        sum(f_transit30d_qty) as f_transit30d_qty1,
        sum(f_transit30d_qty*f_order_price1) as f_transit30d_amt,
        if( sum(f_transit30d_qty)=0,0,sum(f_transit30d_qty*f_order_price1)/sum(f_transit30d_qty)) as f_transit30d_price,
	    if(sum(f_order_qty)=0,0,sum(f_receipt_qty)/sum(f_order_qty)) as f_receipt_rate 
	from(
		select a.d_supplier_id
			,a.d_corp_id
		
			,a.d_material_id
			,a.purchase_order_code
			,a.plan_arrv_dt1 as plan_arrv_dt
			,a.contract_type
			,a.d_delivery_method
			,a.d_pay_term_name
			,a.d_pay_point_name

			,b.purchase_last_receipt_dt
			,a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_qty 
			,a.f_order_amt+a.f_freight_amt*a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_amt 
			,a.f_freight_amt*a.f_order_qty1 as f_freight_amt 
			,a.f_order_amt as f_order_amt1 
			,a.f_order_amt/a.f_order_qty1+a.f_freight_amt as f_order_price 
			,a.f_order_amt/a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_price1 
			,b.f_receipt_qty
			,b.f_receipt_amt
			,if(b.f_receipt_qty=0,0, b.f_receipt_amt/b.f_receipt_qty) as f_receipt_price 
		
			,a.f_order_qty1-b.f_receipt_qty as f_transit_qty 
			,if(plan_arrv_dt1-today()<=30,a.f_order_qty1-b.f_receipt_qty ,0)as f_transit30d_qty 
			,abs(b.f_receipt_qty-a.f_order_qty1)/a.f_order_qty1 as f_receipt_rate
		
		from(
				SELECT
					d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_bill_code as purchase_order_code
					,toDate(plan_arrv_dt)  as plan_arrv_dt1
					,argMax(contract_type,ts) as contract_type
					,argMax(d_delivery_method,ts) as d_delivery_method
					,argMax(d_pay_term_name,ts) as d_pay_term_name
					,argMax(d_pay_point_name,ts) as d_pay_point_name
		
					,sum(f_order_qty) as f_order_qty1

					,sum(if(measdoc_name='吨' , f_freight_amt,f_freight_amt/1000)) as f_freight_amt
					,toDecimal128(sum(toDecimal64(f_order_qty,2)*toDecimal64(f_unit_price,6)),6) as f_order_amt
				FROM v_dwd_po_order_detail
				where 1=1
				AND   toDate(creation_ts) <= toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day) 
				group by d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_bill_code,toDate(plan_arrv_dt)
				)a
				left join(
			SELECT d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,first_billcode as purchase_order_code
				,max(bill_dt) as purchase_last_receipt_dt
				,sum(f_inbound_qty) as f_receipt_qty,sum(f_amt) as f_receipt_amt

			FROM dwd_ic_flow
			WHERE month_dt>='${PO_LIMIT_MTH}'
			and dr='0'
			and   d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX'
			and   bill_dt <=toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day) 
			group by d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,first_billcode
		
			)b
						on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
							and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
							and a.d_supplier_id=b.d_supplier_id
							and a.purchase_order_code=b.purchase_order_code
			where b.f_receipt_qty-a.f_order_qty1<=0
		)
		group by d_corp_id,d_material_id
)b
on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
ORDER BY 
    a.month_dt,
    a.d_corp_id,
    a.d_material_id,
	a.bill_ts
	"
	run_ck_query "$INSERT_SQL"
    echo "✅ 第 ${DAY} 天执行完成！"
done

echo "🎉 全部 ${LAST_DAY} 天循环执行完毕！"

#!/bin/bash
set -e

# ====================== ClickHouse 配置 ======================
CH_HOST="10.113.226.23"
CH_PORT="8123"                    # HTTP 接口端口（默认8123）
CH_USER="root"
CH_PASSWORD="FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY"
CH_DATABASE="alphafeed"
TARGET_TABLE="dws_ia_material_day_stock"

# ====================== Dolphin 参数打印 ======================
echo "🚀 DolphinScheduler Shell 任务启动 - 动态循环跑数"
echo "MONTH_DT       = ${MONTH_DT}"
echo "MONTH_L1DT     = ${MONTH_L1DT}"
echo "MONTH_L6DT     = ${MONTH_L6DT}"
echo "PO_LIMIT_MTH   = ${PO_LIMIT_MTH}"
echo "TARGET_TABLE   = ${TARGET_TABLE}"

if [ -z "${MONTH_DT}" ]; then
    echo "❌ 错误：MONTH_DT 参数不能为空！"
    exit 1
fi

# ====================== curl 执行函数（推荐写法） ======================
run_ck_query() {
    local sql="$1"
    echo "→ 执行 SQL..."
    RESPONSE=$(curl -sS -u "${CH_USER}:${CH_PASSWORD}" \
        --data-binary "${sql}" \
        "http://${CH_HOST}:${CH_PORT}/?database=${CH_DATABASE}&wait_end_of_query=1" \
        -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}")
    
    HTTP_STATUS=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | tail -n1 | cut -d: -f2)
    BODY=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | head -n -1)
    
    if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" -ge 200 ] && [ "$HTTP_STATUS" -lt 300 ]; then
        echo "✅ 执行成功"
        echo "$BODY"
        return 0
    else
        echo "❌ 执行失败 HTTP $HTTP_STATUS"
        echo "$BODY"
        return 1
    fi
}

# ====================== 计算循环天数 ======================
TODAY_DAY=$(date +%d)
TODAY_DAY_NO_ZERO=$(echo ${TODAY_DAY} | sed 's/^0*//')
echo "📅 今天是 ${MONTH_DT}-${TODAY_DAY}，将从 1 号循环到 ${TODAY_DAY_NO_ZERO} 号"

# ====================== 开始动态循环 ======================
for DAY in $(seq 1 ${TODAY_DAY_NO_ZERO}); do
    INT_NUM=$((TODAY_DAY_NO_ZERO - DAY))
    
    echo "===================================="
    echo "🚀 开始执行第 ${DAY} 天（共 ${TODAY_DAY_NO_ZERO} 天）"
    echo "🔧 INT_NUM = ${INT_NUM}"
    
    TARGET_DATE=$(date -d "${MONTH_DT}-${DAY}" +%Y-%m-%d)
    echo "📅 当前计算日期 bill_dt = ${TARGET_DATE}"

    # 删除分区
    if [ -n "${TARGET_TABLE}" ]; then
        DROP_SQL="ALTER TABLE ${TARGET_TABLE} DROP PARTITION   '${TARGET_DATE}'"
        echo "🗑️ 执行删除分区: ${DROP_SQL}"
        run_ck_query "$DROP_SQL"
    fi

    # ====================== 执行主 SQL ======================
    echo "🔥 执行第 ${DAY} 天主查询..."
    INSERT_SQL="
INSERT INTO ${TARGET_TABLE}	
(
    bill_dt, d_region_name, d_corp_id, d_corp_busi_status, d_corp_code, 
    d_corp_name, d_corp_sname, d_material_id, d_material_code, d_material_name,
    d_class_code1, d_class_name1, measdoc_name, f_day_price, f_stock_price,f_opening_price,f_opening_qty,f_day_qty, 
    f_day_amt, f_po_inbound_mth_qty, f_po_inbound_mth_amt, 
    f_material_outbound_mth_qty, f_material_outbound_mth_amt,
    f_inbound_mth_qty, f_inbound_mth_amt, f_outbound_mth_qty, f_outbound_mth_amt,
    f_inbound_mth_flow, f_outbound_mth_flow,
	f_other_inbound_qty,f_other_inbound_mth_amt,f_other_outbound_qty,f_other_outbound_mth_amt,
    f_po_inbound_qty_today, f_po_inbound_amt_today, f_material_outbound_qty_today,
    f_material_outbound_amt_today, f_inbound_qty_today, f_inbound_amt_today,
    f_outbound_qty_today, f_outbound_amt_today, f_inbound_flow_today, f_outbound_flow_today,
    f_daywill_qty, f_daywill_price, f_daywill_amt,
    f_order_qty1, f_order_amt1, f_order_price, f_receipt_qty1, f_transit_qty1,
    f_transit_amt, f_transit_price, f_transit30d_qty1, f_transit30d_amt,
    f_transit30d_price, f_receipt_rate, month_dt, ts, bill_ts
)
select 
	toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}')
 day) as bill_dt,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
    a.d_corp_id as d_corp_id,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_busi_status', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_busi_status,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_code,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_name,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_sname', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_sname,
    a.d_material_id as d_material_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_code', a.d_material_id) as d_material_code,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', a.d_material_id) as d_material_name,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_code1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_name1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_name',  a.d_material_id) as measdoc_name,
    if(or(a.f_day_price=0,a.f_day_price is null ),toDecimal128(a.f_stock_price,6),toDecimal128(a.f_day_price,6)) as f_day_price,
	a.f_stock_price,
	a.f_opening_price,
	a.f_opening_qty,
    a.f_day_qty as f_day_qty,
    a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty as f_day_amt,
    a.f_po_inbound_qty0 as f_po_inbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_po_inbound_amt0 as f_po_inbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty0 as f_material_outbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty0*a.f_day_price as f_material_outbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_inbound_qty0 as f_inbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_inbound_qty0*a.f_day_price as f_inbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_outbound_qty0 as f_outbound_mth_qty,
    a.f_outbound_qty0*a.f_day_price  as f_outbound_mth_amt,
    a.f_inbound_flow0 as f_inbound_mth_flow,
    a.f_outbound_flow0 as f_outbound_mth_flow,
	
    a.f_other_inbound_qty as f_other_inbound_qty,
    a.f_other_inbound_qty*a.f_day_price  as f_other_inbound_mth_amt,	
    a.f_other_outbound_qty as f_other_outbound_qty,
    a.f_other_outbound_qty*a.f_day_price  as f_other_outbound_mth_amt,	
	
    a.f_po_inbound_qty_today as f_po_inbound_qty_today,
    a.f_po_inbound_amt_today as f_po_inbound_amt_today ,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty_today as f_material_outbound_qty_today,
    a.f_material_outbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_material_outbound_amt_today,
    a.f_inbound_qty_today as f_inbound_qty_today,
    a.f_inbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_inbound_amt_today,
    a.f_outbound_qty_today as f_outbound_qty_today,
    a.f_outbound_qty_today*a.f_day_price as f_outbound_amt_today,
    a.f_inbound_flow_today as f_inbound_flow_today,
    a.f_outbound_flow_today as f_outbound_flow_today,
    a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1 as f_daywill_qty,
    if(a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1=0,0,(a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty +b.f_transit30d_amt)/(a.f_day_qty+b.f_transit30d_qty1)) as f_daywill_price,
    a.f_day_price*a.f_day_qty +b.f_transit30d_amt as f_daywill_amt,
    b.f_order_qty1 as f_order_qty1,
    b.f_order_amt1 as f_order_amt1,
    b.f_order_price as f_order_price,
    b.f_receipt_qty1 as f_receipt_qty1,
    b.f_transit_qty1 as f_transit_qty1,
    b.f_transit_amt as f_transit_amt,
    b.f_transit_price as f_transit_price,
    b.f_transit30d_qty1 as f_transit30d_qty1,
    b.f_transit30d_amt as f_transit30d_amt,
    b.f_transit30d_price as f_transit30d_price,
	b.f_receipt_rate as f_receipt_rate, 
    a.month_dt as month_dt,
	now() as ts,
    a.bill_ts as bill_ts


from (
select  a.month_dt,max(a.bill_ts) as bill_ts
	  ,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
     ,toDecimal128(sum(if(a.delete_tag = 1, 0, f_amt)),10) /nullIf(sum(if(a.delete_tag = 1, 0, a.f_qty)),0) as f_day_price
	 ,max(if(a.delete_tag = 2, a.f_stock_price, 0)) as f_stock_price
	 ,sum(if(d_tag='期初',f_opening_price,0))  as f_opening_price --期初单价
     ,sum(if(d_tag='期初',f_qty,0))  as f_opening_qty --期初数量
     ,sum(a.f_qty)  as f_day_qty1 
     ,sum(a.f_qty_flow)  as f_day_qty 
	  
     ,sum(a.f_po_inbound_qty) as f_po_inbound_qty0
	 ,sum(a.f_po_inbound_amt) as f_po_inbound_amt0
     ,sum(a.f_material_outbound_qty) as f_material_outbound_qty0
     ,sum(a.f_inbound_qty11) as f_inbound_qty0
     ,sum(a.f_outbound_qty11) as f_outbound_qty0
     ,sum(a.f_inbound_flow) as f_inbound_flow0
     ,sum(a.f_outbound_flow) as f_outbound_flow0
	 
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_po_inbound_qty,0)) as f_po_inbound_qty_today
	 ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_po_inbound_amt,0)) as f_po_inbound_amt_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_material_outbound_qty,0)) as f_material_outbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_inbound_qty11,0)) as f_inbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_outbound_qty11,0)) as f_outbound_qty_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_inbound_flow,0)) as f_inbound_flow_today
     ,sum(if(a.date_tag=0,a.f_outbound_flow,0)) as f_outbound_flow_today
     ,sum(a.f_other_inbound_qty) as f_other_inbound_qty
     ,sum(a.f_other_outbound_qty) as f_other_outbound_qty
	 

from(
        select  toDateTime(a.current_month_dt||'-01 00:00:00') as bill_ts
			 ,31 as date_tag
             ,a.current_month_dt as month_dt
             ,'期初' as d_tag
             ,d_corp_id,d_material_id
             ,f_amt
             ,f_qty 
             ,f_qty as f_qty_flow 
			 ,f_price as f_opening_price
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_material_outbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_outbound_qty
			 ,0 as delete_tag
			 ,0 as f_stock_price
        from dwd_ia_monthnab_snap a
        where a.current_month_dt = '${MONTH_DT}'
          and dr='0'
		union all 
		select a.bill_ts
			 ,31 as date_tag
			 ,'${MONTH_DT}' as month_dt
			 ,'结转单' as d_tag
			 ,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_qty 
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_qty_flow 
			 ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_opening_price
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_po_inbound_amt
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_material_outbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_qty11
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_inbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_outbound_flow
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_inbound_qty
             ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_other_outbound_qty
			 ,2 as delete_tag
			 ,a.f_stock_price as f_stock_price
		from(
			select bill_ts,month_dt,d_corp_id,d_material_id,f_stock_price
				,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY d_corp_id, d_material_id ORDER BY month_dt DESC) as rn
			from (
				select  toDateTime(a.month_dt||'-01 00:00:00') as bill_ts,a.month_dt,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
					,sum(f_cost_amount)/sum(f_num) as f_stock_price
				from dwd_so_cost a
				where a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L6DT}'
				and a.month_dt <= '${MONTH_L1DT}'
				and a.dr='0'
				group by a.month_dt,a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id
				having  sum(f_num)>0
				)
			)a
		where a.rn=1
        union all
        select bill_ts
			 ,case when toDate(bill_ts) =toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day)  then 0 when toDate(bill_ts) =toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') +1 day) then -1  else 30 end as date_tag 
             ,month_dt
			 ,multiIf(a.d_billtype_id='1001A410000000005YSX','采购入库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025DH','材料出库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025CW','转库入库',a.d_billtype_id='0001A4100000000025DL','转库出库',a.f_inbound_qty<>0 ,'入库' , a.f_outbound_qty<>0, '出库' ,'其它') as d_tag
             ,d_corp_id,d_material_id
             ,if(and(f_price<>0,f_inbound_qty<>0,is_gift<>'Y'),f_amt,0) as f_amt
             ,if(and(f_price<>0,f_inbound_qty<>0,is_gift<>'Y'),f_inbound_qty,0) as f_qty 
             ,f_inbound_qty-f_outbound_qty as f_qty_flow 
			 ,toDecimal128(0,10) as f_opening_price
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX' ,a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_po_inbound_qty
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX' ,a.f_amt ,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_po_inbound_amt
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025DH' ,a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_material_outbound_qty
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id <> '0001A4100000000025CW',a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10) ) AS f_inbound_qty11 
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id <> '0001A4100000000025DL',a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_outbound_qty11 
             ,f_inbound_qty as f_inbound_flow
             ,f_outbound_qty as f_outbound_flow
             --其它入库
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025CV' ,a.f_inbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10))  AS f_other_inbound_qty 
             --其它出库
             ,if(a.d_billtype_id = '0001A4100000000025DK' ,a.f_outbound_qty,toDecimal128(0,10)) AS f_other_outbound_qty   
			 ,case when a.d_class_code1= '2' and  a.f_price = 1 then 1 else 0 end as delete_tag
			 ,0 as f_stock_price
        from dwd_ic_flow a
        where month_dt ='${MONTH_DT}'
        and dr='0'
		and bill_dt <=toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day) 
        ) a
group by a.month_dt, a.d_corp_id, a.d_material_id 
) a 
left join(
	select 
		d_corp_id,
		d_material_id,
        sum(f_order_qty) as f_order_qty1,
        sum(f_order_amt) as f_order_amt1,
        if(sum(f_order_qty)=0,0,sum(f_order_amt)/sum(f_order_qty)) as f_order_price,
        sum(f_receipt_qty) as f_receipt_qty1,
        sum(f_transit_qty) as f_transit_qty1,
        sum(f_transit_qty*bb.f_order_price1) as f_transit_amt,
        if( sum(f_transit_qty)=0,0,sum(f_transit_qty*bb.f_order_price1)/sum(f_transit_qty)) as f_transit_price,
        sum(f_transit30d_qty) as f_transit30d_qty1,
        sum(f_transit30d_qty*bb.f_order_price1) as f_transit30d_amt,
        if( sum(f_transit30d_qty)=0,0,sum(f_transit30d_qty*bb.f_order_price1)/sum(f_transit30d_qty)) as f_transit30d_price,
	    if(sum(f_order_qty)=0,0,sum(f_receipt_qty)/sum(f_order_qty)) as f_receipt_rate 
	from(
		select a.d_supplier_id
			,a.d_corp_id
		
			,a.d_material_id
			,a.purchase_order_code
			,a.plan_arrv_dt1 as plan_arrv_dt
			,a.contract_type
			,a.d_delivery_method
			,a.d_pay_term_name
			,a.d_pay_point_name

			,b.purchase_last_receipt_dt
			,a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_qty 
			,a.f_order_amt+a.f_freight_amt*a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_amt 
			,a.f_freight_amt*a.f_order_qty1 as f_freight_amt 
			,a.f_order_amt as f_order_amt1 
			,a.f_order_amt/a.f_order_qty1+a.f_freight_amt as f_order_price 
			,a.f_order_amt/a.f_order_qty1 as f_order_price1 
			,b.f_receipt_qty
			,b.f_receipt_amt
			,if(b.f_receipt_qty=0,0, b.f_receipt_amt/b.f_receipt_qty) as f_receipt_price 
		
			,a.f_order_qty1-b.f_receipt_qty as f_transit_qty 
			,if(plan_arrv_dt1-today()<=30,a.f_order_qty1-b.f_receipt_qty ,0)as f_transit30d_qty 
			,abs(b.f_receipt_qty-a.f_order_qty1)/a.f_order_qty1 as f_receipt_rate
		
		from(
				SELECT
					d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_bill_code as purchase_order_code
					,toDate(plan_arrv_dt)  as plan_arrv_dt1
					,argMax(contract_type,ts) as contract_type
					,argMax(d_delivery_method,ts) as d_delivery_method
					,argMax(d_pay_term_name,ts) as d_pay_term_name
					,argMax(d_pay_point_name,ts) as d_pay_point_name
		
					,sum(f_order_qty) as f_order_qty1

					,sum(if(measdoc_name='吨' , f_freight_amt,f_freight_amt/1000)) as f_freight_amt
					,toDecimal128(sum(toDecimal64(f_order_qty,2)*toDecimal64(f_unit_price,6)),6) as f_order_amt
				FROM v_dwd_po_order_detail
				where 1=1
				AND   toDate(creation_ts) <= toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day) 
				group by d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_bill_code,toDate(plan_arrv_dt)
				)a
				left join(
			SELECT d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,first_billcode as purchase_order_code
				,max(bill_dt) as purchase_last_receipt_dt
				,sum(f_inbound_qty) as f_receipt_qty,sum(f_amt) as f_receipt_amt

			FROM dwd_ic_flow
			WHERE month_dt>='${PO_LIMIT_MTH}'
			and dr='0'
			and   d_billtype_id = '1001A410000000005YSX'
			and   bill_dt <=toDate(now() - interval toInt8OrZero('${INT_NUM}') day) 
			group by d_supplier_id,d_corp_id,d_material_id,first_billcode
		
			)b
						on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
							and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
							and a.d_supplier_id=b.d_supplier_id
							and a.purchase_order_code=b.purchase_order_code
			where b.f_receipt_qty-a.f_order_qty1<=0
		)bb
		group by d_corp_id,d_material_id
)b
on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
ORDER BY 
    a.month_dt,
    a.d_corp_id,
    a.d_material_id,
	a.bill_ts
	"
	run_ck_query "$INSERT_SQL"
    echo "✅ 第 ${DAY} 天执行完成！"
done

echo "🎉 全部 ${TODAY_DAY_NO_ZERO} 天循环执行完毕！"

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    IF(
        toDayOfMonth(now('Asia/Shanghai')) in(1,2,3,4,5),
        '1',
        '0'
    ) AS is_month_begin

SELECT 
    IF(
        -- 外层括号：包裹所有的“日期”条件
        (
            -- 条件1：是特定日期（6, 10, 15, 20, 25）之一
            (toDayOfMonth(now('Asia/Shanghai')) IN (6, 10, 15, 20, 25))
            
            -- 条件2：是当月的最后一天
            OR toDayOfMonth(now('Asia/Shanghai')) = toDayOfMonth(toLastDayOfMonth(now('Asia/Shanghai')))
        )
        -- 核心：必须同时满足（AND）时间在 0 点到 1 点之间
        AND toHour(now('Asia/Shanghai')) >= 0 AND toHour(now('Asia/Shanghai')) < 1,
        
        '1', -- 满足所有条件返回 '1'
        '0'  -- 都不满足返回 '0'
    ) AS is_day6_10_15_20_25_31_0am

taskDefinitionList.name: 4dwd_ia_monthnab
taskDefinitionList.description: 库存_月度结存

taskParams.sql:
select  a.cmonthnabid as ia_monthnab_uid,
    -- ========== 公司维度 ==========
    b.pk_org AS d_corp_id,
    b.code AS d_costregion_code,
    b.name AS d_costregion_name,
    e.code AS d_corp_code,
    e.name AS d_corp_name,
    e.shortname AS d_corp_sname,
	
    -- ========== 物料维度 ==========
    a.cinventoryid AS d_material_id,
    c.code AS d_material_code,
    c.name AS d_material_name,

    -- ========== 物料分类维度 ==========
    c1.pk_marbasclass AS d_cinvclass_sid,
    c1.code AS d_class_code6,
    c1.name AS d_class_name6,
    c2.pk_marbasclass AS d_cinvclassid,
    c2.code AS d_class_code4,
    c2.name AS d_class_name4,
    c3.code AS d_class_code2,
    c3.name AS d_class_name2,
    case when c4.code is null and c2.code='3'  then '3'
          when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '3'
          when c3.code='1'  then  '1'
          when c3.code='4'  then  '4'
		  when c2.code='1' then '1'
		  when c2.code is null then c1.code
          else c4.code 
	   end as d_class_code1,
    case when c4.code is null and c2.code in('3','12')  then '添加剂'
          when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '添加剂'
          when c3.code='1'  then  '原料'
          when c3.code='4'  then  '包装物'
          when c4.code='4' then '外袋配件'  
		  when c2.code='1' then '原料'
		  when c2.code is null then c1.name
		  else c4.name
        end as d_class_name1,
    c.materialtype d_material_type,--物料型号  
    -- ========== 计量单位维度 ==========
    c.pk_measdoc AS measdoc_id,--主计量单位主键
    f.name AS measdoc_name, --主计量单位
	
    -- ========== 核心指标（f_前缀） ==========
    a.nabnum     f_qty, --结存数量
    a.nabprice   f_price,     --结存单价
	a.nmonthprice  f_price_mth, --全月平均单价 
    a.nabmny     f_amt, --结存金额
	a.nvariancerate f_dif_rate,--差异率
    -- ========== 分区与同步字段 ==========
	a.ts as ts_char,
	a.dr,
	d.yearmth month_dt
from ia_monthnab a 
    left join org_costregion b
    on a.pk_org = b.pk_costregion
    left join org_financeorg e
    on b.pk_org= e.pk_financeorg
    LEFT JOIN bd_material c ON a.cinventoryid = c.pk_material
    LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c1 ON c.pk_marbasclass = c1.pk_marbasclass
    LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c2 ON c1.pk_parent = c2.pk_marbasclass
    LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c3 ON c2.pk_parent = c3.pk_marbasclass
    LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c4 ON c3.pk_parent = c4.pk_marbasclass
    inner join bd_accperiodmonth d on a.caccountperiod = d.yearmth  
    LEFT JOIN bd_measdoc f ON c.pk_measdoc = f.pk_measdoc
where A.TS>'${LAST_RUN_TIME4}'

taskParams.sql:
ALTER TABLE dwd_ia_monthnab
UPDATE dr = '1'
WHERE month_dt >= '${MONTH_L7DT1}'
and ts>='${FIRST_RUN_TIME4}'
and ts<='${LAST_RUN_TIME4A}'
AND dr='0'
and ia_monthnab_uid in(
SELECT a.ia_monthnab_uid
FROM dwd_ia_monthnab  a
LEFT JOIN dwd_ia_monthnab_adjust  b
    ON a.ia_monthnab_uid = b.ia_monthnab_uid
WHERE a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L7DT1}'
and a.ts>='${FIRST_RUN_TIME4}'
and a.ts<='${LAST_RUN_TIME4A}'
AND a.dr='0'
and b.ia_monthnab_uid=''
)

taskParams.rawScript:
#!/bin/bash
echo "======= start: get multiple max(ts) independently ========="
# ClickHouse 配置
CK_HOST="10.113.226.23"
CK_PORT="8123"
CK_USER="root"
CK_PASS="FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY"
CK_DB="alphafeed"
CK_TABLE1="dwd_ia_monthnab_adjust"
# CK_TABLE2="nc_"

# 辅助函数：执行 SQL 并返回原始响应
run_ck_query() {
    local sql="$1"
    local encoded=$(echo "$sql" | sed 's/ /%20/g; s/'\''/%27/g')
    curl -u "$CK_USER:$CK_PASS" -s "http://$CK_HOST:$CK_PORT/?query=$encoded"
}

# 辅助函数：验证是否为合法时间格式，否则 fallback
get_valid_time_or_fallback() {
    local resp="$1"
    if [[ "$resp" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}\ [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then
        echo "$resp"
    else
        date -d "yesterday 00:00:00" +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"
    fi
}
# === 查询1：dwd_ic_flow_adjust ===
SQL1="SELECT max(ts) FROM $CK_DB.$CK_TABLE1"
RESP1=$(run_ck_query "$SQL1")
LAST_RUN_TIME4A=$(get_valid_time_or_fallback "$RESP1")
echo '${setValue(LAST_RUN_TIME4A='$LAST_RUN_TIME4A')}'

echo "======= End ======="

#!/bin/bash
echo "======= start: get multiple max(ts) independently ========="
# ClickHouse 配置
CK_HOST="10.113.226.23"
CK_PORT="8123"
CK_USER="root"
CK_PASS="FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY"
CK_DB="alphafeed"
CK_TABLE1="dwd_ia_monthnab"
# CK_TABLE2="nc_"

# 辅助函数：执行 SQL 并返回原始响应
run_ck_query() {
    local sql="$1"
    local encoded=$(echo "$sql" | sed 's/ /%20/g; s/'\''/%27/g')
    curl -u "$CK_USER:$CK_PASS" -s "http://$CK_HOST:$CK_PORT/?query=$encoded"
}

# 辅助函数：验证是否为合法时间格式，否则 fallback
get_valid_time_or_fallback() {
    local resp="$1"
    if [[ "$resp" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}\ [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then
        echo "$resp"
    else
        date -d "2015-01-01 00:00:00" +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"
    fi
}
# === 查询1：dwd_ic_flow ===
SQL1="SELECT max(ts) FROM $CK_DB.$CK_TABLE1 WHERE month_dt >= '$[add_months(yyyy-MM,-3)]'"
RESP1=$(run_ck_query "$SQL1")
LAST_RUN_TIME4=$(get_valid_time_or_fallback "$RESP1")
echo "Query1 result: [$RESP1] → LAST_RUN_TIME4 = $LAST_RUN_TIME4"
echo '${setValue(LAST_RUN_TIME4='$LAST_RUN_TIME4')}'

#!/bin/bash
# 获取 182 天前的当前时刻（精确到秒）
FIRST_RUN_TIME4=$(date -d "182 days ago" +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
# 2. 7个月前的年月（用于分区过滤，如 month_dt >= '2025-10'）
MONTH_L7DT1=$(date -d "$(date +%Y-%m-01) -7 months" +"%Y-%m")
echo '${setValue(FIRST_RUN_TIME4='$FIRST_RUN_TIME4')}'
echo '${setValue(MONTH_L3DT1='$MONTH_L3DT1')}'

taskParams.sql:
select 
    a.d_corp_id,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_code,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_name,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_sname', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_sname,
    a.d_material_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_code', a.d_material_id) as d_material_code,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', a.d_material_id) as d_material_name,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'material_type', a.d_material_id) as d_material_type,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'class_id', a.d_material_id) as d_cinvclass_sid,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', a.d_material_id) as d_class_code6,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name6', a.d_material_id) as d_class_name6,
	max(a.d_cinvclassid) as d_cinvclassid,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code4', a.d_material_id) as d_class_code4,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name4', a.d_material_id) as d_class_name4,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code2', a.d_material_id) as d_class_code2,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name2', a.d_material_id) as d_class_name2,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_code1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name1', a.d_material_id) as d_class_name1,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_id', a.d_material_id) as measdoc_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_name', a.d_material_id) as measdoc_name,
	sum(a.f_qty) as f_qty,
	If(sum(a.f_qty)=0,0,sum(a.f_amt)/sum(a.f_qty)) as f_price,
    max(a.f_price_mth) as f_price_mth,
	sum(a.f_amt) as f_amt,
	max(a.f_dif_rate) as f_dif_rate,
	max(a.ts_char) as ts_char,a.dr,a.month_dt as month_dt_biz,'${MONTH_L1DT}' as month_dt	
from dwd_ia_monthnab a 
join (
    select d_corp_id,d_material_id,max(month_dt) as month_dt_max
    from dwd_ia_monthnab final
    where month_dt<='${MONTH_L1DT}'
    group by d_corp_id,d_material_id
    ) b
on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id
and a.month_dt=b.month_dt_max
where a.month_dt<='${MONTH_L1DT}'
and a.dr='0'
group by a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id,a.month_dt,a.dr

processDefinition.name: 1-1job-dwd_so_saleorder
processDefinition.description: 销量 销售额 折扣 成本 基础表

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_product_subject_cost_nc_2h
taskDefinitionList.description: dwd_product_subject_cost

taskParams.sql:
with temp as(
    select a.cprodcostid  --表主键科目
         ,a.pk_org as corp_id
         ,b.code as corp_code		--公司编码,
         ,b.name as corp_name		--公司,
         ,a.cperiod as month_dt		--会计期间,
         ,a.nnum as product_qty	--产量,
         ,d.factorcode
         ,d.factorname
         ,d.rn --记录行转列的序号
         ,sum(f.nmoney)  as nmoney   --金额

         ,c.pk_material as product_id
         ,c.code as product_code	--产品编码,
         ,c.name as product_name 		--产品名称,
         ,e.name as product_measure			--材料单位,
         ,c.materialspec as product_spec		--材料规格,
         ,c.materialtype as product_type		--材料型号,

    from cm_prodcost a --完工成本  
             left join (
        select rownum as rn
             ,factorcode
             ,factorname
             ,pk_factorasoa
        from(
                select
                    factorcode --核算要素名称,
                     ,factorname --核算要素编码
                     ,pk_factorasoa --核算要素主键
                from  resa_factorasoa
                where substr(factorcode,1,2) in('01','02','03')
                group by factorcode,factorname,pk_factorasoa
                order by factorcode) ) d
                       on   1=1
--f.celementid=d.pk_factorasoa
             left join cm_prodcost_b f on a.cprodcostid=f.cprodcostid---字表
        and d.pk_factorasoa =f.celementid
             left join org_factory b on a.pk_org=b.pk_factory

--附加维度
             left join bd_material c on a.cmaterialid=c.pk_material
             left join bd_measdoc e
                       on c.pk_measdoc=e.pk_measdoc

    where a.dr=0
      and a.cperiod >='${MONTH_L1DT}'
      and a.cperiod <='${MONTH_DT}'

    group by
        a.pk_org,b.code,b.name,a.cperiod,c.pk_material,c.code,c.name,e.name,c.materialspec,c.materialtype,d.factorcode,d.factorname,d.rn,a.nnum,a.cprodcostid
)

select cprodcostid||rn as subject_uid --表唯一主键
     ,cprodcostid as subject_id
     ,corp_id           as d_corp_id
     ,corp_code         as d_corp_code
     ,corp_name         as d_corp_name

     ,rn

     ,factorcode		as d_factorcode
     ,factorname        as d_factorname
     ,product_id        as d_product_id
     ,product_code      as d_product_code
     ,product_name      as d_product_name
     ,product_measure   as d_product_measure
     ,product_spec      as d_product_spec
     ,product_type      as d_product_type
     ,product_qty       as f_product_qty
     ,case when factorcode=substr(factorcode,1,2) and nmoney is null then sum(nmoney)over(partition by corp_id,month_dt,product_id,cprodcostid,substr(factorcode,1,2)  )
           when factorcode=substr(factorcode,1,4) and nmoney is null then sum(nmoney)over(partition by corp_id,month_dt,product_id,cprodcostid,substr(factorcode,1,4)  )
           when factorcode=substr(factorcode,1,6) and nmoney is null then sum(nmoney)over(partition by corp_id,month_dt,product_id,cprodcostid,substr(factorcode,1,6)  )
           else nmoney end as f_cost_amount
     ,month_dt as biz_mth
     ,sysdate as updt
from temp

taskDefinitionList.description: 走年初分支

taskDefinitionList.name: is_start_month1,3,4,5,6,8,10,15,25
taskDefinitionList.description: 是月初且在凌晨0~1点，则为'1'，在通过条件节点走'1'对应的节点（年），其它情况走默认节点（月）

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    IF(
        toDayOfMonth(now('Asia/Shanghai')) in(1,3,4,5,6,8,10,15,25)
        AND toHour(now('Asia/Shanghai')) >= 0
        AND toHour(now('Asia/Shanghai')) < 1,
        '1',
        '0'
    ) AS is_month_begin

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_cost_L4mth
taskDefinitionList.description:
回滚近4个月成本
A销售成本结转单(ia_i5bill) ;B完工成本 (cm_prodcost) ，实时性M-1。
A跟C销售订单(so_saleorder)联动，只要C有订单生成，A就生成数据，成本金额会等B完工后再通过A计算当前库存成本，然后在更新最新的成本到A表中，至此完结。
A来源B，B是每月生产完工后记录成品或者配方的各科目系数成本，A则是记录销售的成品成本，若当月有销售无生产，则会找到最近一个月有生产的完工成本记录。

taskParams.sql:
select  
	 a.cbillid as socost_id --销售成本结转单表头主键
	,b.cbill_bid as socost_uid --销售成本结转单表体唯一主键
    ,b.vfirstcode as d_bill_code --ddh源头单据号
    ,b.vfirstrowno as order_row --源头单据行号:销售订单行号 
    ,b.crowno as socost_row --销售成本结转单行号
	,b.dbizdate	as bill_ts_char
	,a.cstockorgid	as d_corp_id
    ,c.code as d_corp_code
    ,c.name as d_corp_name
    ,c.shortname as d_corp_sname
	,b.cinventoryvid	as d_material_id
    ,d.code as d_material_code
    ,d.name as d_material_name
    ,d1.code as d_class_code6
    ,d1.name as d_class_name6
    ,d2.code as d_class_code4
    ,d2.name as d_class_name4
	
    ,p. pk_customer as d_client_id
    ,p.code  as d_client_code
    ,p.name  as d_client_name
    ,p1.code as d_cust_detail_code --户基本类型编码(K1,K2,K3,其它)
    ,p1.name as d_cust_detail_name
    ,a.cpsnid as d_salesman_id
    ,q1.code as d_salesman_code
    ,q1.name as d_salesman_name
	,case when d.code like '7%' then b.nastnum
                  else b.nnum end as f_num --主数量
	,case when d.code like '7%' then b.nnum
                  else b.nastnum end as f_second_num --辅数量

	,b.nmny as f_cost_amount --成本金额
	,case when d.code like '7%' 
			  then b.nprice*(1000/substr(d.materialspec,0,2))
              else b.nprice end as f_cost_ton --每吨成本单价
	,b.dr
	,substr(b.dbizdate, 0, 7) as month_dt
	,a.ts as ts_char
  from ia_i5bill a --销售成本结转单
  left join ia_i5bill_b b
    on a.cbillid = b.cbillid
    and b.ts>='${MONTH_L6TS}'
  left join org_stockorg c
    on a.cstockorgid = c.pk_stockorg
  left join bd_material d
    on b.cinventoryvid = d.pk_material

  left join bd_marbasclass d1
    on d.pk_marbasclass = d1.pk_marbasclass
  left join bd_marbasclass d2
    on d1.pk_parent = d2.pk_marbasclass
  left join bd_customer p
    on a.ccustomerid =p.pk_customer 
  left join bd_custclass p1
    on p.pk_custclass=p1.pk_custclass
  left join bd_psndoc q1
    on a.cpsnid=q1.pk_psndoc     
where b.dbizdate>'${MONTH_L4TS}'

taskDefinitionList.name: 开始
taskDefinitionList.description: A销售成本结转单(ia_i5bill) ;B完工成本 (cm_prodcost) ，实时性M-1。 A跟C销售订单(so_saleorder)联动，只要C有订单生成，A就生成数据，成本金额会等B完工后再通过A计算当前库存成本，然后在更新最新的成本到A表中，至此完结。 A来源B，B是每月生产完工后记录成品或者配方的各科目系数成本，A则是记录销售的成品成本，若当月有销售无生产，则会找到最近一个月有生产的完工成本记录。

taskParams.rawScript:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "======= start: get max(ts) and -60 days ========="

# ================= ClickHouse 配置 =================
CK_HOST="10.113.226.23"
CK_PORT="8123"
CK_USER="root"
CK_PASS="FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY"
CK_DB="alphafeed"
CK_TABLE1="dwd_so_saleorder"
TABLE_PARTITION="month_dt"

# ================= 兜底时间 =================
FALLBACK_TIME="2015-01-01 00:00:00"

# ================= 执行 SQL =================
run_ck_query() {
    local sql="$1"
    curl -s -u "$CK_USER:$CK_PASS" \
      --data-binary "$sql" \
      "http://$CK_HOST:$CK_PORT/"
}

# ================= 获取 max(ts) =================
SQL1="
SELECT max(ts)
FROM ${CK_DB}.${CK_TABLE1}
WHERE ${TABLE_PARTITION} >= '$[add_months(yyyy-MM,-1)]'
"

RESP1=$(run_ck_query "$SQL1" | tr -d '\n')

# ================= 校验时间合法性 =================
if [[ "$RESP1" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}\ [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then
    LAST_RUN_TIME1="$RESP1"
else
    LAST_RUN_TIME1="$FALLBACK_TIME"
fi

# ================= 转时间戳（防 DS / date 崩） =================
BASE_TS=$(date -d "$LAST_RUN_TIME1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

if [ "$BASE_TS" -le 0 ]; then
    BASE_TS=$(date -d "$FALLBACK_TIME" +%s)
    LAST_RUN_TIME1="$FALLBACK_TIME"
fi

# ================= 往前推 60 天 =================
LAST2M_RUN_TIME1=$(date -d "@$((BASE_TS - 60*86400))" +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

# ================= 输出给 DolphinScheduler =================
echo "LAST_RUN_TIME1      = $LAST_RUN_TIME1"
echo "LAST2M_RUN_TIME1    = $LAST2M_RUN_TIME1"

echo '${setValue(LAST_RUN_TIME1='"$LAST_RUN_TIME1"')}'
echo '${setValue(LAST2M_RUN_TIME1='"$LAST2M_RUN_TIME1"')}'

echo "======= end ========="

taskParams.sql:
ALTER TABLE dwd_so_priceform
UPDATE dr = '1'
WHERE dr='0'
  AND toYYYYMM(ts) >= ${MONTHL4_DT}
and priceform_uid in(
    SELECT  priceform_uid FROM dwd_so_priceform
    WHERE month_dt >= ${MONTHL4_DT} AND dr='0' GROUP BY priceform_uid HAVING count() > 1
    )
and concat(priceform_uid, toString(month_dt)) not in(
        select concat(priceform_uid, toString(max(month_dt))) as priceform_uuid
        from dwd_so_priceform
        WHERE dr='0'
          AND toYYYYMM(ts) >= ${MONTHL4_DT}
          AND priceform_uid IN (
            SELECT  priceform_uid FROM dwd_so_priceform
            WHERE month_dt >= ${MONTHL4_DT} AND dr='0' GROUP BY priceform_uid HAVING count() > 1
        )
    group by priceform_uid
        )

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_priceform
taskDefinitionList.description: 折扣拆分：基准折扣 + 促销折扣（折上折）

taskParams.sql:
SELECT

    pk_priceform AS priceform_uid,
    pk_bill AS d_bill_id,
    pk_discountsaleorg AS d_corp_id,
    pk_pricepolicy AS d_pricepolicy_id,
    pk_pricepolicyorg AS d_pricepolicy_corp_id,
    pk_tariffdef AS tariffdef_id,
    pk_tariffdeforg AS d_tariffdef_corp_id,
	
	
    -- ================= 指标 =================
    ndiscount AS f_discount,
    nnetprice AS f_net_price,
    nprice AS f_price,
    nquerydiscount AS f_query_discount,
    nquerynetprice AS f_query_net_price,
    nqueryprice AS f_query_price,
-- 提取基准折扣加成
    to_number(
            nvl(
                    regexp_substr(priceformstr, '基准折扣加成：(-?[0-9.]+)', 1, 1, null, 1),
                    '0'
            )
    ) as f_base_discount,

-- 提取促销加价
    to_number(
            nvl(
                    regexp_substr(priceformstr, '促销加价：(-?[0-9.]+)', 1, 1, null, 1),
                    '0'
            )
    ) as f_promotion_discount,
    priceformstr AS priceform_str,
    pk_group as group_id,
    
    dr,
    ts AS ts_char
FROM prm_priceform_p 
where ts>'${LAST_RUN_TIME3}'

taskDefinitionList.name: is_startmonth_7,10,15,30
taskDefinitionList.description: 是年初即1月份且在凌晨0~1点 日期为7,10,15,30，则为'1'，在通过条件节点走'1'对应的节点（年），其它情况走默认节点（月）

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    IF(
        toDayOfMonth(now('Asia/Shanghai')) in(7,10,15,30)
        AND toMonth(now('Asia/Shanghai')) = 1
        AND toHour(now('Asia/Shanghai')) >= 0
        AND toHour(now('Asia/Shanghai')) < 1,
        '1',
        '0'
    ) AS is_month_begin

taskDefinitionList.name: dws_product_subject_cost_lastyear_endmth
taskDefinitionList.description:
更新去年12月份的成本科目表
dws_product_subject_cost
01+02为总成本 乘以赠送数量 为买赠成本 
A销售成本结转单(ia_i5bill) ;B完工成本 (cm_prodcost) 。
A来源B，B是每月生产完工后记录成品或者配方的各科目系数成本，A则是记录销售的成品成本，若当月有销售无生产，则会找到最近一个月有生产的完工成本记录。

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    d_corp_id,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_code', d_corp_id) AS d_corp_code,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_name', d_corp_id) AS d_corp_name,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_sname', d_corp_id) AS d_corp_sname,

    d_product_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_code', d_product_id) AS d_product_code,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', d_product_id) AS d_product_name,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_name', d_product_id) AS d_product_measure,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'material_spec', d_product_id) AS d_product_spec,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'material_type', d_product_id) AS d_product_type,

    -- 产量总和: 只用rn=1计算最近3个月，避免重复
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END) AS f_product_sum12_qty,  -- 改名匹配实际(最近3个月sum；若需12个月，告知调整)

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_01_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_01_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0101_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0101_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 3 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0102_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 3 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0102_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 4 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_010201_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 4 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_010201_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 5 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_010202_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 5 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_010202_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 6 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0103_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 6 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0103_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 7 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0104_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 7 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0104_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 8 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0105_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 8 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0105_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 9 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0106_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 9 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0106_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 10 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_010601_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 10 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_010601_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 11 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_01060101_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 11 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_01060101_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 12 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_01060102_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 12 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_01060102_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 13 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_01060103_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 13 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_01060103_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 14 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_01060104_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 14 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_01060104_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 15 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_010602_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 15 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_010602_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 16 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_010603_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 16 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_010603_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 17 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_01060301_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 17 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_01060301_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 18 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_01060302_total,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 47 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0115_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 47 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0115_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 48 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0116_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 48 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0116_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 49 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_02_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 49 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_02_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 50 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0201_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 50 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0201_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 51 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0202_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 51 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0202_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 52 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0203_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 52 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0203_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 53 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0204_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 53 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0204_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 54 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0205_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 54 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0205_unit,

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 55 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0206_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 55 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0206_unit,

    -- hit_months: 修复排序，使用toYYYYMM(concat('-01'))转数值，negate DESC；groupUniqArray确保唯一
    arrayStringConcat(
        arrayMap(x -> toString(x),
            arraySlice(
                arraySort(
                    (x) -> -toYYYYMM(toDate(concat(x, '-01'))),  -- 安全转换'YYYY-MM'为Date，再数值DESC
                    groupUniqArray(biz_mth1)
                ),
                1,
                3
            )
        ),
        ','
    ) AS hit_months,
    '${LASTYEAR_ENDMTH}' AS biz_mth
FROM (
    SELECT
        biz_mth AS biz_mth1,
        d_corp_id,
        d_product_id,
        rn,
        f_cost_amount,
        f_product_qty,
        dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY d_corp_id, d_product_id, rn ORDER BY biz_mth DESC) AS rn3
    FROM dwd_product_subject_cost
    WHERE biz_mth BETWEEN '${MONTH_01DT}' AND '${LASTYEAR_ENDMTH}'
) a
WHERE a.rn3 =1
GROUP BY d_corp_id, d_product_id

taskDefinitionList.name: mark_dr_1
taskDefinitionList.description:
删除跨分区重复主键数据 保留最新分区
出现跨月修改的 改的月份为小月份 此时数据会出错，使用下方更新逻辑即可
先把approver_id不为~的dr改成0
ALTER TABLE dwd_so_saleorderUPDATE dr = '0'    where order_uid in(        select order_uid        from dwd_so_saleorder        where order_uid in              (select order_uid               from dwd_so_saleorder               where  approver_id='~'                 and dr='0')        group by order_uid        having count(1)>1        )and approver_id<>'~'

再把 approver_id='~' dr改成1

ALTER TABLE dwd_so_saleorderUPDATE dr = '1'    where order_uid in(        select order_uid        from dwd_so_saleorder        where order_uid in              (select order_uid               from dwd_so_saleorder               where  approver_id='~'                 and dr='0')        group by order_uid        having count(1)>1        )and approver_id='~'

taskParams.sql:
ALTER TABLE dwd_so_saleorder
UPDATE dr = '1'
WHERE dr='0'
  AND month_dt>='${MONTHL11_DT}'
  and order_uid in(
    select order_uid
    from dwd_so_saleorder
    where month_dt>='${MONTHL11_DT}'
      and dr='0'
    group by order_uid
    having count(1)>1
)
  and concat(order_uid, month_dt) not in(
    select concat(order_uid,max(month_dt)) as order_uuid
    from dwd_so_saleorder
    where month_dt>='${MONTHL11_DT}'
      and dr='0'
    group by order_uid
    having count(1)>1
)

          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='浙江澳华销售部' then '浙江澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='湖南澳华销售部' then '湖南澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='深圳海南事业部' then '深圳海南'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='泰州澳华销售部' then '泰州澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='惠州澳华销售部' then '惠州澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='武汉汉南销售部' then '汉南澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='四会澳华销售部' then '四会澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name in('武汉澳华销售部','武汉小龙虾事业部','武汉澳华鱼料一部','武汉澳华鱼料三部')  then '武汉澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='广西澳华销售部' then '广西澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name in('淮安澳华销售部','淮安山东虾料事业部') then '淮安澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='江西澳华销售部' then '江西澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name in('洛阳澳华销售部','洛阳水产事业部','洛阳陕西事业部')  then '洛阳澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='南京澳华销售部' then '南京澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='荆州澳华销售部' then '荆州事业部'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='云南澳华销售部' then '云南澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='四川澳华销售部' then '四川澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='益阳澳华销售部' then '益阳澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name in('唐山澳华销售部','唐山澳华吉林水产部') then '唐山澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='贵州澳华销售部' then '贵州澳华'
          WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and i.name='岳阳澳华销售部' then '岳阳澳华'
          ELSE e.shortname
    END AS d_profit_corp_sname
     ,a.CDEPTID as d_dept_id
     ,i.code as d_dept_code
     ,i.name as d_dept_name
     ,c.cinventoryid as d_material_id
     ,d.code as d_material_code
     ,d.name as d_material_name
     ,a.CTRANTYPEID as d_billtype_id --单据类型
     ,f.PK_BILLTYPECODE as d_billtype_code
     ,f.BILLTYPENAME as d_billtype_name

     ,h.name as client_class --经销商 养户等
     ,g.CUSTPROP AS custclass_flag --0外部客户 1内部客户
     ,A.CCUSTOMERID as d_client_id --客户
     ,g.code as d_client_code
     ,g.name as d_client_name
     ,a.VBILLCODE as bill_code

     ,c.nmny as f_costsharing_amt
     ,substr(a.dbilldate,1,10) as bill_date_char
     ,substr(a.dbilldate,1,7) as month_dt
from ia_iabill a
         left join org_costregion b
                   on a.pk_org=b.pk_costregion
         left join org_financeorg e
                   on  e.pk_financeorg=b.pk_org
         left join ia_iabill_b c
                   on a.cbillid=c.cbillid
         left join bd_material d
                   on c.cinventoryid=d.pk_material
         left join bd_billtype f
                   on a.CTRANTYPEID=f.PK_BILLTYPEID
         left join BD_CUSTOMER g
                   on a.CCUSTOMERID=g.PK_CUSTOMER
         LEFT JOIN BD_DEFDOC h --自定义档案 取客户属性
                   ON g.DEF14= h.PK_DEFDOC
         LEFT JOIN org_dept i --部门信息
                   ON a.CDEPTID = i.pk_dept
where a.dr=0 and c.dr=0
  and a.dbilldate>='${TS_L2DT}'

	WHEN T3.shortname = '江门澳保' and T6.name='益阳澳华销售部' then '益阳澳华'
	WHEN T3.shortname = '江门澳保' and T6.name in('唐山澳华销售部','唐山澳华吉林水产部') then '唐山澳华'
	WHEN T3.shortname = '江门澳保' and T6.name='贵州澳华销售部' then '贵州澳华'

	ELSE T3.shortname
	END AS d_profit_corp_sname
    ,T4.pk_billtypecode as d_billtype_code --单据类型编码
    ,T4.billtypename as d_billtype_name --单据类型名称
    ,T1.cordercustid as d_client_id --客户主键
    ,T5.code as d_client_code--客户编码
    ,T5.name as d_client_name--客户名称
    ,T8.pk_defdoc as d_unit_id --核算单位主键
    ,T8.code as d_unit_code --核算单位编码
    ,T8.name as d_unit_name --核算单位名称
    ,T2.vbdef2 as d_dept_id--部门主键
    ,T6.code as d_dept_code--部门编码
    ,T6.NAME as d_dept_name--部门名称
    ,T2.vbdef1 d_material_id--物料主键
    ,T7.code d_material_code--物料编码
    ,T7.NAME d_material_name--物料名称
	,T2.NORIGARSUBMNY  as f_rebate_amt--返利金额（实际值）
	,case when T4.pk_billtypecode='35-Cxx-01' then  t9.nbasevalue else t2.NORIGARSUBMNY end as f_rebate1_amt--返利金额（实际值：特殊处理）
	
    ,T2.NREDARSUBMNY  as f_payout_amt --兑付金额（实际值）
	,t9.nprice as f_rebate_price --结算单返利单价（理论值）

	,case when T4.pk_billtypecode='35-Cxx-01' then 0 else t9.nbasevalue end as f_rebate_qty --结算单返利数量（理论值）
    ,case when T4.pk_billtypecode='35-Cxx-01' then  t9.nprice else  t9.nbasevalue end   as f_rebate1_qty 
	,t9.nmny   as f_rebate_settle_amt --结算单返利金额（理论值）
    ,T2.crowno as line_number --行号
    ,T2.FROWNOTE	AS note
	,t1.vbillcode as prm_billcode --销售费用单单据号
	,t10.vbillcode as settle_billcode --返利结算单单据号
    ,SUBSTR(T1.taudittime,1,7) AS audit_mth --审核日期
	,SUBSTR(T1.dbilldate ,1,7) as biz_mth --单据日期
    ,T1.taudittime AS audit_dt --审核日期
	,T1.dbilldate as biz_dt --单据日期
    ,t1.DCLOSEDATE as close_dt
	,SUBSTR(T1.DCLOSEDATE ,1,7) as close_mth --关闭月份
FROM so_arsub T1--销售费用单主表
LEFT JOIN so_arsub_b T2 --销售费用单子表
          ON T1.carsubid = T2.carsubid
LEFT JOIN org_financeorg T3 --财务组织
          ON T1.pk_org = T3.pk_financeorg
LEFT JOIN bd_billtype T4 --单据类型
          ON T1.ctrantypeid = T4.pk_billtypeid
LEFT JOIN bd_customer T5 --客户基本信息
          ON T1.cordercustid = T5.pk_customer
LEFT JOIN org_dept T6 --部门信息
          ON T2.vbdef2 = T6.pk_dept
LEFT JOIN bd_material T7 --物料信息
          ON T2.vbdef1 = T7.pk_material
LEFT JOIN (SELECT A.PK_ORG,
                  C.PK_DEFDOC,
                  C.NAME ,
				  c.code,
                  A.PK_CUSTOMER
           FROM bd_custsale A
                    LEFT JOIN bd_defdoc C
                              ON A.DEF8 = C.PK_DEFDOC ) T8 --取部门核算单位
          ON T8.PK_ORG = T1.pk_org
              AND T8.PK_CUSTOMER = T5.pk_customer
LEFT JOIN sr_settle_b T9 --返利结算单子实体
ON T2.csrcbid = T9.pk_settle_b 		  
and T9.dr='0'
left join sr_settle t10 --返利结算单主实体
ON T9.pk_settle  = T10.pk_settle
WHERE T1.DR='0' AND T2.DR='0'
AND SUBSTR(T1.dbilldate ,1,7)>= '${BIZ_MTH3}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dws_product_subject_cost_Nc2h
taskDefinitionList.description:
dws_product_subject_cost
01+02为总成本 乘以赠送数量 为买赠成本 
A销售成本结转单(ia_i5bill) ;B完工成本 (cm_prodcost) 。
A来源B，B是每月生产完工后记录成品或者配方的各科目系数成本，A则是记录销售的成品成本，若当月有销售无生产，则会找到最近一个月有生产的完工成本记录。

    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 55 THEN f_cost_amount END) AS f_cost_0206_total,
    sum(CASE WHEN rn = 55 THEN f_cost_amount ELSE 0 END) / nullIf(sum(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN f_product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS f_cost_0206_unit,
/*
    -- hit_months: 修复排序，使用toYYYYMM(concat('-01'))转数值，negate DESC；groupUniqArray确保唯一
    arrayStringConcat(
        arrayMap(x -> toString(x),
            arraySlice(
                arraySort(
                    (x) -> -toYYYYMM(toDate(concat(x, '-01'))),  -- 安全转换'YYYY-MM'为Date，再数值DESC
                    groupUniqArray(biz_mth1)
                ),
                1,
                3
            )
        ),
        ','
    ) AS hit_months,
    */
    max(a.biz_mth1) as hit_months,
    '${MONTH_L1DT}' AS biz_mth
FROM (
    SELECT
        biz_mth AS biz_mth1,
        d_corp_id,
        d_product_id,
        rn,
        f_cost_amount,
        f_product_qty,
        dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY d_corp_id, d_product_id, rn ORDER BY biz_mth DESC) AS rn3
    FROM dwd_product_subject_cost
    WHERE biz_mth BETWEEN '${MONTH_L6DT}' AND '${MONTH_L1DT}'
) a
WHERE a.rn3 = 1
GROUP BY d_corp_id, d_product_id

SELECT a.order_id                       AS order_id,

       dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_flag', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_flag,
       dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_name', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_name,
	   --纷享销客客户类型
	   f.d_client_type,f.d_client_level,f.is_strategic,f.is_strategic_flag,
       a.d_client_id                    AS d_client_id,
       a.d_client_code                  AS d_client_code,
       a.d_client_name                  AS d_client_name,
       a.d_salesman_id                  AS d_salesman_id,
       a.d_salesman_code                AS d_salesman_code,
       a.d_salesman_name                AS d_salesman_name,
       a.d_region_id,
       dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
       a.d_corp_id                      AS d_corp_id,
       a.d_corp_vid                     AS d_corp_vid,
       a.d_corp_code                    AS d_corp_code,
       a.d_corp_name                    AS d_corp_name,
       a.d_corp_sname                   AS d_corp_sname,
       a.d_dept_vid,
       a.d_dept_id,
       a.d_dept_code,
       a.d_dept_name,
       a.d_stock_corp_id,
       a.d_stock_corp_code,
       a.d_stock_corp_name,
       a.d_stock_id,
       a.d_stock_code,
       a.d_stock_name,
       a.d_salaera_id,
       a.d_town_id,
       a.d_town_code,
       a.d_town_name,
       a.supply_time_id_vdef11,
       a.supply_time_name,
       a.delivery_id_vbdef19,
       a.delivery_name,
       a.strategy_id,
       a.strategy_name,
       a.d_material_id                  AS d_material_id,
       a.d_material_code                AS d_material_code,
       a.d_material_name                AS d_material_name,
       a.d_formula_id,
       a.d_formula_code,
       a.d_formula_name,
      
       a.d_prodline_id,
       a.d_prodline_code,
       a.d_prodline_name,
       a.d_cinvclass_sid,
       a.d_class_code6                  AS d_class_code6,
       a.d_class_name6                  AS d_class_name6,
       a.d_cinvclassid,
       a.d_class_code4                  AS d_class_code4,
       a.d_class_name4                  AS d_class_name4,
       a.d_class_code2,
       a.d_class_name2,
       a.d_class_code1,
       a.d_class_name1,
       a.measdoc_id,
       a.measdoc_name,
       a.f_num                          AS f_num,
       a.second_measdoc_id,
       a.second_measdoc_name,
       a.f_second_num                   AS f_second_num,
       a.f_unitprice_intax,
       a.f_unitprice_extax,
       a.f_discount_amount,
       c.f_base_discount * a.f_num      AS f_base_discount,
       c.f_base_discount                AS f_base_discount_ton,
       c.f_promotion_discount * a.f_num AS f_promotion_discount,
       c.f_promotion_discount           AS f_promotion_discount_ton,
       a.f_sale_amount,
       a.f_total_amount,
       case when b.f_cost_amount<>0.000000 then b.f_cost_amount
            when a.month_dt='${MONTH_NOW}' and d.f_cost_unit<>0.000000 then toDecimal128(d.f_cost_unit,3)*toDecimal128(a.f_num,3)
            when a.month_dt='${MONTH_NOW}' and d1.f_cost_unit<>0.000000 then toDecimal128(d1.f_cost_unit,3)*toDecimal128(a.f_num,3)
            else b.f_cost_amount end as f_cost_amount ,
       case when a.month_dt='${MONTH_NOW}' and b.f_cost_amount=0.000000 and d.f_cost_unit=0.000000  then d1.f_cost_unit
            when a.month_dt='${MONTH_NOW}' and b.f_cost_amount=0.000000   then d.f_cost_unit
            when a.f_num<>0.000000 then b.f_cost_amount/a.f_num end as f_cost_ton,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.manufacture_cost_ratio else d1.manufacture_cost_ratio end as manufacture_cost_ratio,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.material_cost_ratio else d1.material_cost_ratio end as material_cost_ratio,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.packaging_cost_ratio else d1.packaging_cost_ratio end as packaging_cost_ratio,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.formula_cost_ratio else d1.formula_cost_ratio end as formula_cost_ratio,


	   case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_year end  as f_rebate_ton,
	   f_rebate_ton*a.f_num as f_rebate_amount,
	   case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth,   
       a.creationtime,
       a.dmakedate,
       a.modifiedtime,
       a.taudittime,
       a.billtype_id,
       a.billtype_code,
       a.billtype_neme,
       a.channeltype_id,
       a.channeltype_code,
       a.channeltype_name,
       a.policy_id_vbdef20,
       a.policy_code,
       a.policy_name,
       a.discount_id,
       a.manager_id,
       a.manager_code,
       a.manager_name,
       a.areaman_id,
       a.areaman_code,
       a.areaman_name,
       a.regionman_id,
       a.regionman_code,
       a.regionman_name,
       a.billmaker_id,
       a.billmaker_code,
       a.billmaker_name,
       a.creator_id,
       a.creator_code,
       a.creator_name,
       a.modifier_id,
       a.modifier_code,
       a.modifier_name,
       a.ndiscountrate,
       a.npreceivemny,
       a.npreceivequota,
       a.npreceiverate,
       a.nreceivedmny,
       a.ntotalnum,
       a.ntotalorigmny,
       a.ntotalorigsubmny,
       a.ntotalpiece,
       a.ntotalvolume,
       a.ntotalweight,
       a.month_dt                       AS month_dt,
       a.ts,
       a.ts_char                        AS ts_char,
       a.measure_ratio,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_id',   a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_id,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_code,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_name,
	   a.status_flag,
	   a.d_profit_corp_sname,
	   a.d_profit_corp_code,
	   a.d_profit_corp_id,
	   a.d_profit_region_name

FROM dwd_so_saleorder a
LEFT JOIN (
	select month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row,sum(f_cost_amount) as f_cost_amount
	from dwd_so_cost 
	where dr = '0' and month_dt >= '${MONTH_L1DT}' and month_dt<='${MONTH_NOW}'
	group by month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row
)  b
ON a.month_dt=b.month_dt
and a.d_bill_code = b.d_bill_code 
AND a.order_row = b.order_row 
AND a.d_corp_id = b.d_corp_id
LEFT JOIN dwd_so_priceform  c
ON c.dr = '0' 
AND a.discount_id = c.priceform_uid 
AND toYYYYMM(c.ts) >= ${MONTHL2DT}
left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_unit
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as manufacture_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_cost_total))) as material_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0203_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as packaging_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0201_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as formula_cost_ratio
	
    from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth = '${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
) d
on   a.d_product_corp_id = d.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d.d_product_id
left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id) as  d_class_code6
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_unit
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as manufacture_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_cost_total))) as material_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0203_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as packaging_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0201_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as formula_cost_ratio
	from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth = '${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id)
) d1
on   a.d_product_corp_id = d1.d_corp_id
and a.d_class_code6=d1.d_class_code6
left join dws_cust_rebate_actual_m e
on e.month_dt='${MONTH_L1DT}'
and a.d_corp_id = e.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e.d_client_id
and a.d_material_id=e.d_material_id
left join(  
	select d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id) as  d_class_code6
	,sum(f_rebate_amt_mth) as f_rebate_amt_mth
	,sum(f_rebate_num_mth) as f_rebate_num_mth
	,case when f_rebate_amt_mth=0 then 0 when f_rebate_num_mth =0 then 0 else f_rebate_amt_mth/f_rebate_num_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth
	from dws_cust_rebate_actual_m
	where month_dt='${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)
)e1
on a.d_corp_id = e1.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e1.d_client_id
and a.d_class_code6=e1.d_class_code6

left join v_dim_client f 
on a.d_corp_id =f.d_corp_id and a.d_client_id=f.d_client_id 
and f.dr='0' AND f.this_year='${THIS_YEAR}'
WHERE a.dr = '0'
 AND a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L1DT}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_profit_old_update_lastyear
taskDefinitionList.description:
年初更新去年一整年 主要是1月份更新去年数据 返利用去年12月的年均值
综合销售订单明细快照表：销售额（实时）  折扣金额（实时）   买赠（实时） 成本金额&返利金额（当月的用年均值近似替代）

taskParams.sql:
SELECT a.order_id                       AS order_id,
       a.order_uid                      AS order_uid,
       a.order_row                      AS order_row,
       a.d_bill_code                    AS d_bill_code,
       a.is_gift                        AS is_gift,
