	   a.client_dclass_name as client_dclass_name,
       dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_flag', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_flag,
       dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_name', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_name,
	   --纷享销客客户类型
	   f.d_client_type,f.d_client_level,f.is_strategic,f.is_strategic_flag,
       a.d_client_id                    AS d_client_id,
       a.d_client_code                  AS d_client_code,
       a.d_client_name                  AS d_client_name,
       a.d_salesman_id                  AS d_salesman_id,
       a.d_salesman_code                AS d_salesman_code,
       a.d_salesman_name                AS d_salesman_name,
       a.d_region_id,
       dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
       a.d_corp_id                      AS d_corp_id,
       a.d_corp_vid                     AS d_corp_vid,
       a.d_corp_code                    AS d_corp_code,
       a.d_corp_name                    AS d_corp_name,
       a.d_corp_sname                   AS d_corp_sname,
       a.d_dept_vid,
       a.d_dept_id,
       a.d_dept_code,
       a.d_dept_name,
       a.d_stock_corp_id,
       a.d_stock_corp_code,
       a.d_stock_corp_name,
       a.d_stock_id,
       a.d_stock_code,
       a.d_stock_name,
       a.d_salaera_id,
       a.d_town_id,
       a.d_town_code,
       a.d_town_name,
       a.supply_time_id_vdef11,
       a.supply_time_name,
       a.delivery_id_vbdef19,
       a.delivery_name,
       a.strategy_id,
       a.strategy_name,
       a.d_material_id                  AS d_material_id,
       a.d_material_code                AS d_material_code,
       a.d_material_name                AS d_material_name,
       a.d_formula_id,
       a.d_formula_code,
       a.d_formula_name,
       
       a.d_prodline_id,
       a.d_prodline_code,
       a.d_prodline_name,
       a.d_cinvclass_sid,
       a.d_class_code6                  AS d_class_code6,
       a.d_class_name6                  AS d_class_name6,
       a.d_cinvclassid,
       a.d_class_code4                  AS d_class_code4,
       a.d_class_name4                  AS d_class_name4,
       a.d_class_code2,
       a.d_class_name2,
       a.d_class_code1,
       a.d_class_name1,
       a.measdoc_id,
       a.measdoc_name,
       a.f_num                          AS f_num,
       a.second_measdoc_id,
       a.second_measdoc_name,
       a.f_second_num                   AS f_second_num,
       a.f_unitprice_intax,
       a.f_unitprice_extax,
       a.f_discount_amount,
       c.f_base_discount * a.f_num      AS f_base_discount,
       c.f_base_discount                AS f_base_discount_ton,
       c.f_promotion_discount * a.f_num AS f_promotion_discount,
       c.f_promotion_discount           AS f_promotion_discount_ton,
       a.f_sale_amount,
       a.f_total_amount,
       b.f_cost_amount  as f_cost_amount ,
       case 
            when a.f_num<>0.000000 then b.f_cost_amount/a.f_num end as f_cost_ton,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.manufacture_cost_ratio else d1.manufacture_cost_ratio end as manufacture_cost_ratio,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.material_cost_ratio else d1.material_cost_ratio end as material_cost_ratio,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.packaging_cost_ratio else d1.packaging_cost_ratio end as packaging_cost_ratio,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.formula_cost_ratio else d1.formula_cost_ratio end as formula_cost_ratio,
	   case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_year end  as f_rebate_ton,
	   f_rebate_ton*a.f_num as f_rebate_amount,
	   case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth,      
       a.creationtime,
       a.dmakedate,
       a.modifiedtime,
       a.taudittime,
       a.billtype_id,
       a.billtype_code,
       a.billtype_neme,
       a.channeltype_id,
       a.channeltype_code,
       a.channeltype_name,
       a.policy_id_vbdef20,
       a.policy_code,
       a.policy_name,
       a.discount_id,
       a.manager_id,
       a.manager_code,
       a.manager_name,
       a.areaman_id,
       a.areaman_code,
       a.areaman_name,
       a.regionman_id,
       a.regionman_code,
       a.regionman_name,
       a.billmaker_id,
       a.billmaker_code,
       a.billmaker_name,
       a.creator_id,
       a.creator_code,
       a.creator_name,
       a.modifier_id,
       a.modifier_code,
       a.modifier_name,
       a.ndiscountrate,
       a.npreceivemny,
       a.npreceivequota,
       a.npreceiverate,
       a.nreceivedmny,
       a.ntotalnum,
       a.ntotalorigmny,
       a.ntotalorigsubmny,
       a.ntotalpiece,
       a.ntotalvolume,
       a.ntotalweight,
       a.month_dt                       AS month_dt,
       a.ts,
       a.ts_char                        AS ts_char,
       a.measure_ratio,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_id',   a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_id,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_code,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_name,
	   a.status_flag,
	   a.d_profit_corp_sname,
	   a.d_profit_corp_code,
	   a.d_profit_corp_id,
	   a.d_profit_region_name

FROM dwd_so_saleorder a
LEFT JOIN (
	select month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row,sum(f_cost_amount) as f_cost_amount
	from dwd_so_cost 
	where dr = '0' and month_dt >= '${MONTH_01DT}' and month_dt<='${LASTYEAR_ENDMTH}'
	group by month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row
)  b
ON a.month_dt=b.month_dt
and a.d_bill_code = b.d_bill_code 
AND a.order_row = b.order_row 
AND a.d_corp_id = b.d_corp_id
LEFT JOIN dwd_so_priceform  c
ON c.dr = '0' 
AND a.discount_id = c.priceform_uid 
AND toYYYYMM(c.ts) >= ${MONTH01DT}
AND toYYYYMM(c.ts) <= ${LASTYEARENDMTH}
--历史年份的成本全部依赖成本表 不在关联科目表预测 但成本拆分系数仍照常取
	left join (
		select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_unit
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as manufacture_cost_ratio
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_cost_total))) as material_cost_ratio
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0203_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as packaging_cost_ratio
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0201_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as formula_cost_ratio         
		from dws_product_subject_cost
		where biz_mth = '${LASTYEAR_ENDMTH}'
		group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
	) d
	on   a.d_product_corp_id = d.d_corp_id
	and a.d_material_id=d.d_product_id
left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id) as  d_class_code6
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_unit
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as manufacture_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_cost_total))) as material_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0203_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as packaging_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0201_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as formula_cost_ratio
	from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth = '${LASTYEAR_ENDMTH}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id)
) d1
on   a.d_product_corp_id = d1.d_corp_id
and a.d_class_code6=d1.d_class_code6
left join dws_cust_rebate_actual_m e
on e.month_dt='${LASTYEAR_ENDMTH}'
and a.d_corp_id = e.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e.d_client_id
and a.d_material_id=e.d_material_id
left join(  
	select d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id) as  d_class_code6
	,sum(f_rebate_amt_mth) as f_rebate_amt_mth
	,sum(f_rebate_num_mth) as f_rebate_num_mth
	,case when f_rebate_amt_mth=0 then 0 when f_rebate_num_mth =0 then 0 else f_rebate_amt_mth/f_rebate_num_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth
	from dws_cust_rebate_actual_m
	where month_dt='${LASTYEAR_ENDMTH}'
	group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)
)e1
on a.d_corp_id = e1.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e1.d_client_id
and a.d_class_code6=e1.d_class_code6
left join v_dim_client f 
on a.d_corp_id =f.d_corp_id and a.d_client_id=f.d_client_id 
and f.dr='0' AND f.this_year='${THIS_YEAR}'
WHERE a.dr = '0'
 AND a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_01DT}' 
 AND a.month_dt <= '${LASTYEAR_ENDMTH}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_profit_old_year
taskDefinitionList.description: 综合销售订单明细快照表：销售额（实时）  折扣金额（实时）   买赠（实时） 成本金额&返利金额（当月的用年均值近似替代）

taskParams.sql:
SELECT a.order_id                       AS order_id,
       a.order_uid                      AS order_uid,
       a.order_row                      AS order_row,
       a.d_bill_code                    AS d_bill_code,
       a.is_gift                        AS is_gift,
       a.bill_ts_char                   AS bill_ts_char,
       a.bill_ts                        AS bill_ts,
       a.bill_date                      AS bill_date,
	   a.client_class_flag  as client_class_flag,
	   a.client_class_name  as client_class_name,
	   a.client_dclass_code as client_dclass_code,
	   a.client_dclass_name as client_dclass_name,
       dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_flag', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_flag,
       dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_name', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_name,
	   --纷享销客客户类型
	   f.d_client_type,f.d_client_level,f.is_strategic,f.is_strategic_flag,
       a.d_client_id                    AS d_client_id,
       a.d_client_code                  AS d_client_code,
       a.d_client_name                  AS d_client_name,
       a.d_salesman_id                  AS d_salesman_id,
       a.d_salesman_code                AS d_salesman_code,
       a.d_salesman_name                AS d_salesman_name,
       a.d_region_id,
       dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
       a.d_corp_id                      AS d_corp_id,
       a.d_corp_vid                     AS d_corp_vid,
       a.d_corp_code                    AS d_corp_code,
       a.d_corp_name                    AS d_corp_name,
       a.d_corp_sname                   AS d_corp_sname,
       a.d_dept_vid,
       a.d_dept_id,
       a.d_dept_code,
       a.d_dept_name,
       a.d_stock_corp_id,
       a.d_stock_corp_code,
       a.d_stock_corp_name,
       a.d_stock_id,
       a.d_stock_code,
       a.d_stock_name,
       a.d_salaera_id,
       a.d_town_id,
       a.d_town_code,
       a.d_town_name,
       a.supply_time_id_vdef11,
       a.supply_time_name,
       a.delivery_id_vbdef19,
       a.delivery_name,
       a.strategy_id,
       a.strategy_name,
       a.d_material_id                  AS d_material_id,
       a.d_material_code                AS d_material_code,
       a.d_material_name                AS d_material_name,
       a.d_formula_id,

       a.d_formula_name,
       
       a.d_prodline_id,
       a.d_prodline_code,

       a.d_cinvclass_sid,
       a.d_class_code6                  AS d_class_code6,
       a.d_class_name6                  AS d_class_name6,
       a.d_cinvclassid,
       a.d_class_code4                  AS d_class_code4,
       a.d_class_name4                  AS d_class_name4,
       a.d_class_code2,
       a.d_class_name2,
       a.d_class_code1,
       a.d_class_name1,
       a.measdoc_id,
       a.measdoc_name,
       a.f_num                          AS f_num,
       a.second_measdoc_id,
       a.second_measdoc_name,
       a.f_second_num                   AS f_second_num,
       a.f_unitprice_intax,
       a.f_unitprice_extax,
       a.f_discount_amount,
       c.f_base_discount * a.f_num      AS f_base_discount,
       c.f_base_discount                AS f_base_discount_ton,
       c.f_promotion_discount * a.f_num AS f_promotion_discount,
       c.f_promotion_discount           AS f_promotion_discount_ton,
       a.f_sale_amount,
       a.f_total_amount,
       case when b.f_cost_amount<>0.000000 then b.f_cost_amount
            when a.month_dt='${MONTH_NOW}' and d.f_cost_unit<>0.000000 then toDecimal128(d.f_cost_unit,3)*toDecimal128(a.f_num,3)
            when a.month_dt='${MONTH_NOW}' and d1.f_cost_unit<>0.000000 then toDecimal128(d1.f_cost_unit,3)*toDecimal128(a.f_num,3)
            else b.f_cost_amount end as f_cost_amount ,
       case when a.month_dt='${MONTH_NOW}' and b.f_cost_amount=0.000000 and d.f_cost_unit=0.000000  then d1.f_cost_unit
            when a.month_dt='${MONTH_NOW}' and b.f_cost_amount=0.000000   then d.f_cost_unit
            when a.f_num<>0.000000 then b.f_cost_amount/a.f_num end as f_cost_ton,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.manufacture_cost_ratio else d1.manufacture_cost_ratio end as manufacture_cost_ratio,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.material_cost_ratio else d1.material_cost_ratio end as material_cost_ratio,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.packaging_cost_ratio else d1.packaging_cost_ratio end as packaging_cost_ratio,
	   case when d.material_cost_ratio<>0.000000 then d.formula_cost_ratio else d1.formula_cost_ratio end as formula_cost_ratio,
	   case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_year end  as f_rebate_ton,
	   f_rebate_ton*a.f_num as f_rebate_amount,
	   case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth,    
       a.creationtime,
       a.dmakedate,
       a.modifiedtime,
       a.taudittime,
       a.billtype_id,
       a.billtype_code,
       a.billtype_neme,
       a.channeltype_id,
       a.channeltype_code,
       a.channeltype_name,
       a.policy_id_vbdef20,
       a.policy_code,
       a.policy_name,
       a.discount_id,
       a.manager_id,
       a.manager_code,
       a.manager_name,
       a.areaman_id,
       a.areaman_code,
       a.areaman_name,
       a.regionman_id,
       a.regionman_code,
       a.regionman_name,
       a.billmaker_id,
       a.billmaker_code,
       a.billmaker_name,
       a.creator_id,
       a.creator_code,
       a.creator_name,
       a.modifier_id,
       a.modifier_code,
       a.modifier_name,
       a.ndiscountrate,
       a.npreceivemny,
       a.npreceivequota,
       a.npreceiverate,
       a.nreceivedmny,
       a.ntotalnum,
       a.ntotalorigmny,
       a.ntotalorigsubmny,
       a.ntotalpiece,
       a.ntotalvolume,
       a.ntotalweight,
       a.month_dt                       AS month_dt,
       a.ts,
       a.ts_char                        AS ts_char,
       a.measure_ratio,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_id',   a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_id,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_code,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_name,
	   a.status_flag,
	   a.d_profit_corp_sname,
	   a.d_profit_corp_code,
	   a.d_profit_corp_id,
	   a.d_profit_region_name
FROM dwd_so_saleorder a
LEFT JOIN (
	select month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row,sum(f_cost_amount) as f_cost_amount
	from dwd_so_cost 
	where dr = '0' and month_dt >= '${MONTH_01DT}' and month_dt<='${MONTH_NOW}'
	group by month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row
)  b
ON a.month_dt=b.month_dt
and a.d_bill_code = b.d_bill_code 
AND a.order_row = b.order_row 
AND a.d_corp_id = b.d_corp_id
LEFT JOIN dwd_so_priceform  c
ON c.dr = '0' 
AND a.discount_id = c.priceform_uid 
AND toYYYYMM(c.ts) >= ${MONTH01DT}
	left join (
		select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_unit
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as manufacture_cost_ratio
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_cost_total))) as material_cost_ratio
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0203_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as packaging_cost_ratio
			,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0201_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as formula_cost_ratio
        from dws_product_subject_cost
		where biz_mth = '${MONTH_L1DT}'
		group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
	) d
	on   a.d_product_corp_id = d.d_corp_id
	and a.d_material_id=d.d_product_id
left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id) as  d_class_code6
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_unit
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as manufacture_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_cost_total))) as material_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0203_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as packaging_cost_ratio
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_0201_total),sum(f_cost_total))) as formula_cost_ratio
	from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth = '${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id)
) d1
on   a.d_product_corp_id = d1.d_corp_id
and a.d_class_code6=d1.d_class_code6
left join dws_cust_rebate_actual_m e
on e.month_dt='${MONTH_L1DT}'
and a.d_corp_id = e.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e.d_client_id
and a.d_material_id=e.d_material_id
left join(  
	select d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id) as  d_class_code6
	,sum(f_rebate_amt_mth) as f_rebate_amt_mth
	,sum(f_rebate_num_mth) as f_rebate_num_mth
	,case when f_rebate_amt_mth=0 then 0 when f_rebate_num_mth =0 then 0 else f_rebate_amt_mth/f_rebate_num_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth
	from dws_cust_rebate_actual_m
	where month_dt='${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)
)e1
on a.d_corp_id = e1.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e1.d_client_id
and a.d_class_code6=e1.d_class_code6
left join v_dim_client f 
on a.d_corp_id =f.d_corp_id and a.d_client_id=f.d_client_id 
and f.dr='0' AND f.this_year='${THIS_YEAR}'
WHERE a.dr = '0'
 AND a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_01DT}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_formula_product_day_snap
taskDefinitionList.description: 物料配方日快照表

taskParams.sql:
select
      a.bom_uid
     ,a.bom_version
     ,a.bom_status
     ,a.vertion_type
     ,a.is_default
     ,a.d_corp_id
     ,a.d_corp_code
     ,a.d_corp_name
     ,a.d_corp_sname
	 
     ,a2.d_formula_id		as d_product_id		
     ,a2.d_formula_code     as d_product_code     
     ,a2.d_formula_name     as d_product_name     
     ,a2.d_formula_measure  as d_product_measure  
     ,a2.d_formula_type     as d_product_type     
	 

	 ,dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_id',   a2.d_formula_id) as d_package_id
	 ,dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_code',   a2.d_formula_id) as d_package_code
	 ,dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_name',   a2.d_formula_id) as d_package_name
	 ,dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'f_ratio_num',   a2.d_formula_id) as f_package_ton_num 
	 ,a3.f_day_price as  f_package_price
	 ,dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'f_ratio_num',   a2.d_formula_id)*a3.f_day_price as  f_package_ton_price 

     ,a.d_class_code1
     ,a.d_class_name1
     ,a.d_class_code2
     ,a.d_class_name2
     ,a.d_class_code4
     ,a.d_class_name4
     ,a.d_class_code6
     ,a.d_class_name6
     ,a.d_formula_id
     ,a.d_formula_code
     ,a.d_formula_name
     ,a.d_formula_measure
     ,a.d_formula_type

     ,a.d_row_code1
     ,a.d_row_name1
     ,a.d_row_id
     ,a.d_row_code
     ,a.d_row_name
     ,a.d_row_measure
     ,a.d_row_type
     ,a.f_ratio_num
	 ,a.f_parent_num
	 ,b.f_day_price as f_day_price_old
	 
	 ,case when a.d_row_code1 = '3'  and b.f_day_price=0 then toDecimal128(a1.f_row_amount,6)/toDecimal128(a.f_ratio_num,6) else toDecimal128(b.f_day_price,6) end as f_day_price
	 ,case when a.d_row_code1 = '3'  and b.f_day_price=0 then a1.f_row_amount else toDecimal128(toDecimal128(a.f_ratio_num ,3)*toDecimal128(case when a.d_row_code1='2' and a.f_ratio_num>1 then b.f_day_price/1000 else b.f_day_price end,6),6) end as f_row_amount
	 ,case when a.d_row_code1 = '3' and b.f_day_price=0 then 'FALSE' 
		   when a.d_row_code1 = '3' and f_row_amount<>0 then 'TRUE1' 
		   ELSE 'TRUE'  END AS is_right
     ,a.formula_date
     ,a.start_date
     ,a.end_date
     ,a.creationtime
     ,a.creator
     ,a.modifiedtime
     ,a.modifier
     ,'${BILL_DT}' as updt
     ,a.d_brand_id
     ,a.d_brand_code
     ,a.d_brand_name
from dim_formula_product_snap a
asof left join dws_ia_material_day_stock b
on b.bill_dt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
	and b.bill_dt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
	and a.updt<=b.bill_dt
	and a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
	and a.d_row_id=b.d_material_id
	
left join dim_formula_product_dict a2 --取配方对应的成品
on a.d_formula_id=a2.d_row_id
    and a.d_corp_id=a2.d_corp_id
asof left join dws_ia_material_day_stock a3 --取袋子的价格
on a3.bill_dt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
	and a3.bill_dt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
	and a.updt<=a3.bill_dt
    and a.d_corp_id=a3.d_corp_id
    and dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_id', a2.d_formula_id)=a3.d_material_id
left join (
	select d_formula_id,d_corp_id
	--如果添加剂里有成品且系数大于1则单价变成kg即 吨单价/1000
	,sum(toDecimal128(toDecimal128(a.f_ratio_num,3)*toDecimal128(case when a.d_row_code1='2' and a.f_ratio_num>1 then b.f_day_price/1000 else b.f_day_price end,6),6)) as f_row_amount
	from dim_formula_product_snap a 
	asof left join dws_ia_material_day_stock b
	on b.bill_dt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
		and b.bill_dt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
		and a.updt<=b.bill_dt
		and a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
		and a.d_row_id=b.d_material_id
	where  updt='${BILL_DT}'
	and vertion_type='1'
	and is_default='Y'
	and d_class_code1='3'	
	group by d_formula_id,d_corp_id
)a1
on a.d_row_id=a1.d_formula_id
and a.d_corp_id=a1.d_corp_id
where  toYYYYMM(a.updt)='${MONTHDT}'
  and a.vertion_type='1'
  and a.is_default='Y'
  and a.d_class_code1='5'

taskDefinitionList.name: dws_formula_product_day
taskDefinitionList.description: 物料成品配方价

taskParams.sql:
select
    a.d_corp_id
     ,a.d_corp_code
     ,a.d_corp_name
     ,a.d_corp_sname

     ,a.d_product_id
     ,a.d_product_code
     ,a.d_product_name
     ,a.d_product_measure
     ,a.d_product_type

     ,a.d_formula_id
     ,a.d_formula_code
     ,a.d_formula_name
     ,a.d_formula_measure
     ,a.d_formula_type

	 ,max(a.d_package_id) as d_package_id
	 ,max(a.d_package_code) as d_package_code
	 ,max(a.d_package_name) as d_package_name
	 ,max(a.f_package_ton_num) as f_package_ton_num
	 ,max(a.f_package_price) as f_package_price
	 ,max(a.f_package_ton_price) as f_package_ton_price

     ,sum(a.f_ratio_num) 				 as f_ratio_num
     ,max(case when a.f_parent_num>=1000 then a.f_parent_num/1000 else a.f_parent_num end ) 	as f_parent_num
     ,sum(toDecimal128(toDecimal128(a.f_ratio_num,3)*toDecimal128(case when a.d_row_code1 in('2','6') and a.f_ratio_num>1 then b.f_day_price/1000 else b.f_day_price end,6),6)) as f_formula_amount
     ,f_formula_amount/f_parent_num      as f_formula_price

     ,max(a.formula_date)		  		 as formula_date
     ,max(a.start_date)		      		 as start_date
     ,max(a.end_date)		      		 as end_date
     ,max(a.creationtime)		  		 as creationtime
     ,max(a.creator)		      		 as creator
     ,max(a.modifiedtime)		  		 as modifiedtime
     ,max(a.modifier)		      		 as modifier

     ,max(a.d_brand_id)		      		 as d_brand_id
     ,max(a.d_brand_code)		  		 as d_brand_code
     ,max(a.d_brand_name)		  		 as d_brand_name
     ,a.updt
from dim_formula_product_day_snap a
asof left join dws_ia_material_day_stock b
on b.bill_dt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
	and b.bill_dt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
	and a.updt<=b.bill_dt
	and a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
	and a.d_row_id=b.d_material_id
	and b.f_day_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
where  toYYYYMMDD(a.updt)=${BILL_DT}
group by
    a.d_corp_id
        ,a.d_corp_code
        ,a.d_corp_name
        ,a.d_corp_sname

        ,a.d_product_id
        ,a.d_product_code
        ,a.d_product_name
        ,a.d_product_measure
        ,a.d_product_type

        ,a.d_formula_id
        ,a.d_formula_code
        ,a.d_formula_name
        ,a.d_formula_measure
        ,a.d_formula_type

        ,a.updt

taskDefinitionList.name: dws_formula_product_day_刷数
taskDefinitionList.description: 物料成品配方价

taskParams.sql:
select
    a.d_corp_id
     ,a.d_corp_code
     ,a.d_corp_name
     ,a.d_corp_sname

     ,a.d_product_id
     ,a.d_product_code
     ,a.d_product_name
     ,a.d_product_measure
     ,a.d_product_type

     ,a.d_formula_id
     ,a.d_formula_code
     ,a.d_formula_name
     ,a.d_formula_measure
     ,a.d_formula_type

	 ,max(a.d_package_id) as d_package_id
	 ,max(a.d_package_code) as d_package_code
	 ,max(a.d_package_name) as d_package_name
	 ,max(a.f_package_ton_num) as f_package_ton_num
	 ,max(a.f_package_price) as f_package_price
	 ,max(a.f_package_ton_price) as f_package_ton_price

     ,sum(a.f_ratio_num) 				 as f_ratio_num
     ,max(case when a.f_parent_num>=1000 then a.f_parent_num/1000 else a.f_parent_num end ) 	as f_parent_num
     ,sum(toDecimal128(toDecimal128(a.f_ratio_num,3)*toDecimal128(case when a.d_row_code1 in('2','6') and a.f_ratio_num>1 then b.f_day_price/1000 else b.f_day_price end,6),6)) as f_formula_amount
     ,f_formula_amount/f_parent_num      as f_formula_price

     ,max(a.formula_date)		  		 as formula_date
     ,max(a.start_date)		      		 as start_date
     ,max(a.end_date)		      		 as end_date
     ,max(a.creationtime)		  		 as creationtime
     ,max(a.creator)		      		 as creator
     ,max(a.modifiedtime)		  		 as modifiedtime
     ,max(a.modifier)		      		 as modifier

     ,max(a.d_brand_id)		      		 as d_brand_id
     ,max(a.d_brand_code)		  		 as d_brand_code
     ,max(a.d_brand_name)		  		 as d_brand_name
     ,a.updt
from dim_formula_product_day_snap a
asof left join dws_ia_material_day_stock b
on b.bill_dt>='${MONTHL1DT_STA}'
	and b.bill_dt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
	and a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
	and a.d_row_id=b.d_material_id
	and b.f_day_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
	and a.updt<=b.bill_dt
group by
    a.d_corp_id
        ,a.d_corp_code
        ,a.d_corp_name
        ,a.d_corp_sname

        ,a.d_product_id
        ,a.d_product_code
        ,a.d_product_name
        ,a.d_product_measure
        ,a.d_product_type

        ,a.d_formula_id
        ,a.d_formula_code
        ,a.d_formula_name
        ,a.d_formula_measure
        ,a.d_formula_type

        ,a.updt

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_profit_hismonth
taskDefinitionList.description:
销售订单利润明细宽表 (含实时成本计算)
历史月份回刷

taskParams.sql:
SELECT 
 -- 1. 单据基础信息
	a.order_id                       AS order_id,
	a.order_uid                      AS order_uid,
	a.order_row                      AS order_row,
	a.d_bill_code                    AS d_bill_code,
	a.status_flag					AS status_flag, --1=自由，2=审批通过。自由单可不统计
	a.is_gift                        AS is_gift,
	multiIf(d2.f_formula_price = 0., '代工','自产') as production_mode,  --生产模式：代工,自产
    a.bill_ts_char                   AS bill_ts_char,
	a.bill_ts                        AS bill_ts,
	a.bill_date                      AS bill_date,
-- 2. 客户与分类维度
	a.client_class_flag  as client_class_flag,
	a.client_class_name  as client_class_name,
	a.client_dclass_code as client_dclass_code,
	a.client_dclass_name as client_dclass_name,
	dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_flag', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_flag,
	dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_name', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_name,
	f.d_client_type,
	f.d_client_level,
	f.is_strategic,
	f.is_strategic_flag,

	a.d_client_id                    AS d_client_id,
	a.d_client_code                  AS d_client_code,
	a.d_client_name                  AS d_client_name,
	a.d_salesman_id                  AS d_salesman_id,
	a.d_salesman_code                AS d_salesman_code,
	a.d_salesman_name                AS d_salesman_name,
-- 3. 组织架构维度 
	a.d_region_id,
	dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
	a.d_corp_id                      AS d_corp_id,
	a.d_corp_vid                     AS d_corp_vid,
	a.d_corp_code                    AS d_corp_code,
	a.d_corp_name                    AS d_corp_name,
	a.d_corp_sname                   AS d_corp_sname,
	a.d_dept_vid,
	a.d_dept_id,
	a.d_dept_code,
	a.d_dept_name,
	a.d_stock_corp_id,
	a.d_stock_corp_code,
	a.d_stock_corp_name,
	a.d_stock_id,
	a.d_stock_code,
	a.d_stock_name,
	a.d_salaera_id,
	a.d_town_id,
	a.d_town_code,
	a.d_town_name,
-- 4. 业绩归属与审计字段
	a.d_profit_corp_sname,
	a.d_profit_corp_code,
	a.d_profit_corp_id,
	a.d_profit_region_name,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_id',   a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_id,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_code,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_name,
	a.creationtime,
	a.dmakedate,
	a.modifiedtime,
	a.taudittime,
-- 5. 物料与配方信息 
	a.d_material_id                  AS d_material_id,
	a.d_material_code                AS d_material_code,
	a.d_material_name                AS d_material_name,
	a.d_formula_id,
	a.d_formula_code,
	a.d_formula_name,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_id', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_id,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_code', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_code,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_name', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_name,
	a.measure_ratio,
	
	a.d_prodline_id,
	a.d_prodline_code,
	a.d_prodline_name,
	a.d_cinvclass_sid,
	a.d_class_code6                  AS d_class_code6,
	a.d_class_name6                  AS d_class_name6,
	a.d_cinvclassid,
	a.d_class_code4                  AS d_class_code4,
	a.d_class_name4                  AS d_class_name4,
	a.d_class_code2,
	a.d_class_name2,
	a.d_class_code1,
	a.d_class_name1,
-- 6. 订单数量与单价 
	a.measdoc_id,
	a.measdoc_name,
	a.f_num                          AS f_num,
	a.second_measdoc_id,
	a.second_measdoc_name,
	a.f_second_num                   AS f_second_num,
	a.f_unitprice_intax,
	a.f_unitprice_extax,
-- 7. 金额与折扣 
	a.f_discount_amount,
	c.f_base_discount * a.f_num      AS f_base_discount,
	c.f_base_discount                AS f_base_discount_ton,
	c.f_promotion_discount * a.f_num AS f_promotion_discount,
	c.f_promotion_discount           AS f_promotion_discount_ton,
	a.f_sale_amount,
	a.f_total_amount,
 -- 8. 成本计算字段 
    multiIf(d.manufacture_cost_ton != 0., d.manufacture_cost_ton, d1.manufacture_cost_ton) AS f_manufacture_cost_ton, --完工成本单吨制费
    multiIf(d2.f_package_ton_price != 0., toDecimal128(d2.f_package_ton_price,6), d.package_cost_ton != 0., toDecimal128(d.package_cost_ton,6),toDecimal128(d1.package_cost_ton,6)) as f_package_cost_ton,--包装费
	d2.f_package_ton_price as f_package_cost_ton_now,--实时包装费 销售则为0
	multiIf(d.material_cost_ton != 0., d.formula_cost_ton, d1.formula_cost_ton)as f_formula_cost_ton1, --非实时
	d2.f_formula_price as f_formula_cost_ton, --自产实时 销售则为0
	case when a.f_num<>0.000000 then b.f_cost_amount/a.f_num end as f_cost_ton,
	b.f_cost_amount as f_cost_amount, --订单实时成本
	b.f_cost_amount as  f_cost_amount1, --非实时
    f_cost_ton AS f_cost_ton1,--非实时总单吨成本 
	d3.f_day_price as f_stock_price,
-- 9. 返利与利润				
	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_year end  as f_rebate_ton,
	f_rebate_ton*a.f_num as f_rebate_amount,
	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth,   
	f_sale_amount - b.f_cost_amount - f_rebate_amount as f_profit_amount, --毛利
-- 10. 业务属性与扩展
	a.supply_time_id_vdef11,
	a.supply_time_name,
	a.delivery_id_vbdef19,
	a.delivery_name,
	a.strategy_id,
	a.strategy_name,
	a.policy_id_vbdef20,
	a.policy_code,
	a.policy_name,
-- 11. 单据类型与人员 
	a.billtype_id,
	a.billtype_code,
	a.billtype_neme,
	a.channeltype_id,
	a.channeltype_code,
	a.channeltype_name,
	a.discount_id,
	a.manager_id,
	a.manager_code,
	a.manager_name,
	a.areaman_id,
	a.areaman_code,
	a.areaman_name,
	a.regionman_id,
	a.regionman_code,
	a.regionman_name,
	a.billmaker_id,
	a.billmaker_code,
	a.billmaker_name,
	a.creator_id,
	a.creator_code,
	a.creator_name,
	a.modifier_id,
	a.modifier_code,
	a.modifier_name,
-- 12. 财务与统计指标
	a.ndiscountrate,
	a.npreceivemny,
	a.npreceivequota,
	a.npreceiverate,
	a.nreceivedmny,
	a.ntotalnum,
	a.ntotalorigmny,
	a.ntotalorigsubmny,
	a.ntotalpiece,
	a.ntotalvolume,
	a.ntotalweight,
	a.month_dt                       AS month_dt,
	a.ts,
	a.ts_char                        AS ts_char


FROM dwd_so_saleorder a
LEFT JOIN (
	select month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row,sum(f_cost_amount) as f_cost_amount
	from dwd_so_cost 
	where dr = '0' and month_dt >= '${MONTH_L3DT}' and month_dt<='${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row
)  b
ON a.month_dt=b.month_dt
and a.d_bill_code = b.d_bill_code 
AND a.order_row = b.order_row 
AND a.d_corp_id = b.d_corp_id
LEFT JOIN dwd_so_priceform  c
ON c.dr = '0' 
AND a.discount_id = c.priceform_uid 
AND toYYYYMM(c.ts) >= ${MONTHL4DT}
left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
    from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth >= '${MONTH_L4DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
) d
on  a.month_dt= d.biz_mth1
and  a.d_product_corp_id = d.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d.d_product_id

left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id) as  d_class_code6
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
	from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth >= '${MONTH_L4DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id)
) d1
on  a.month_dt= d1.biz_mth1
and a.d_product_corp_id = d1.d_corp_id
and a.d_class_code6=d1.d_class_code6 --小类

left join  dws_formula_product_day d2 --配方实时价格+包装袋价格
on   d2.updt=today() --统一用2026-04-01的数据
--0001A410000000007ECU为荆州要挂到0001A21000000006LITP江西，1001A210000000418OER深圳海南待归属
and  a.d_corp_id= d2.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d2.d_product_id
left join dws_ia_material_day_stock d3 --公司实时结存价格：采购价[代工或者销售的采购单价] 采购不区分各科目成本 只记录在销售总成本中 
on a.bill_date=d3.bill_dt
	and a.d_corp_id= d3.d_corp_id
	and a.d_material_id=d3.d_material_id
    
--返利不变
left join dws_cust_rebate_actual_m e
on e.month_dt='${MONTH_L1DT}'
and a.d_corp_id = e.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e.d_client_id
and a.d_material_id=e.d_material_id
left join(  
	select d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id) as  d_class_code6
	,sum(f_rebate_amt_mth) as f_rebate_amt_mth
	,sum(f_rebate_num_mth) as f_rebate_num_mth
	,case when f_rebate_amt_mth=0 then 0 when f_rebate_num_mth =0 then 0 else f_rebate_amt_mth/f_rebate_num_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth
	from dws_cust_rebate_actual_m
	where month_dt='${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)
)e1
on a.d_corp_id = e1.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e1.d_client_id
and a.d_class_code6=e1.d_class_code6
left join v_dim_client f 
on a.d_corp_id =f.d_corp_id and a.d_client_id=f.d_client_id 
and f.dr='0' AND f.this_year='${THIS_YEAR}'
WHERE a.dr = '0'
 AND a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L3DT}' 
 AND a.month_dt <= '${MONTH_L1DT}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_profit_2025
taskDefinitionList.description:
销售订单利润明细宽表 (含实时成本计算)
去年回刷

taskParams.sql:
SELECT 
 -- 1. 单据基础信息
	a.order_id                       AS order_id,
	a.order_uid                      AS order_uid,
	a.order_row                      AS order_row,
	a.d_bill_code                    AS d_bill_code,
	a.status_flag					AS status_flag, --1=自由，2=审批通过。自由单可不统计
	a.is_gift                        AS is_gift,
	multiIf(d2.f_formula_price = 0., '代工','自产') as production_mode,  --生产模式：代工,自产
    a.bill_ts_char                   AS bill_ts_char,
	a.bill_ts                        AS bill_ts,
	a.bill_date                      AS bill_date,
-- 2. 客户与分类维度
	a.client_class_flag  as client_class_flag,
	a.client_class_name  as client_class_name,
	a.client_dclass_code as client_dclass_code,
	a.client_dclass_name as client_dclass_name,
	dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_flag', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_flag,
	dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_name', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_name,
	f.d_client_type,
	f.d_client_level,
	f.is_strategic,
	f.is_strategic_flag,

	a.d_client_id                    AS d_client_id,
	a.d_client_code                  AS d_client_code,
	a.d_client_name                  AS d_client_name,
	a.d_salesman_id                  AS d_salesman_id,
	a.d_salesman_code                AS d_salesman_code,
	a.d_salesman_name                AS d_salesman_name,
-- 3. 组织架构维度 
	a.d_region_id,
	dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
	a.d_corp_id                      AS d_corp_id,
	a.d_corp_vid                     AS d_corp_vid,
	a.d_corp_code                    AS d_corp_code,
	a.d_corp_name                    AS d_corp_name,
	a.d_corp_sname                   AS d_corp_sname,
	a.d_dept_vid,
	a.d_dept_id,
	a.d_dept_code,
	a.d_dept_name,
	a.d_stock_corp_id,
	a.d_stock_corp_code,
	a.d_stock_corp_name,
	a.d_stock_id,
	a.d_stock_code,
	a.d_stock_name,
	a.d_salaera_id,
	a.d_town_id,
	a.d_town_code,
	a.d_town_name,
-- 4. 业绩归属与审计字段
	a.d_profit_corp_sname,
	a.d_profit_corp_code,
	a.d_profit_corp_id,
	a.d_profit_region_name,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_id',   a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_id,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_code,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_name,
	a.creationtime,
	a.dmakedate,
	a.modifiedtime,
	a.taudittime,
-- 5. 物料与配方信息 
	a.d_material_id                  AS d_material_id,
	a.d_material_code                AS d_material_code,
	a.d_material_name                AS d_material_name,
	a.d_formula_id,
	a.d_formula_code,
	a.d_formula_name,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_id', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_id,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_code', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_code,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_name', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_name,
	a.measure_ratio,
	
	a.d_prodline_id,
	a.d_prodline_code,
	a.d_prodline_name,
	a.d_cinvclass_sid,
	a.d_class_code6                  AS d_class_code6,
	a.d_class_name6                  AS d_class_name6,
	a.d_cinvclassid,
	a.d_class_code4                  AS d_class_code4,
	a.d_class_name4                  AS d_class_name4,
	a.d_class_code2,
	a.d_class_name2,
	a.d_class_code1,
	a.d_class_name1,
-- 6. 订单数量与单价 
	a.measdoc_id,
	a.measdoc_name,
	a.f_num                          AS f_num,
	a.second_measdoc_id,
	a.second_measdoc_name,
	a.f_second_num                   AS f_second_num,
	a.f_unitprice_intax,
	a.f_unitprice_extax,
-- 7. 金额与折扣 
	a.f_discount_amount,
	c.f_base_discount * a.f_num      AS f_base_discount,
	c.f_base_discount                AS f_base_discount_ton,
	c.f_promotion_discount * a.f_num AS f_promotion_discount,
	c.f_promotion_discount           AS f_promotion_discount_ton,
	a.f_sale_amount,
	a.f_total_amount,
 -- 8. 成本计算字段 
    multiIf(d.manufacture_cost_ton != 0., d.manufacture_cost_ton, d1.manufacture_cost_ton) AS f_manufacture_cost_ton, --完工成本单吨制费
    multiIf(d2.f_package_ton_price != 0., toDecimal128(d2.f_package_ton_price,6), d.package_cost_ton != 0., toDecimal128(d.package_cost_ton,6),toDecimal128(d1.package_cost_ton,6)) as f_package_cost_ton,--包装费
	d2.f_package_ton_price as f_package_cost_ton_now,--实时包装费 销售则为0
	multiIf(d.material_cost_ton != 0., d.formula_cost_ton, d1.formula_cost_ton)as f_formula_cost_ton1, --非实时
	d2.f_formula_price as f_formula_cost_ton, --自产实时 销售则为0
	case when a.f_num<>0.000000 then b.f_cost_amount/a.f_num end as f_cost_ton,
	b.f_cost_amount as f_cost_amount, --订单实时成本
	b.f_cost_amount as  f_cost_amount1, --非实时
    f_cost_ton AS f_cost_ton1,--非实时总单吨成本 
	d3.f_day_price as f_stock_price,
-- 9. 返利与利润				
	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_year end  as f_rebate_ton,
	f_rebate_ton*a.f_num as f_rebate_amount,
	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth,   
	f_sale_amount - f_cost_amount - f_rebate_amount as f_profit_amount, --毛利
-- 10. 业务属性与扩展
	a.supply_time_id_vdef11,
	a.supply_time_name,
	a.delivery_id_vbdef19,
	a.delivery_name,
	a.strategy_id,
	a.strategy_name,
	a.policy_id_vbdef20,
	a.policy_code,
	a.policy_name,
-- 11. 单据类型与人员 
	a.billtype_id,
	a.billtype_code,
	a.billtype_neme,
	a.channeltype_id,
	a.channeltype_code,
	a.channeltype_name,
	a.discount_id,
	a.manager_id,
	a.manager_code,
	a.manager_name,
	a.areaman_id,
	a.areaman_code,
	a.areaman_name,
	a.regionman_id,
	a.regionman_code,
	a.regionman_name,
	a.billmaker_id,
	a.billmaker_code,
	a.billmaker_name,
	a.creator_id,
	a.creator_code,
	a.creator_name,
	a.modifier_id,
	a.modifier_code,
	a.modifier_name,
-- 12. 财务与统计指标
	a.ndiscountrate,
	a.npreceivemny,
	a.npreceivequota,
	a.npreceiverate,
	a.nreceivedmny,
	a.ntotalnum,
	a.ntotalorigmny,
	a.ntotalorigsubmny,
	a.ntotalpiece,
	a.ntotalvolume,
	a.ntotalweight,
	a.month_dt                       AS month_dt,
	a.ts,
	a.ts_char                        AS ts_char


FROM dwd_so_saleorder a
LEFT JOIN (
	select month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row,sum(f_cost_amount) as f_cost_amount
	from dwd_so_cost 
	where dr = '0' and month_dt >= '${MONTH_L15DT}' and month_dt<='${MONTH_L4DT}'
	group by month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row
)  b
ON a.month_dt=b.month_dt
and a.d_bill_code = b.d_bill_code 
AND a.order_row = b.order_row 
AND a.d_corp_id = b.d_corp_id
LEFT JOIN dwd_so_priceform  c
ON c.dr = '0' 
AND a.discount_id = c.priceform_uid 
AND toYYYYMM(c.ts) >= ${MONTHL16DT}
left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
    from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth >= '${MONTH_L16DT}'
	and biz_mth <= '${MONTH_L5DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
) d
on  a.month_dt= d.biz_mth1
and  a.d_product_corp_id = d.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d.d_product_id

left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id) as  d_class_code6
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
	from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth >= '${MONTH_L16DT}'
	and biz_mth <= '${MONTH_L5DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id)
) d1
on  a.month_dt= d1.biz_mth1
and a.d_product_corp_id = d1.d_corp_id
and a.d_class_code6=d1.d_class_code6 --小类

ASOF left join  dws_formula_product_day d2 --配方实时价格+包装袋价格
on   d2.updt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
AND d2.updt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
and d2.f_formula_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
and a.bill_date<=d2.updt
--0001A410000000007ECU为荆州要挂到0001A21000000006LITP江西，1001A210000000418OER深圳海南待归属
and  a.d_corp_id= d2.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d2.d_product_id
ASOF left join dws_ia_material_day_stock d3 --公司实时结存价格：采购价[代工或者销售的采购单价] 采购不区分各科目成本 只记录在销售总成本中 
on d3.bill_dt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
	and d3.bill_dt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
	and  a.d_corp_id= d3.d_corp_id
	and a.d_material_id=d3.d_material_id
	and d3.f_day_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
	and a.bill_date<=d3.bill_dt

--返利不变
left join dws_cust_rebate_actual_m e
on e.month_dt='${MONTH_L4DT}'
and a.d_corp_id = e.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e.d_client_id
and a.d_material_id=e.d_material_id
left join(  
	select d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id) as  d_class_code6
	,sum(f_rebate_amt_mth) as f_rebate_amt_mth
	,sum(f_rebate_num_mth) as f_rebate_num_mth
	,case when f_rebate_amt_mth=0 then 0 when f_rebate_num_mth =0 then 0 else f_rebate_amt_mth/f_rebate_num_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth
	from dws_cust_rebate_actual_m
	where month_dt='${MONTH_L4DT}'
	group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)
)e1
on a.d_corp_id = e1.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e1.d_client_id
and a.d_class_code6=e1.d_class_code6
left join v_dim_client f 
on a.d_corp_id =f.d_corp_id and a.d_client_id=f.d_client_id 
and f.dr='0' AND f.this_year='${THIS_YEAR}'
WHERE a.dr = '0'
 AND a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L15DT}' 
 AND a.month_dt <= '${MONTH_L4DT}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_profit_2023
taskDefinitionList.description:
销售订单利润明细宽表 (含实时成本计算)
去年回刷

taskParams.sql:
SELECT 
 -- 1. 单据基础信息
	a.order_id                       AS order_id,
	a.order_uid                      AS order_uid,
	a.order_row                      AS order_row,
	a.d_bill_code                    AS d_bill_code,
	a.status_flag					AS status_flag, --1=自由，2=审批通过。自由单可不统计
	a.is_gift                        AS is_gift,
	multiIf(d2.f_formula_price = 0., '代工','自产') as production_mode,  --生产模式：代工,自产
    a.bill_ts_char                   AS bill_ts_char,
	a.bill_ts                        AS bill_ts,
	a.bill_date                      AS bill_date,
-- 2. 客户与分类维度
	a.client_class_flag  as client_class_flag,
	a.client_class_name  as client_class_name,
	a.client_dclass_code as client_dclass_code,
	a.client_dclass_name as client_dclass_name,
	dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_flag', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_flag,
	dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_name', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_name,
	f.d_client_type,
	f.d_client_level,
	f.is_strategic,
	f.is_strategic_flag,

	a.d_client_id                    AS d_client_id,
	a.d_client_code                  AS d_client_code,
	a.d_client_name                  AS d_client_name,
	a.d_salesman_id                  AS d_salesman_id,
	a.d_salesman_code                AS d_salesman_code,
	a.d_salesman_name                AS d_salesman_name,
-- 3. 组织架构维度 
	a.d_region_id,
	dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
	a.d_corp_id                      AS d_corp_id,
	a.d_corp_vid                     AS d_corp_vid,
	a.d_corp_code                    AS d_corp_code,
	a.d_corp_name                    AS d_corp_name,
	a.d_corp_sname                   AS d_corp_sname,
	a.d_dept_vid,
	a.d_dept_id,
	a.d_dept_code,
	a.d_dept_name,
	a.d_stock_corp_id,
	a.d_stock_corp_code,
	a.d_stock_corp_name,
	a.d_stock_id,
	a.d_stock_code,
	a.d_stock_name,
	a.d_salaera_id,
	a.d_town_id,
	a.d_town_code,
	a.d_town_name,
-- 4. 业绩归属与审计字段
	a.d_profit_corp_sname,
	a.d_profit_corp_code,
	a.d_profit_corp_id,
	a.d_profit_region_name,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_id',   a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_id,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_code,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_name,
	a.creationtime,
	a.dmakedate,
	a.modifiedtime,
	a.taudittime,
-- 5. 物料与配方信息 
	a.d_material_id                  AS d_material_id,
	a.d_material_code                AS d_material_code,
	a.d_material_name                AS d_material_name,
	a.d_formula_id,
	a.d_formula_code,
	a.d_formula_name,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_id', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_id,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_code', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_code,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_name', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_name,
	a.measure_ratio,
	
	a.d_prodline_id,
	a.d_prodline_code,
	a.d_prodline_name,
	a.d_cinvclass_sid,
	a.d_class_code6                  AS d_class_code6,
	a.d_class_name6                  AS d_class_name6,
	a.d_cinvclassid,
	a.d_class_code4                  AS d_class_code4,
	a.d_class_name4                  AS d_class_name4,
	a.d_class_code2,
	a.d_class_name2,
	a.d_class_code1,
	a.d_class_name1,
-- 6. 订单数量与单价 
	a.measdoc_id,
	a.measdoc_name,
	a.f_num                          AS f_num,
	a.second_measdoc_id,
	a.second_measdoc_name,
	a.f_second_num                   AS f_second_num,
	a.f_unitprice_intax,
	a.f_unitprice_extax,
-- 7. 金额与折扣 
	a.f_discount_amount,
	c.f_base_discount * a.f_num      AS f_base_discount,
	c.f_base_discount                AS f_base_discount_ton,
	c.f_promotion_discount * a.f_num AS f_promotion_discount,
	c.f_promotion_discount           AS f_promotion_discount_ton,
	a.f_sale_amount,
	a.f_total_amount,
 -- 8. 成本计算字段 
    multiIf(d.manufacture_cost_ton != 0., d.manufacture_cost_ton, d1.manufacture_cost_ton) AS f_manufacture_cost_ton, --完工成本单吨制费
    multiIf(d2.f_package_ton_price != 0., toDecimal128(d2.f_package_ton_price,6), d.package_cost_ton != 0., toDecimal128(d.package_cost_ton,6),toDecimal128(d1.package_cost_ton,6)) as f_package_cost_ton,--包装费
	d2.f_package_ton_price as f_package_cost_ton_now,--实时包装费 销售则为0
	multiIf(d.material_cost_ton != 0., d.formula_cost_ton, d1.formula_cost_ton)as f_formula_cost_ton1, --非实时
	d2.f_formula_price as f_formula_cost_ton, --自产实时 销售则为0
	case when a.f_num<>0.000000 then b.f_cost_amount/a.f_num end as f_cost_ton,
	b.f_cost_amount as f_cost_amount, --订单实时成本
	b.f_cost_amount as  f_cost_amount1, --非实时
    f_cost_ton AS f_cost_ton1,--非实时总单吨成本 
	d3.f_day_price as f_stock_price,
-- 9. 返利与利润				
	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_year end  as f_rebate_ton,
	f_rebate_ton*a.f_num as f_rebate_amount,
	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth,   
	f_sale_amount - f_cost_amount - f_rebate_amount as f_profit_amount, --毛利
-- 10. 业务属性与扩展
	a.supply_time_id_vdef11,
	a.supply_time_name,
	a.delivery_id_vbdef19,
	a.delivery_name,
	a.strategy_id,
	a.strategy_name,
	a.policy_id_vbdef20,
	a.policy_code,
	a.policy_name,
-- 11. 单据类型与人员 
	a.billtype_id,
	a.billtype_code,
	a.billtype_neme,
	a.channeltype_id,
	a.channeltype_code,
	a.channeltype_name,
	a.discount_id,
	a.manager_id,
	a.manager_code,
	a.manager_name,
	a.areaman_id,
	a.areaman_code,
	a.areaman_name,
	a.regionman_id,
	a.regionman_code,
	a.regionman_name,
	a.billmaker_id,
	a.billmaker_code,
	a.billmaker_name,
	a.creator_id,
	a.creator_code,
	a.creator_name,
	a.modifier_id,
	a.modifier_code,
	a.modifier_name,
-- 12. 财务与统计指标
	a.ndiscountrate,
	a.npreceivemny,
	a.npreceivequota,
	a.npreceiverate,
	a.nreceivedmny,
	a.ntotalnum,
	a.ntotalorigmny,
	a.ntotalorigsubmny,
	a.ntotalpiece,
	a.ntotalvolume,
	a.ntotalweight,
	a.month_dt                       AS month_dt,
	a.ts,
	a.ts_char                        AS ts_char


FROM dwd_so_saleorder a
LEFT JOIN (
	select month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row,sum(f_cost_amount) as f_cost_amount
	from dwd_so_cost 
	where dr = '0' and month_dt >= '${MONTH_L39DT}' and month_dt<='${MONTH_L28DT}'
	group by month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row
)  b
ON a.month_dt=b.month_dt
and a.d_bill_code = b.d_bill_code 
AND a.order_row = b.order_row 
AND a.d_corp_id = b.d_corp_id
LEFT JOIN dwd_so_priceform  c
ON c.dr = '0' 
AND a.discount_id = c.priceform_uid 
AND toYYYYMM(c.ts) >= ${MONTHL40DT}
and toYYYYMM(c.ts) <= ${MONTHL28DT}
left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
    from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth >= '${MONTH_L40DT}'
	and biz_mth <= '${MONTH_L29DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
) d
on  a.month_dt= d.biz_mth1
and  a.d_product_corp_id = d.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d.d_product_id

left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id) as  d_class_code6
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
	from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth >= '${MONTH_L40DT}'
	and biz_mth <= '${MONTH_L29DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id)
) d1
on  a.month_dt= d1.biz_mth1
and a.d_product_corp_id = d1.d_corp_id
and a.d_class_code6=d1.d_class_code6 --小类

ASOF left join  dws_formula_product_day d2 --配方实时价格+包装袋价格
on   d2.updt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
AND d2.updt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
and d2.f_formula_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
and a.bill_date<=d2.updt
--0001A410000000007ECU为荆州要挂到0001A21000000006LITP江西，1001A210000000418OER深圳海南待归属
and  a.d_corp_id= d2.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d2.d_product_id
ASOF left join dws_ia_material_day_stock d3 --公司实时结存价格：采购价[代工或者销售的采购单价] 采购不区分各科目成本 只记录在销售总成本中 
on d3.bill_dt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
	and d3.bill_dt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
	and  a.d_corp_id= d3.d_corp_id
	and a.d_material_id=d3.d_material_id
	and d3.f_day_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
	and a.bill_date<=d3.bill_dt

--返利不变
left join dws_cust_rebate_actual_m e
on e.month_dt='${MONTH_L28DT}'
and a.d_corp_id = e.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e.d_client_id
and a.d_material_id=e.d_material_id
left join(  
	select d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id) as  d_class_code6
	,sum(f_rebate_amt_mth) as f_rebate_amt_mth
	,sum(f_rebate_num_mth) as f_rebate_num_mth
	,case when f_rebate_amt_mth=0 then 0 when f_rebate_num_mth =0 then 0 else f_rebate_amt_mth/f_rebate_num_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth
	from dws_cust_rebate_actual_m
	where month_dt='${MONTH_L28DT}'
	group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)
)e1
on a.d_corp_id = e1.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e1.d_client_id
and a.d_class_code6=e1.d_class_code6
left join v_dim_client f 
on a.d_corp_id =f.d_corp_id and a.d_client_id=f.d_client_id 
and f.dr='0' AND f.this_year='${THIS_YEAR}'
WHERE a.dr = '0'
 AND a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L39DT}' 
 AND a.month_dt <= '${MONTH_L28DT}'
