	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_year end  as f_rebate_ton,
	f_rebate_ton*a.f_num as f_rebate_amount,
	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth,   
	f_sale_amount - f_cost_amount - f_rebate_amount as f_profit_amount, --毛利
-- 10. 业务属性与扩展
	a.supply_time_id_vdef11,
	a.supply_time_name,
	a.delivery_id_vbdef19,
	a.delivery_name,
	a.strategy_id,
	a.strategy_name,
	a.policy_id_vbdef20,
	a.policy_code,
	a.policy_name,
-- 11. 单据类型与人员 
	a.billtype_id,
	a.billtype_code,
	a.billtype_neme,
	a.channeltype_id,
	a.channeltype_code,
	a.channeltype_name,
	a.discount_id,
	a.manager_id,
	a.manager_code,
	a.manager_name,
	a.areaman_id,
	a.areaman_code,
	a.areaman_name,
	a.regionman_id,
	a.regionman_code,
	a.regionman_name,
	a.billmaker_id,
	a.billmaker_code,
	a.billmaker_name,
	a.creator_id,
	a.creator_code,
	a.creator_name,
	a.modifier_id,
	a.modifier_code,
	a.modifier_name,
-- 12. 财务与统计指标
	a.ndiscountrate,
	a.npreceivemny,
	a.npreceivequota,
	a.npreceiverate,
	a.nreceivedmny,
	a.ntotalnum,
	a.ntotalorigmny,
	a.ntotalorigsubmny,
	a.ntotalpiece,
	a.ntotalvolume,
	a.ntotalweight,
	a.month_dt                       AS month_dt,
	a.ts,
	a.ts_char                        AS ts_char


FROM dwd_so_saleorder a
LEFT JOIN (
	select month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row,sum(f_cost_amount) as f_cost_amount
	from dwd_so_cost 
	where dr = '0' and month_dt >= '${MONTH_L27DT}' and month_dt<='${MONTH_L16DT}'
	group by month_dt,d_bill_code,d_corp_id,order_row
)  b
ON a.month_dt=b.month_dt
and a.d_bill_code = b.d_bill_code 
AND a.order_row = b.order_row 
AND a.d_corp_id = b.d_corp_id
LEFT JOIN dwd_so_priceform  c
ON c.dr = '0' 
AND a.discount_id = c.priceform_uid 
AND toYYYYMM(c.ts) >= ${MONTHL28DT}
and toYYYYMM(c.ts) <= ${MONTHL16DT}
left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
    from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth >= '${MONTH_L28DT}'
	and biz_mth <= '${MONTH_L17DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
) d
on  a.month_dt= d.biz_mth1
and  a.d_product_corp_id = d.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d.d_product_id

left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id) as  d_class_code6
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
	from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth >= '${MONTH_L28DT}'
	and biz_mth <= '${MONTH_L17DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id)
) d1
on  a.month_dt= d1.biz_mth1
and a.d_product_corp_id = d1.d_corp_id
and a.d_class_code6=d1.d_class_code6 --小类

ASOF left join  dws_formula_product_day d2 --配方实时价格+包装袋价格
on   d2.updt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
AND d2.updt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
and d2.f_formula_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
and a.bill_date<=d2.updt
--0001A410000000007ECU为荆州要挂到0001A21000000006LITP江西，1001A210000000418OER深圳海南待归属
and  a.d_corp_id= d2.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d2.d_product_id
ASOF left join dws_ia_material_day_stock d3 --公司实时结存价格：采购价[代工或者销售的采购单价] 采购不区分各科目成本 只记录在销售总成本中 
on d3.bill_dt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
	and d3.bill_dt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
	and  a.d_corp_id= d3.d_corp_id
	and a.d_material_id=d3.d_material_id
	and d3.f_day_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
	and a.bill_date<=d3.bill_dt

--返利不变
left join dws_cust_rebate_actual_m e
on e.month_dt='${MONTH_L16DT}'
and a.d_corp_id = e.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e.d_client_id
and a.d_material_id=e.d_material_id
left join(  
	select d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id) as  d_class_code6
	,sum(f_rebate_amt_mth) as f_rebate_amt_mth
	,sum(f_rebate_num_mth) as f_rebate_num_mth
	,case when f_rebate_amt_mth=0 then 0 when f_rebate_num_mth =0 then 0 else f_rebate_amt_mth/f_rebate_num_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth
	from dws_cust_rebate_actual_m
	where month_dt='${MONTH_L16DT}'
	group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)
)e1
on a.d_corp_id = e1.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e1.d_client_id
and a.d_class_code6=e1.d_class_code6
left join v_dim_client f 
on a.d_corp_id =f.d_corp_id and a.d_client_id=f.d_client_id 
and f.dr='0' AND f.this_year='${THIS_YEAR}'
WHERE a.dr = '0'
 AND a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_L27DT}' 
 AND a.month_dt <= '${MONTH_L16DT}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dws_cust_rebate_actual_m_nctock_2h
taskDefinitionList.description:
create table dws_cust_rebate_actual_m
(
    month_dt          FixedString(7),
    d_corp_id         FixedString(20),
    d_corp_code       String,
    d_corp_name       String,
    d_corp_sname      String,
    d_client_id       FixedString(20),
    d_client_code     String,
    d_client_name     String,
    d_material_id     FixedString(20),
    d_material_code   String,
    d_material_name   String,
    f_rebate_amt_year Decimal(18, 6),
    f_rebate_num_year Decimal(18, 6),
    f_rebate_ton_year Nullable(Decimal(18, 6)),
    f_rebate_amt_mth  Decimal(18, 6),
    f_rebate_num_mth  Nullable(Decimal(18, 6)),
    f_rebate_ton_mth  Nullable(Decimal(18, 6))
)
    engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY month_dt
        ORDER BY (d_corp_id, d_client_id, d_material_id)
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;

taskParams.sql:
select '${MONTH_L1DT}' as month_dt,
       a.d_corp_id,
       dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_code,
       dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_name,
       dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_sname', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_sname,
       a.d_client_id,
       dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'd_client_code', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) as d_client_code,
       dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'd_client_name', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) as d_client_name,
       a.d_material_id,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_code', a.d_material_id) as d_material_code,
       dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', a.d_material_id) as d_material_name,

       a.f_rebate_amt_year as f_rebate_amt_year,
	   b.f_sale_num_year as f_rebate_num_year,
       a.f_rebate_amt_year/nullIf(b.f_sale_num_year,0) as f_rebate_ton_year,
	   a.f_rebate1_amt_year as f_rebate_special_amt_year,
       a.f_rebate1_amt_year/nullIf(b.f_sale_num_year,0) as f_rebate_special_ton_year,

       a.f_rebate_amt_mth as f_rebate_amt_mth,
       b.f_sale_num_mth as f_rebate_num_mth,
       a.f_rebate_amt_mth/nullIf(b.f_sale_num_mth,0) as f_rebate_ton_mth,
	   a.f_rebate1_amt_mth as f_rebate_special_amt_mth,
       a.f_rebate1_amt_mth/nullIf(b.f_sale_num_mth,0) as f_rebate_special_ton_mth
  
from  (
	select d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id
		,sum(f_rebate_amt) as f_rebate_amt_year
		,sum(f_rebate_qty) as f_rebate_qty_year
		,sum(case when d_billtype_code='35-Cxx-01' then f_rebate_amt
				  when d_billtype_code='35-Cxx-06' and f_rebate_amt<>0 and f_rebate_qty=0 then f_rebate_amt
				  else 0 end )f_rebate1_amt_year

		,sum(if(biz_mth='${MONTH_L1DT}',f_rebate_amt,0)) as f_rebate_amt_mth
		,sum(if(biz_mth='${MONTH_L1DT}',f_rebate_qty,0)) as f_rebate_qty_mth
		,sum(case when biz_mth='${MONTH_L1DT}' and d_billtype_code='35-Cxx-01' then f_rebate_amt
				  when biz_mth='${MONTH_L1DT}' and d_billtype_code='35-Cxx-06' and f_rebate_amt<>0 and f_rebate_qty=0 then f_rebate_amt
				  else 0 end )f_rebate1_amt_mth

	from dwd_cust_rebate_actual_m 
	where biz_mth>='${YEAR_STA}'
	and biz_mth<='${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,d_material_id
)a
 left join(
	select d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_client_id
		,sum(f_sale_num) as f_sale_num_year
		,sum(if(month_dt='${MONTH_L1DT}',f_sale_num,0)) as f_sale_num_mth
	from dwd_so_saleorder
	where month_dt>='${YEAR_STA}'
	and month_dt<='${MONTH_L1DT}'
	and dr='0'
	and is_gift='N'
	group by d_corp_id,d_material_id,d_client_id
)b
on a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=b.d_client_id
and a.d_material_id=b.d_material_id

SELECT
    month_dt                                                AS BILLMONTH,
    d_corp_id                                               AS CORP_PK,
    d_corp_code                                             AS CORP_CODE,
    d_corp_name                                             AS CORP_NAME,
    d_material_id                                           AS MATERIAL_PK,
    d_material_code                                         AS MATERIAL_CODE,
    dictGet('alphafeed.dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', d_material_id)   AS MATERIAL_NAME,
    dictGet('alphafeed.dim_material_dict', 'strategy_name', d_material_id)     AS STRATEGY_NAME,
    dictGet('alphafeed.dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)     AS CLASS_CODE6,
    dictGet('alphafeed.dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name6', d_material_id)     AS CLASS_NAME6,
    dictGet('alphafeed.dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code4', d_material_id)     AS CLASS_CODE4,
    dictGet('alphafeed.dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name4', d_material_id)     AS CLASS_NAME4,
    dictGet('alphafeed.dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code2', d_material_id)     AS CLASS_CODE2,
    dictGet('alphafeed.dim_material_dict', 'd_class_name2', d_material_id)     AS CLASS_NAME2,
    SUM(f_sale_num)                                         AS NUM,
    now()                                                   AS UPDTIME
FROM alphafeed.v_dwd_so_saleorder
WHERE data_type = '销售'
  AND month_dt >= '${MONTH_L3DT}'
  AND month_dt <= '${MONTH_DT}'
GROUP BY
    month_dt, d_corp_id, d_corp_code, d_corp_name,
    d_material_id, d_material_code
preStatements: DELETE FROM DWD_SAL_PRODUCT WHERE BILLMONTH >=  TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-3),'YYYY-MM')

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_profit_1month
taskDefinitionList.description: 销售订单利润明细宽表 (含实时成本计算)

taskParams.sql:
SELECT 
 -- 1. 单据基础信息
	a.order_id                       AS order_id,
	a.order_uid                      AS order_uid,
	a.order_row                      AS order_row,
	a.d_bill_code                    AS d_bill_code,
	a.status_flag					AS status_flag, --1=自由，2=审批通过。自由单可不统计
	a.is_gift                        AS is_gift,
    multiIf(a.d_corp_id  = dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_id',   a.d_material_id), '自产','代工') as production_mode,  --生产模式：代工,自产
	a.bill_ts_char                   AS bill_ts_char,
	a.bill_ts                        AS bill_ts,
	a.bill_date                      AS bill_date,
-- 2. 客户与分类维度
	a.client_class_flag  as client_class_flag,
	a.client_class_name  as client_class_name,
	a.client_dclass_code as client_dclass_code,
	a.client_dclass_name as client_dclass_name,
	dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_flag', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_flag,
	dictGet('dim_client_dict', 'is_corp_name', (a.d_client_id,a.d_corp_id)) AS is_corp_name,
	f.d_client_type,
	f.d_client_level,
	f.is_strategic,
	f.is_strategic_flag,

	a.d_client_id                    AS d_client_id,
	a.d_client_code                  AS d_client_code,
	a.d_client_name                  AS d_client_name,
	a.d_salesman_id                  AS d_salesman_id,
	a.d_salesman_code                AS d_salesman_code,
	a.d_salesman_name                AS d_salesman_name,
-- 3. 组织架构维度 
	a.d_region_id,
	dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_region_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_region_name,
	a.d_corp_id                      AS d_corp_id,
	a.d_corp_vid                     AS d_corp_vid,
	a.d_corp_code                    AS d_corp_code,
	a.d_corp_name                    AS d_corp_name,
	a.d_corp_sname                   AS d_corp_sname,
	a.d_dept_vid,
	a.d_dept_id,
	a.d_dept_code,
	a.d_dept_name,
	a.d_stock_corp_id,
	a.d_stock_corp_code,
	a.d_stock_corp_name,
	a.d_stock_id,
	a.d_stock_code,
	a.d_stock_name,
	a.d_salaera_id,
	a.d_town_id,
	a.d_town_code,
	a.d_town_name,
-- 4. 业绩归属与审计字段
	a.d_profit_corp_sname,
	a.d_profit_corp_code,
	a.d_profit_corp_id,
	a.d_profit_region_name,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_id',   a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_id,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_code,
	dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_material_id) as d_product_corp_name,
	a.creationtime,
	a.dmakedate,
	a.modifiedtime,
	a.taudittime,
-- 5. 物料与配方信息 
	a.d_material_id                  AS d_material_id,
	a.d_material_code                AS d_material_code,
	a.d_material_name                AS d_material_name,
	a.d_formula_id,
	a.d_formula_code,
	a.d_formula_name,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_id', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_id,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_code', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_code,
	dictGet('dim_formula_product_dictpack', 'd_row_name', a.d_material_id)  as d_package_name,
	a.measure_ratio,
	
	a.d_prodline_id,
	a.d_prodline_code,
	a.d_prodline_name,
    a.product_tag_code,
    a.product_tag,
	a.d_cinvclass_sid,
	a.d_class_code6                  AS d_class_code6,
	a.d_class_name6                  AS d_class_name6,
	a.d_cinvclassid,
	a.d_class_code4                  AS d_class_code4,
	a.d_class_name4                  AS d_class_name4,
	a.d_class_code2,
	a.d_class_name2,
	a.d_class_code1,
	a.d_class_name1,
-- 6. 订单数量与单价 
	a.measdoc_id,
	a.measdoc_name,
	a.f_num                          AS f_num,
	a.second_measdoc_id,
	a.second_measdoc_name,
	a.f_second_num                   AS f_second_num,
	a.f_unitprice_intax,
	a.f_unitprice_extax,
-- 7. 金额与折扣 
	a.f_discount_amount,
	c.f_base_discount * a.f_num      AS f_base_discount,
	c.f_base_discount                AS f_base_discount_ton,
	c.f_promotion_discount * a.f_num AS f_promotion_discount,
	c.f_promotion_discount           AS f_promotion_discount_ton,
	a.f_sale_amount,
	a.f_total_amount,
 -- 8. 成本计算字段 
    multiIf(d.manufacture_cost_ton != 0., d.manufacture_cost_ton, d1.manufacture_cost_ton) AS f_manufacture_cost_ton, --完工成本单吨制费
    multiIf(d2.f_package_ton_price != 0., toDecimal128(d2.f_package_ton_price,6), d.package_cost_ton != 0., toDecimal128(d.package_cost_ton,6),toDecimal128(d1.package_cost_ton,6)) as f_package_cost_ton,--包装费
	d2.f_package_ton_price as f_package_cost_ton_now,--实时包装费 销售则为0
	multiIf(d.material_cost_ton != 0., d.formula_cost_ton, d1.formula_cost_ton)as f_formula_cost_ton1, --非实时
	case when d2.f_formula_price>100000 then 0 else  d2.f_formula_price end as f_formula_cost_ton, --自产实时 销售则为0
    multiIf(d2.f_formula_price = 0., toDecimal128(d3.f_day_price,6),toDecimal128(d2.f_formula_price,6)+toDecimal128(f_package_cost_ton,6)+toDecimal128(f_manufacture_cost_ton,6)) as f_cost_ton,--实时总单吨成本
    toDecimal128(case when f_cost_ton>100000 then 0 else f_cost_ton end ,3)*toDecimal128(a.f_num,3) as f_cost_amount, --订单实时成本
	multiIf(d.f_cost_ton != 0., toDecimal128(d.f_cost_ton,3)*toDecimal128(a.f_num,3), toDecimal128(d1.f_cost_ton,3)*toDecimal128(a.f_num,3))  as f_cost_amount1, --非实时
    multiIf(d.f_cost_ton != 0., d.f_cost_ton, d1.f_cost_ton) AS f_cost_ton1,--非实时总单吨成本 
	d3.f_day_price as f_stock_price,
-- 9. 返利与利润				
	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_year end  as f_rebate_ton,
	toDecimal128(f_rebate_ton,3)*toDecimal128(a.f_num,3) as f_rebate_amount,
	case when a.is_gift='Y' then 0 when e.f_rebate_ton_year=0 then e1.f_rebate_ton_mth else e.f_rebate_ton_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth,   
	f_sale_amount - f_cost_amount - f_rebate_amount as f_profit_amount, --毛利
-- 10. 业务属性与扩展
	a.supply_time_id_vdef11,
	a.supply_time_name,
	a.delivery_id_vbdef19,
	a.delivery_name,
	a.strategy_id,
	a.strategy_name,
	a.policy_id_vbdef20,
	a.policy_code,
	a.policy_name,
-- 11. 单据类型与人员 
	a.billtype_id,
	a.billtype_code,
	a.billtype_neme,
	a.channeltype_id,
	a.channeltype_code,
	a.channeltype_name,
	a.discount_id,
	a.manager_id,
	a.manager_code,
	a.manager_name,
	a.areaman_id,
	a.areaman_code,
	a.areaman_name,
	a.regionman_id,
	a.regionman_code,
	a.regionman_name,
	a.billmaker_id,
	a.billmaker_code,
	a.billmaker_name,
	a.creator_id,
	a.creator_code,
	a.creator_name,
	a.modifier_id,
	a.modifier_code,
	a.modifier_name,
-- 12. 财务与统计指标
	a.ndiscountrate,
	a.npreceivemny,
	a.npreceivequota,
	a.npreceiverate,
	a.nreceivedmny,
	a.ntotalnum,
	a.ntotalorigmny,
	a.ntotalorigsubmny,
	a.ntotalpiece,
	a.ntotalvolume,
	a.ntotalweight,
	a.month_dt                       AS month_dt,
	a.ts,
	a.ts_char                        AS ts_char


FROM dwd_so_saleorder a
LEFT JOIN dwd_so_priceform  c
ON c.dr = '0' 
AND a.discount_id = c.priceform_uid 
AND toYYYYMM(c.ts) >= ${MONTHL2DT}
left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
    from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth = '${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,d_product_id
) d
on   a.d_product_corp_id = d.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d.d_product_id

left join (
	select biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id) as  d_class_code6
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as f_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_02_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as material_cost_ton
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_01_total),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as manufacture_cost_ton--制造费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as formula_cost_ton--配方费用：用bom实时计算
		,if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty)=0,0,divide(sum(f_cost_packaging_cost),sum(f_product_sum12_qty))) as package_cost_ton--包装袋费用：用上月完工成本近似替代
	from dws_product_subject_cost
	where biz_mth = '${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by biz_mth1,d_corp_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_product_id)
) d1
on   a.d_product_corp_id = d1.d_corp_id
and a.d_class_code6=d1.d_class_code6 --小类

ASOF left join  dws_formula_product_day d2 --配方实时价格+包装袋价格
on   d2.updt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
AND d2.updt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
and d2.f_formula_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
and a.bill_date<=d2.updt
--0001A410000000007ECU为荆州要挂到0001A21000000006LITP江西，1001A210000000418OER深圳海南待归属
and  a.d_corp_id= d2.d_corp_id
and a.d_material_id=d2.d_product_id
ASOF left join dws_ia_material_day_stock d3 --公司实时结存价格：采购价[代工或者销售的采购单价] 采购不区分各科目成本 只记录在销售总成本中 
on d3.bill_dt>='${MONTHDT_STA}'
	and d3.bill_dt<='${MONTHDT_END}'
	and  a.d_corp_id= d3.d_corp_id
	and a.d_material_id=d3.d_material_id
	and d3.f_day_price<>0 --保险开关 如果为0往后找不为0的价格
	and a.bill_date<=d3.bill_dt
--返利不变
left join dws_cust_rebate_actual_m e
on e.month_dt='${MONTH_L1DT}'
and a.d_corp_id = e.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e.d_client_id
and a.d_material_id=e.d_material_id
left join(  
	select d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id) as  d_class_code6
	,sum(f_rebate_amt_mth) as f_rebate_amt_mth
	,sum(f_rebate_num_mth) as f_rebate_num_mth
	,case when f_rebate_amt_mth=0 then 0 when f_rebate_num_mth =0 then 0 else f_rebate_amt_mth/f_rebate_num_mth end as f_rebate_ton_mth
	from dws_cust_rebate_actual_m
	where month_dt='${MONTH_L1DT}'
	group by d_corp_id,d_client_id,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code6', d_material_id)
)e1
on a.d_corp_id = e1.d_corp_id
and a.d_client_id=e1.d_client_id
and a.d_class_code6=e1.d_class_code6
left join v_dim_client f 
on a.d_corp_id =f.d_corp_id and a.d_client_id=f.d_client_id 
and f.dr='0' AND f.this_year='${THIS_YEAR}'
WHERE a.dr = '0'
 AND a.month_dt >= '${MONTH_DT}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_saleorder
taskDefinitionList.description: 采购订单核心表：销量 金额 折扣等

taskParams.sql:
select
     a.csaleorderid  		as order_id		--主实体主键
    ,b.csaleorderbid as order_uid	--子实体主键
    ,b.crowno as order_row  --销售订单行号
	
    ,a.vbillcode as d_bill_code --单据编号
    ,b.blargessflag as is_gift		--是否赠品
    ,b.dbilldate as bill_ts_char	--单据日期时间戳

	,d.custprop as client_class_flag --客户分类标志
	,case  when d.custprop='0' then '外部客户' else '内部客户' end as client_class_name 	--客户分类状态
	,d1.code as client_dclass_code
	,d1.name as client_dclass_name
    ,case
          when d.custprop='1' then 2 --内部客户
          when regexp_like(d.taxpayerid, '^[0-9]{17}[0-9x]$') then 1
          when regexp_like(d.taxpayerid, '^[0-9a-hj-np-rt-y]{18}$') then 0
          when instr(d.taxpayerid, '-')>0 then 0 else 1 --海外 港澳台证件均归到个人户
    end as is_corp_flag
    ,a.ccustomerid	 as d_client_id--客户主键[客户基本信息]
	,d.code as d_client_code
	,d.name as d_client_name
    ,a.cemployeeid 	as d_salesman_id	--业务员[人员基本信息]
	,f1.code as d_salesman_code
	,f1.name as d_salesman_name
	-- ========== 区域维度 ==========
    ,a.vdef5	as d_region_id --所属大区
    ,a.pk_org	as d_corp_id --销售组织[组织_业务单元_销售组织]
    ,a.pk_org_v as d_corp_vid
	,e.code as d_corp_code
	,e.name as d_corp_name
	,e.shortname as d_corp_sname
    ,a.cdeptvid	as d_dept_vid	--部门版本主键[组织_部门版本信息]
    ,a.cdeptid		as d_dept_id 	--部门主键
	,e1.code as d_dept_code
	,e1.name as d_dept_name
    ,b.csendstockorgid as d_stock_corp_id		--发货仓库所属销售组织主键
	,e2.code as d_stock_corp_code
	,e2.name as d_stock_corp_name
	,b.csendstordocid as d_stock_id		--发货仓库主键
	,e3.code as d_stock_code
	,e3.name as d_stock_name
    ,a.vdef4 as d_salaera_id	 --销售区域
	
	--自定义档案
    ,d2.def12	as d_town_id--聚焦镇 --通过客户表替代
	,h6.code as d_town_code
	,h6.name as d_town_name
    ,a.vdef11 as supply_time_id_vdef11--供货时效主键
	,h2.name as supply_time_name 
    ,b.vbdef19 as delivery_id_vbdef19 --提货方式
	,h3.name as delivery_name ----提货方式名称
	,c.def1  as strategy_id
	,h5.name as strategy_name
	
    -- ========== 物料维度 ==========
    ,b.cmaterialid as d_material_id
    ,b.cmaterialvid as d_material_vid

	,c.code as d_material_code
	,c.name as d_material_name
    ,b.cprodlineid as d_prodline_id
    ,h4.code as d_prodline_code
    ,h4.mnecode as d_prodline_name
    ,c1.pk_marbasclass as d_cinvclass_sid
    ,c1.code as d_class_code6
    ,c1.name as d_class_name6
    ,c2.pk_marbasclass as d_cinvclassid
    ,c2.code as d_class_code4
    ,c2.name as d_class_name4
    ,c3.code as d_class_code2
    ,c3.name AS d_class_name2
    ,case when c4.code is null and c2.code='3'  then '3'
          when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '3'
          when c3.code='1'  then  '1'
          when c3.code='4'  then  '4'
		  when c2.code='1' then '1'
		  when c2.code is null then c1.code
          else c4.code 
	   end as d_class_code1
    ,case when c4.code is null and c2.code in('3','12')  then '添加剂'
          when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '添加剂'
          when c3.code='1'  then  '原料'
          when c3.code='4'  then  '包装物'
          when c4.code='4' then '外袋配件'  
		  when c2.code='1' then '原料'
		  when c2.code is null then c1.name
		  else c4.name
        end as d_class_name1
	-- ========== 核心指标 ==========
    ,case when c.code like '7%' then b.castunitid else b.cunitid end AS measdoc_id
    ,case when c.code like '7%' then c5.name else c6.name end AS measdoc_name
    ,case when c.code like '7%' then b.nastnum else b.nnum end as f_num--主数量
    ,case when c.code like '7%' then b.cunitid else b.castunitid end AS second_measdoc_id
    ,case when c.code like '7%' then c6.name else c5.name end AS second_measdoc_name
    ,case when c.code like '7%' then b.nnum else b.nastnum end as f_second_num--辅数量
    ,b.nqtorigtaxprice as f_unitprice_intax	--含税单价/挂牌单价
    ,b.nqtorigprice as f_unitprice_extax 	--无税单价
    ,b.norigdiscount as f_discount_amount	--折扣额
    ,b.ntaxmny as f_sale_amount --销售金额
	,b.nqtorigtaxprice*(case when c.code like '7%' then b.nastnum else b.nnum end) as f_total_amount --挂牌销售金额


    ,a.creationtime
    ,a.dmakedate
    ,a.modifiedtime
    ,a.taudittime

	
	--其它
    ,a.ctrantypeid			as billtype_id		--单据主键[单据类型]
    ,o1.pk_billtypecode 	as billtype_code	--单据编码
    ,o1.billtypename 		as billtype_neme	--单据名称
    ,a.cchanneltypeid 	as channeltype_id					--销售渠道类型[渠道类型]
	,o2.code as channeltype_code
	,o2.name as channeltype_name
    ,b.vbdef20 as policy_id_vbdef20			--活动政策主键(赠送有值)
	,o3.policy_code
	,o3.policy_name
	,b.cpriceformid as discount_id

--人员用户
    ,a.vdef7 as manager_id	--销售经理主键
	,f2.code as manager_code
	,f2.name as manager_name
    ,a.vdef8 as areaman_id --区域经理主键
	,f3.code as areaman_code
	,f3.name as areaman_name
    ,a.vdef9 as regionman_id --大区经理主键
	,f4.code as regionman_code
	,f4.name as regionman_name
    ,a.billmaker   	as billmaker_id		--制单人[用户]
    ,g1.user_code  	as billmaker_code	--制单人编码
    ,g1.user_name   as billmaker_name	--制单人名称
    ,a.creator	    as creator_id --创建人[用户]
    ,g2.user_code  	as creator_code	--创建人编码
    ,g2.user_name   as creator_name	--创建人名称
    ,a.modifier	as modifier_id--修改人[用户]
    ,g3.user_code  	as modifier_code	--修改人编码
    ,g3.user_name   as modifier_name	--修改人名称
    ,a.approver	as approver_id--审批人主键
    ,g4.user_code  	as approver_code	--审批人编码
    ,g4.user_name   as approver_name	--审批人名称
    ,a.creviserid as creviser_id	--修订人主键

	
	
	

	--nc未解析字段
    ,a.cbiztypeid as busiflow_id		--业务流程[业务流程]
    ,a.cinvoicecustid --开票客户[客户基本信息]
    ,a.corigcurrencyid
    ,a.ctradewordid			--贸易术语
    ,a.ctransporttypeid	--运输方式
    ,a.vdef1	as adress_vdef1 --地址
    ,a.vdef2 	as phone_vdef2--电话
    ,a.vdef17 as cargoods_vdef17--随车物品
    ,a.vdef21 as card_no_vdef21 --身份证号
    ,a.vdef22 as aeraid_vdef22--市场区域
    ,a.vdef20 as note --付款备注
    ,a.carno as carno_id --车牌号主键
    ,a.goodsweight
    ,a.drivername
    ,a.driverphone
    ,a.cfreecustid --散户主键 无发解析
    ,a.fpfstatusflag
    ,a.fstatusflag as status_flag
    ,a.iprintcount
    ,a.iversion

    ,a.ndiscountrate
    ,a.npreceivemny
    ,a.npreceivequota
    ,a.npreceiverate
    ,a.nreceivedmny
    ,a.ntotalnum
    ,a.ntotalorigmny
    ,a.ntotalorigsubmny
    ,a.ntotalpiece
    ,a.ntotalvolume
    ,a.ntotalweight



    ,a.vcooppohcode
    ,a.vcreditnum
    ,a.vnote
    ,a.vrevisereason
    ,a.vtrantypecode
    ,a.cbillsrcid
    ,a.vbillsrctype
    ,a.carsubtypeid
    ,a.chreceivecustid
    ,a.nlrgtotalorigmny
    ,a.ccustbankaccid 	as custbank_accpk	--开户银行账户[客商银行账户子户]
    ,a.ccustbankid	    as custbank_pk		--开户银行[银行档案] ccustbankid
    ,a.badvfeeflag
    ,a.barsettleflag
    ,a.bcooptopoflag
    ,a.bcostsettleflag
    ,a.bfreecustflag
    ,a.binvoicendflag
    ,a.boffsetflag
    ,a.boutendflag
    ,a.bpocooptomeflag
    ,a.bpreceiveflag
    ,a.bsendendflag
    ,a.vdef12 as submission_num_vdef12		--签呈编号
    ,a.cbalancetypeid 	as 	settlement_id						--结算方式[结算方式]
    ,a.cpaytermid
    ,a.vdef10 as is_vdef10	--枚举值(未知保留)
    ,a.pk_group
    ,a.trevisetime
	
    ,b.dr
    ,SUBSTR(b.dbilldate,1,7)    AS month_dt
    ,a.ts as ts_char --子表只要变化主表就会变化
    ,CASE
        WHEN instr(c7.measrate,'/')>0 THEN
            CASE
                WHEN TO_NUMBER(substr(c7.measrate,1,instr(c7.measrate,'/')-1)) /
                     TO_NUMBER(substr(c7.measrate,instr(c7.measrate,'/')+1)) < 1
                THEN round(TO_NUMBER(substr(c7.measrate,instr(c7.measrate,'/')+1)) /
                     TO_NUMBER(substr(c7.measrate,1,instr(c7.measrate,'/')-1)),6)
                ELSE round(TO_NUMBER(substr(c7.measrate,1,instr(c7.measrate,'/')-1)) /
                     TO_NUMBER(substr(c7.measrate,instr(c7.measrate,'/')+1)),6)
            END
    END AS measure_ratio,
-- 1. d_profit_corp_sname
CASE
WHEN e.shortname = '深圳澳华' AND e1.name = '深圳海特料事业部' THEN '福建澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '深圳澳华' AND e1.name = '深圳水产料事业部' THEN '江门澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '深圳澳华' THEN '深圳海南'
WHEN e.shortname = '江西澳华' AND e1.name LIKE '荆州%' THEN '荆州事业部'
WHEN e.shortname = '洛阳澳华' AND e1.name in( '畜禽料一部', '畜禽料三部','畜禽料四部','甘肃销售部','猪料营销部','中原营销部', '畜禽料二部','畜禽价值交付部','陕西销售部') THEN '洛阳畜禽事业部'

WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('福建澳华销售部','深圳澳华海特料事业部' ) then '福建澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='江门澳华生物销售部' then '江门澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='湛江澳华销售部' then '湛江澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='浙江澳华销售部' then '浙江澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='湖南澳华销售部' then '湖南澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='深圳海南事业部' then '深圳海南'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='泰州澳华销售部' then '泰州澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='惠州澳华销售部' then '惠州澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='武汉汉南销售部' then '汉南澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='四会澳华销售部' then '四会澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('武汉澳华销售部','武汉小龙虾事业部','武汉澳华鱼料一部','武汉澳华鱼料三部')  then '武汉澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='广西澳华销售部' then '广西澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('淮安澳华销售部','淮安山东虾料事业部') then '淮安澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='江西澳华销售部' then '江西澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('洛阳澳华销售部','洛阳水产事业部','洛阳陕西事业部')  then '洛阳澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='南京澳华销售部' then '南京澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='荆州澳华销售部' then '荆州事业部'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='云南澳华销售部' then '云南澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='四川澳华销售部' then '四川澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='益阳澳华销售部' then '益阳澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('唐山澳华销售部','唐山澳华吉林水产部') then '唐山澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='贵州澳华销售部' then '贵州澳华'
WHEN e.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='岳阳澳华销售部' then '岳阳澳华'
ELSE e.shortname
END AS d_profit_corp_sname,
-- 2. d_profit_corp_code
CASE
WHEN e.shortname = '深圳澳华' AND e1.name = '深圳海特料事业部' THEN '1011'
WHEN e.shortname = '深圳澳华' AND e1.name = '深圳水产料事业部' THEN '1024'
WHEN e.shortname = '深圳澳华' THEN '4025'

from so_saleorder a
 left join so_saleorder_b b on a.csaleorderid=b.csaleorderid
 and b.ts>='${LAST2M_RUN_TIME1}' --往后再推2个月

--物料
 LEFT JOIN bd_material c ON b.cmaterialvid = c.pk_material
 LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c1 ON c.pk_marbasclass = c1.pk_marbasclass
 LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c2 ON c1.pk_parent = c2.pk_marbasclass
 LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c3 ON c2.pk_parent = c3.pk_marbasclass
 LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c4 ON c3.pk_parent = c4.pk_marbasclass
 left join bd_measdoc c5 --计量辅单位
 on b.castunitid=c5.pk_measdoc
 left join bd_measdoc c6 --计量主单位
 on b.cunitid=c6.pk_measdoc
LEFT JOIN BD_MATERIALCONVERT c7 --计量转换率
ON c.pk_material=c7.pk_material
             
 LEFT JOIN bd_defdoc h4
 ON h4.pk_defdoclist='1001A210000000CYT4V2' --产品线列表
 AND c2.code=h4.code----产品线主键
 
--客户
 left join bd_customer d on a.ccustomerid = d.pk_customer
 left join bd_custclass d1 --客户基本分类表
  on d.pk_custclass = d1.pk_custclass
 left join bd_custsale d2 --客户销售信息
 on a.ccustomerid  = d2.pk_customer and a.pk_org=d2.pk_org  and d2.dr='0' --使用公司+客户唯一限定
 left join bd_defdoc h6 --自定义档案:市场区域 
 on d2.def12 = h6.pk_defdoc
 
  
--区域
 left join org_corp e on a.pk_org = e.pk_corp
 left join org_dept_v e1 --部门版本信息
 on a.cdeptvid=e1.pk_vid
 
 left join org_stockorg e2 on b.csendstockorgid = e2.pk_stockorg
 left join bd_stordoc e3 on b.csendstordocid = e3.pk_stordoc

 
--人员用户
 left join bd_psndoc f1 --人员基本信息
   on a.cemployeeid=f1.pk_psndoc
 left join bd_psndoc f2 --销售经理 人员基本信息
   on a.vdef7=f2.pk_psndoc 
 left join bd_psndoc f3 --区域经理 人员基本信息
   on a.vdef8=f3.pk_psndoc
 left join bd_psndoc f4 --大区经理 人员基本信息
   on a.vdef9=f4.pk_psndoc

 left join sm_user g1 --用户 制单人 
   on a.billmaker=g1.cuserid
 left join sm_user g2 --用户 创建人
   on a.creator =g2.cuserid
 left join sm_user g3 --用户 修改人
   on a.modifier =g3.cuserid	
 left join sm_user g4 --用户 审批人
   on a.approver =g4.cuserid


--自定义档案
 left join bd_defdoc h1 --自定义档案3聚焦镇名称
 on a.vdef3 = h1.pk_defdoc
left join bd_defdoc h2 --自定义档案11供货时效
  on a.vdef11 = h2.pk_defdoc
left join bd_defdoc h3
  ON h3.pk_defdoclist='1001A210000000LNLNJW'
  and b.vbdef19=h3.pk_defdoc----提货方式
left join bd_defdoc h5 
  on c.def1 = h5.pk_defdoc
--其它	
left join bd_billtype o1 --单据类型
  on a.ctrantypeid = o1.pk_billtypeid
left join bd_channeltype o2 --渠道类型
  on a.cchanneltypeid = o2.pk_type
left join so_buylargess o3 --买赠
  on b.vbdef20 = o3.pk_buylargess
	
where a.ts>'${LAST_RUN_TIME1}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_so_cost
taskDefinitionList.description:
A销售成本结转单(ia_i5bill) ;B完工成本 (cm_prodcost) ，实时性M-1。
A跟C销售订单(so_saleorder)联动，只要C有订单生成，A就生成数据，成本金额会等B完工后再通过A计算当前库存成本，然后在更新最新的成本到A表中，至此完结。
A来源B，B是每月生产完工后记录成品或者配方的各科目系数成本，A则是记录销售的成品成本，若当月有销售无生产，则会找到最近一个月有生产的完工成本记录。

taskParams.sql:
select  
	 a.cbillid as socost_id --销售成本结转单表头主键
	,b.cbill_bid as socost_uid --销售成本结转单表体唯一主键
    ,b.vfirstcode as d_bill_code --ddh源头单据号
    ,b.vfirstrowno as order_row --源头单据行号:销售订单行号 
    ,b.crowno as socost_row --销售成本结转单行号
	,b.dbizdate	as bill_ts_char
	,a.cstockorgid	as d_corp_id
    ,c.code as d_corp_code
    ,c.name as d_corp_name
    ,c.shortname as d_corp_sname
     --d_profit_corp_id

          WHEN c.shortname = '深圳澳华' AND e1.name = '深圳海特料事业部' THEN '0001A410000000002MOM'

     -- d_profit_corp_sname
     ,CASE
          WHEN c.shortname = '深圳澳华' AND e1.name = '深圳海特料事业部' THEN '福建澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '深圳澳华' AND e1.name = '深圳水产料事业部' THEN '江门澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '深圳澳华' THEN '深圳海南'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江西澳华' AND e1.name LIKE '荆州%' THEN '荆州事业部'
          WHEN c.shortname = '洛阳澳华' AND e1.name in( '畜禽料一部', '畜禽料三部','畜禽料四部','甘肃销售部','猪料营销部','中原营销部', '畜禽料二部','畜禽价值交付部','陕西销售部') THEN '洛阳畜禽事业部'

          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('福建澳华销售部','深圳澳华海特料事业部' ) then '福建澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='江门澳华生物销售部' then '江门澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='湛江澳华销售部' then '湛江澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='浙江澳华销售部' then '浙江澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='湖南澳华销售部' then '湖南澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='深圳海南事业部' then '深圳海南'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='泰州澳华销售部' then '泰州澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='惠州澳华销售部' then '惠州澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='武汉汉南销售部' then '汉南澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='四会澳华销售部' then '四会澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('武汉澳华销售部','武汉小龙虾事业部','武汉澳华鱼料一部','武汉澳华鱼料三部')  then '武汉澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='广西澳华销售部' then '广西澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('淮安澳华销售部','淮安山东虾料事业部') then '淮安澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='江西澳华销售部' then '江西澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('洛阳澳华销售部','洛阳水产事业部','洛阳陕西事业部')  then '洛阳澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='南京澳华销售部' then '南京澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='荆州澳华销售部' then '荆州事业部'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='云南澳华销售部' then '云南澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='四川澳华销售部' then '四川澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='益阳澳华销售部' then '益阳澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name in('唐山澳华销售部','唐山澳华吉林水产部') then '唐山澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='贵州澳华销售部' then '贵州澳华'
          WHEN c.shortname = '江门澳保' and e1.name='岳阳澳华销售部' then '岳阳澳华'
          ELSE c.shortname
    END AS d_profit_corp_sname
    ,a.cdeptvid	as d_dept_vid	--部门版本主键[组织_部门版本信息]
    ,a.cdeptid		as d_dept_id 	--部门主键
    ,e1.code as d_dept_code
    ,e1.name as d_dept_name
	,b.cinventoryvid	as d_material_id
    ,d.code as d_material_code
    ,d.name as d_material_name
    ,d1.code as d_class_code6
    ,d1.name as d_class_name6
    ,d2.code as d_class_code4
    ,d2.name as d_class_name4
	
    ,p. pk_customer as d_client_id
    ,p.code  as d_client_code
    ,p.name  as d_client_name
    ,p1.code as d_cust_detail_code --户基本类型编码(K1,K2,K3,其它)
    ,p1.name as d_cust_detail_name
    ,a.cpsnid as d_salesman_id
    ,q1.code as d_salesman_code
    ,q1.name as d_salesman_name
	,case when d.code like '7%' then b.nastnum
                  else b.nnum end as f_num --主数量
	,case when d.code like '7%' then b.nnum
                  else b.nastnum end as f_second_num --辅数量

	,b.nmny as f_cost_amount --成本金额
	,case when d.code like '7%' 
			  then b.nprice*(1000/substr(d.materialspec,0,2))
              else b.nprice end as f_cost_ton --每吨成本单价
	,b.dr
	,substr(b.dbizdate, 0, 7) as month_dt
	,a.ts as ts_char
  from ia_i5bill a --销售成本结转单
  left join ia_i5bill_b b
    on a.cbillid = b.cbillid
    and b.ts>='${LAST2M_RUN_TIME2}'
  left join org_stockorg c
    on a.cstockorgid = c.pk_stockorg
  left join bd_material d
    on b.cinventoryvid = d.pk_material

  left join bd_marbasclass d1
    on d.pk_marbasclass = d1.pk_marbasclass
  left join bd_marbasclass d2
    on d1.pk_parent = d2.pk_marbasclass
  left join bd_customer p
    on a.ccustomerid =p.pk_customer 
  left join bd_custclass p1
    on p.pk_custclass=p1.pk_custclass
  left join bd_psndoc q1
    on a.cpsnid=q1.pk_psndoc     
  left join org_dept_v e1 --部门版本信息
    on a.cdeptvid=e1.pk_vid
where a.ts>'${LAST_RUN_TIME2}'

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dim_client
-- 主题域：客户维度
-- 说明：客户主数据维度表，整合组织、人员、区域、状态等信息
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 排序：无序（tuple）
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-09-16
-- 更新策略：全量覆盖
-- ==================================================
-- **drop table dim_client;**--
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_client

(
    d_region_code               String comment '大区编码',
    d_region_name               String comment '大区名称',
    d_corp_id                   FixedString(20) comment '公司ID',
    d_corp_code                 String comment '公司编码',
    d_corp_name                 String comment '公司名称',
    d_corp_sname                String comment '公司简称',
    d_unit_type                 String comment '单位类型',
    d_unit_id                   FixedString(20) comment '单位ID',
    d_unit_code                 String comment '单位编码',
    d_unit_name                 String comment '单位名称',
    d_unit_sname                String comment '单位简称',
    d_unit_lname                String comment '单位全称',
    d_dept_id                   FixedString(20) comment '部门ID',
    d_dept_code                 String comment '部门编码',
    d_dept_name                 String comment '部门名称',
    d_town_id                   FixedString(20) comment '片区ID',
    d_town_name                 String comment '片区名称',
    d_salesman_id               FixedString(20) comment '业务员ID',
    d_salesman_name             String comment '业务员名称',
    client_aera_id              FixedString(20) comment '客户区域ID',
    client_aera_code            String comment '客户区域编码',
    client_aera_name            String comment '客户区域名称',
    client_id_adress            String comment '客户详细地址',
    business_aera_id            String comment '经营区域主键',
    business_aera               String comment '经营区域',
    business_province           String comment '经营省份',
    business_city               String comment '经营市区',
    d_client_id                 FixedString(20) comment '客户ID',
    d_client_code               String comment '客户编码',
    d_client_stat_code          String comment '客户状态编码',
    d_client_name               String comment '客户名称',
    d_client_sname              String comment '客户简称',
    d_client_mobile             String comment '客户手机号',
    tax_code                    String comment '税号',
    is_corp_flag                Int8 comment '0个人户·1公司户2内部客户',
    is_corp_name                String comment '公司户[内部客户]  个人户 公司户   个人户[港澳台]   个人户[海外护照]    公司户[服务机构]  未知',

    general_flag                Int32 comment '是否一般纳税人标识',
    general_name                String comment '是否一般纳税人名称',
    product_name                String comment '主营产品',
    frozen_flag                 Int32 comment '冻结标识',
    frozen_name                 String comment '冻结状态名称',
    assign_flag                 Int32 comment '是否分配标识',
    assign_name                 String comment '是否分配名称',
    custclass_flag              Int32 comment '客户分类标识',
    custclass_name              String comment '客户分类名称',
    regist_flag                 Int32 comment '注册标识',
    regist_name                 String comment '注册名称',
    del_flag                    String comment '删除标识',
    del_name                    String comment '删除状态名称',
    custstatus_flag             Int32 comment '客户状态标识',
    custstatus_name             String comment '客户状态名称',
    unitbusi_flag               Int32 comment '单位业务标识',
    unitbusi_name               String comment '单位业务名称',
    corpbusi_flag               Int32 comment '公司业务标识',
    corpbusi_name               String comment '公司业务名称',
    start_status                Int32 comment '启用状态',
    client_dclass_code          String comment '客户分类编码',
    client_dclass_name          String comment '客户分类名称',
    client_updtime              String comment '客户更新时间',
    regist_starttime            String comment '注册开始时间',
    regist_endtime              String comment '注册结束时间',
    opening_date                String comment '开户日期',
    dept_status                 String comment '部门状态',
    town_status                 String comment '片区状态',
    salesman_status             String comment '业务员状态',
    client_class                String comment '客户等级',
    first_order_date            String comment '首单日期',
    d_main_prodline_name        String comment '主营产品线',
    f_main_sale_num             Int32 comment '主营销售数量',
    f_main_prodline_name_amounT String comment '主营产品线(金额)',
    f_main_sale_amount          Int32 comment '主营销售金额',
    f_main_sale_num_animal      Int32 comment '主营销售数量(动物)',
    d_main_class_code4          String comment '主营品类4编码',
    d_main_class_name4          String comment '主营品类4名称',
    f_main_class4_num           Int32 comment '主营品类4数量',
    f_main_class_code4_amount   String comment '主营品类4编码(金额)',
    f_main_class_name4_amount   String comment '主营品类4名称(金额)',
    f_main_class4_amount        Int32 comment '主营品类4金额',
    d_unit_sale_id              FixedString(20) comment '销售组织ID',
    d_unit_sale_code            String comment '销售组织编码',
    d_unit_sale_name            String comment '销售组织名称',
    d_unit_sale_lname           String comment '销售组织全称',
    updtime                     String comment '更新时间',
    original_unit_code          String comment '原始单位编码',
    original_unit_name          String comment '原始单位名称'

)
    engine = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
        comment '客户维度表：整合客户、组织、人员、区域等多维属性';

-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dim_supplier
-- 主题域：主数据_供应商维度字典
-- 来源系统：NC 系统（bd_supplier 及关联维度表）
-- 数据范围：全量有效供应商（dr = '0'）
-- 更新机制：MergeTree()，按主键排序，每日全量覆盖
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-12-05
-- ==================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_supplier
(
    d_supplier_id         FixedString(20) COMMENT '供应商主键（来自 bd_supplier.pk_supplier）',
    d_supplier_code       String COMMENT '供应商编码（来自 bd_supplier.code）',
    d_supplier_name       String COMMENT '供应商名称（来自 bd_supplier.name）',
    d_supplier_class_id   FixedString(20) COMMENT '供应商分类主键（来自 bd_supplierclass.pk_supplierclass）',
    d_supplier_class_code String COMMENT '供应商分类编码（来自 bd_supplierclass.code）',
    d_supplier_class_name String COMMENT '供应商分类名称（来自 bd_supplierclass.name）',
    taxpayer_id         String COMMENT '统一社会信用代码（来自 bd_supplier.taxpayerid）',
    mobile              String COMMENT '供应商手机号（来自 bd_supplier.tel1）',
    fax                 String COMMENT '传真（来自 bd_supplier.fax1）',
    country_name        String COMMENT '国家名称（来自 bd_countryzone.name）',
    province_name       String COMMENT '省份名称（来自 bd_region.name，关联 province）',
    city_name           String COMMENT '城市名称（来自 bd_region.name，关联 city）',
    district_name       String COMMENT '县区名称（来自 bd_region.name，关联 vsection）',
    address_detail      String COMMENT '详细地址（来自 bd_address.detailinfo）',
    areacl_name         String COMMENT '地区分类名称（来自 bd_areacl.name）',
    creator_name          String COMMENT '创建人姓名（来自 sm_user.user_name，关联 creator）',
    creation_ts           DateTime COMMENT '创建时间（来自 bd_supplier.creationtime）',
    modifier_name         String COMMENT '最后修改人姓名（来自 sm_user.user_name，关联 modifier）',
    modified_ts           DateTime COMMENT '最后修改时间（来自 bd_supplier.modifiedtime）',
    enable_state        String COMMENT '启用状态（1:未启用, 2:已启用, 3:已停用, 其他:状态异常）',
    d_supplier_attr       String COMMENT '供应商属性（自定义档案值，如原料/添加剂/五金等；来源 BD_DEFDOC.NAME，限定 PK_DEFDOCLIST=''1001A210000000AJB6FH''）'
)
ENGINE = MergeTree()
ORDER BY (d_supplier_id)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
COMMENT '供应商主数据字典表：整合基础信息、地址、分类及业务属性，供 DWD/DWS 层关联使用';

-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dim_supplier
-- 主题域：主数据_供应商维度字典
-- 来源系统：NC 系统（bd_supplier 及关联维度表）
-- 数据范围：全量有效供应商（dr = '0'）
-- 更新机制：MergeTree()，按主键排序，每日全量覆盖
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-12-05
-- ==================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_supplier
(
    d_supplier_id         FixedString(20) COMMENT '供应商主键（来自 bd_supplier.pk_supplier）',
    d_supplier_code       String COMMENT '供应商编码（来自 bd_supplier.code）',
    d_supplier_name       String COMMENT '供应商名称（来自 bd_supplier.name）',
    d_supplier_class_id   FixedString(20) COMMENT '供应商分类主键（来自 bd_supplierclass.pk_supplierclass）',
    d_supplier_class_code String COMMENT '供应商分类编码（来自 bd_supplierclass.code）',
    d_supplier_class_name String COMMENT '供应商分类名称（来自 bd_supplierclass.name）',
    taxpayer_id         String COMMENT '统一社会信用代码（来自 bd_supplier.taxpayerid）',
    mobile              String COMMENT '供应商手机号（来自 bd_supplier.tel1）',
    fax                 String COMMENT '传真（来自 bd_supplier.fax1）',
    country_name        String COMMENT '国家名称（来自 bd_countryzone.name）',
    province_name       String COMMENT '省份名称（来自 bd_region.name，关联 province）',
    city_name           String COMMENT '城市名称（来自 bd_region.name，关联 city）',
    district_name       String COMMENT '县区名称（来自 bd_region.name，关联 vsection）',
    address_detail      String COMMENT '详细地址（来自 bd_address.detailinfo）',
    areacl_name         String COMMENT '地区分类名称（来自 bd_areacl.name）',
    creator_name          String COMMENT '创建人姓名（来自 sm_user.user_name，关联 creator）',
    creation_ts           DateTime COMMENT '创建时间（来自 bd_supplier.creationtime）',
    modifier_name         String COMMENT '最后修改人姓名（来自 sm_user.user_name，关联 modifier）',
    modified_ts           DateTime COMMENT '最后修改时间（来自 bd_supplier.modifiedtime）',
    enable_state        String COMMENT '启用状态（1:未启用, 2:已启用, 3:已停用, 其他:状态异常）',
    d_supplier_attr       String COMMENT '供应商属性（自定义档案值，如原料/添加剂/五金等；来源 BD_DEFDOC.NAME，限定 PK_DEFDOCLIST=''1001A210000000AJB6FH''）'
)
ENGINE = MergeTree()
ORDER BY (d_supplier_id)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
COMMENT '供应商主数据字典表：整合基础信息、地址、分类及业务属性，供 DWD/DWS 层关联使用';

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_supplier_nc_1d
taskDefinitionList.description: dim_supplier供应商维度字典

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    A.pk_supplier AS d_supplier_id,
    A.code AS d_supplier_code,
    A.name AS d_supplier_name,
    J.pk_supplierclass AS d_supplier_class_id,
    J.code AS d_supplier_class_code,
    J.name AS d_supplier_class_name,
    A.taxpayerid AS taxpayer_id,
    A.tel1 AS mobile,
    A.fax1 AS fax,
    E.name AS country_name,
    F.name AS province_name,
    G.name AS city_name,
    H.name AS district_name,
    D.detailinfo AS address_detail,
    I.name AS areacl_name,
    B.user_name AS creator_name,
    A.creationtime AS creation_ts,
    C.user_name AS modifier_name,
    A.modifiedtime AS modified_ts,
    CASE 
        WHEN A.enablestate = 1 THEN '未启用'
        WHEN A.enablestate = 2 THEN '已启用'
        WHEN A.enablestate = 3 THEN '已停用'
        ELSE '状态异常'
    END AS enable_state,
    K.name AS d_supplier_attr
FROM bd_supplier A
LEFT JOIN sm_user B ON A.creator = B.cuserid
LEFT JOIN sm_user C ON A.modifier = C.cuserid
LEFT JOIN bd_address D ON A.corpaddress = D.pk_address
LEFT JOIN bd_countryzone E ON D.country = E.pk_country 
LEFT JOIN bd_region F ON D.province = F.pk_region
LEFT JOIN bd_region G ON D.city = G.pk_region
LEFT JOIN bd_region H ON D.vsection = H.pk_region
LEFT JOIN bd_areacl I ON A.pk_areacl = I.pk_areacl
LEFT JOIN bd_supplierclass J ON A.pk_supplierclass = J.pk_supplierclass
LEFT JOIN BD_DEFDOC K 
    ON A.def3 = K.PK_DEFDOC
    AND K.PK_DEFDOCLIST = '1001A210000000AJB6FH'
WHERE A.dr = '0'

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_bd_defdoc_nc_ddl
taskDefinitionList.description: 客户维表

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dim_bd_defdoc
-- 主题域：NC 系统基础档案定义表
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2026-01-05
-- 更新策略：全量覆盖
-- ==================================================
-- **drop table dim_bd_defdoc;**--
CREATE TABLE  if not exists dim_bd_defdoc
(
    code                String COMMENT '档案编码（唯一业务编码，如 ''RD001''）',
    creationtime        String COMMENT '创建时间（NC 原始字符串，格式如 ''2025-10-01 12:34:56''）',
    creator             FixedString(20) COMMENT '创建人主键（sm_user.pk_user）',
    dataoriginflag      String COMMENT '数据来源标志：0=手工录入，1=系统生成，2=接口导入',
    datatype            String COMMENT '数据类型：1=文本，2=数值，3=日期，4=布尔等（NC 内部定义）',
    enablestate         String COMMENT '启用状态：2=启用，3=停用（NC 特有状态码）',
    innercode           String COMMENT '内部编码（NC 内部使用，通常与 code 相同或为空）',
    memo                String COMMENT '备注信息',
    mnecode             String COMMENT '助记码（用于快速检索）',
    modifiedtime        String COMMENT '最后修改时间（NC 原始字符串）',
    modifier            String COMMENT '修改人主键（sm_user.pk_user）',
    name                String COMMENT '档案名称（主语言，如中文）',
    name2               String COMMENT '档案名称（第二语言，如英文）',
    pid                 String COMMENT '父级档案主键（用于树形结构，如分类层级）',
    pk_defdoc           FixedString(20) COMMENT '档案主键（对应 NC 表 pk_defdoc，固定20字节）',
    pk_defdoclist       FixedString(20) COMMENT '档案明细行主键（对应 NC 表 pk_defdoclist，固定20字节）',
    pk_group            FixedString(20) COMMENT '集团主键（org_group.pk_group）',
    pk_org              String COMMENT '组织主键（org_orgs.pk_org）',
    shortname           String COMMENT '简称（主语言）',
    shortname2          String COMMENT '简称（第二语言）',
    shortname6          String COMMENT '超短名称（常用于打印或界面紧凑显示）',
    
    -- 自定义字段（通常对应 NC 单据上的 vfree1~vfree9，存储扩展属性）
    def1                LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段1',
    def2                LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段2',
    def3                LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段3',
    def4                LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段4',
    def5                LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段5',
    def6                LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段6',
    def7                LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段7',
    def8                LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段8',
    def9                LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段9',
    dr                  String COMMENT '逻辑删除标记：''0''=有效，''1''=删除（NC 标准字段）',
    ts_char                  String COMMENT 'NC 时间戳（字符串格式，用于增量捕获或全量比对）',
    ts               DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(ts_char) 
                        COMMENT 'ts_char 的物化 DateTime 列，用于 WHERE 条件加速（如 ts_dt >= ''2025-01-01''）'
)
ENGINE = MergeTree()
ORDER BY (pk_defdoc, pk_defdoclist)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_stordoc_nc_ddl
taskDefinitionList.description: 仓库维表

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dim_stordoc
-- 主题域：系统仓库档案表（bd_stordoc）
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2026-01-06
-- 更新策略：全量覆盖
-- PK_STORDOC='1001A210000000RZ9NH5' 江门生物核心原料仓 为机密仓需要过滤
-- ==================================================
-- **drop table dim_stordoc;**--
CREATE TABLE  if not exists dim_stordoc
(
    code                    String COMMENT '仓库编码（如 ''WH001''）',
    creationtime            String COMMENT '创建时间（NC原始字符串）',
    creator                 FixedString(20) COMMENT '创建人主键',
    csflag                  String COMMENT 'CS标志（NC内部业务标识）',
    dataoriginflag          String COMMENT '数据来源：0=手工，1=系统，2=接口',
    enablestate             String COMMENT '启用状态：2=启用，3=停用',
    gubflag                 String COMMENT 'GUB标志（集团统一业务标识）',
    isagentstore            String COMMENT '是否代销仓：''Y''/''N''',
    isatpaffected           String COMMENT '是否参与ATP计算：''Y''/''N''',
    iscalculatedinvcost     String COMMENT '是否计算库存成本：''Y''/''N''',
    iscommissionout         String COMMENT '是否委外仓：''Y''/''N''',
    isdirectstore           String COMMENT '是否直发仓：''Y''/''N''',
    isobligate              String COMMENT '是否必选仓库：''Y''/''N''',
    isretail                String COMMENT '是否零售仓：''Y''/''N''',
    isshopstore             String COMMENT '是否门店仓：''Y''/''N''',
    isstoreontheway         String COMMENT '是否在途仓：''Y''/''N''',
    memo                    String COMMENT '备注',
    modifiedtime            String COMMENT '最后修改时间（NC原始字符串）',
    modifier                String COMMENT '修改人主键',
    mrpflag                 String COMMENT 'MRP标志（是否参与MRP运算）',
    name                    String COMMENT '仓库名称（主语言）',
    name2                   String COMMENT '仓库名称（第二语言）',
    name3                   String COMMENT '仓库名称（第三语言，如本地化名称）',
    operatesupplier         String COMMENT '运营供应商编码或主键',
    phone                   String COMMENT '联系电话',
    pk_address              FixedString(20) COMMENT '地址主键（关联地址档案）',
    pk_group                FixedString(20) COMMENT '集团主键',
    pk_org                  FixedString(20) COMMENT '组织主键',
    pk_stordoc              FixedString(20) COMMENT '仓库档案主键（唯一标识）',
    principalcode           String COMMENT '负责人编码',
    proflag                 String COMMENT '项目标志（是否项目仓）',
    storaddr                String COMMENT '仓库地址（文本描述）',
    iskptaxstore            String COMMENT '是否开票税务仓：''Y''/''N''',
    profitcentre            String COMMENT '利润中心编码',
    
    -- 自定义字段（通常对应 vdef1/vdef2）
    def1                    LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段1（如区域、温区等）',
    def2                    LowCardinality(String) COMMENT '自定义字段2',
    
    dr                      String COMMENT '逻辑删除标记：''0''=有效，''1''=删除',
    ts_char                  String COMMENT 'NC 时间戳（字符串格式，用于增量捕获或全量比对）',
    ts               DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(ts_char) 
                        COMMENT 'ts_char 的物化 DateTime 列，用于 WHERE 条件加速（如 ts_dt >= ''2025-01-01''）'
)
ENGINE = MergeTree()
-- 按唯一主键排序，支持快速点查
ORDER BY (pk_stordoc)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_bd_defdoclist_nc_ddl

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dim_bd_defdoclist
-- 主题域：NC 系统基础档案自定义列表
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2026-01-05
-- 更新策略：全量覆盖
-- ==================================================
-- **drop table dim_bd_defdoclist;**--
CREATE TABLE  if not exists dim_bd_defdoclist
(
    associatename       String COMMENT '关联名称（如关联的业务对象名称）',
    bpfcomponentid      String COMMENT 'BPF组件ID（NC内部使用）',
    code                String COMMENT '档案明细编码（如 ''RD001-01''）',
    codectlgrade        String COMMENT '编码控制级别（NC内部逻辑）',
    coderule            String COMMENT '编码规则（如前缀+流水号）',
    componentid         String COMMENT '组件ID（NC UI 或逻辑组件标识）',
    creationtime        String COMMENT '创建时间（NC原始字符串，格式如 ''2025-10-01 12:34:56''）',
    creator             FixedString(20) COMMENT '创建人主键（sm_user.pk_user）',
    dataoriginflag      String COMMENT '数据来源标志：0=手工，1=系统，2=接口',
    docclass            String COMMENT '文档分类（如 ''freeitem'', ''material_class''）',
    doclevel            String COMMENT '文档层级（用于树形结构深度）',
    doctype             String COMMENT '文档类型（如 ''list'', ''tree''）',
    funcode             String COMMENT '功能编码（NC模块标识）',
    isgrade             String COMMENT '是否分级：''Y''/''N'' 或 ''1''/''0''',
    isrelease           String COMMENT '是否已发布：''Y''/''N''',
    mngctlmode          String COMMENT '管理控制模式（如审批流、版本控制等）',
    modifiedtime        String COMMENT '最后修改时间（NC原始字符串）',
    modifier            FixedString(20) COMMENT '修改人主键（sm_user.pk_user）',
    name                String COMMENT '明细名称（主语言）',
    name2               String COMMENT '明细名称（第二语言，如英文）',
    pk_defdoclist       FixedString(20) COMMENT '档案明细主键（唯一标识，对应 NC 表 pk_defdoclist）',
    pk_group            FixedString(20) COMMENT '集团主键（org_group.pk_group）',
    pk_org              FixedString(20) COMMENT '组织主键（org_orgs.pk_org）',
    dr                  String COMMENT '逻辑删除标记：''0''=有效，''1''=删除',
    ts_char                  String COMMENT 'NC时间戳（字符串格式，用于增量比对）',
    
    -- 物化列：从 ts 自动解析为 DateTime，用于高效时间过滤
    -- INSERT 时无需提供，ClickHouse 自动计算
    ts               DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(ts_char)
                        COMMENT 'ts_char 的物化 DateTime 列，支持高效范围查询（如 WHERE ts_dt >= ''2025-01-01''）'        
)
ENGINE = MergeTree()
ORDER BY  pk_defdoclist
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_client_fr_1d
taskDefinitionList.description: dim_client 客户表

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    -- ================== 区域维度 ==================
    REGION_CODE               AS d_region_code,
    REGION_NAME               AS d_region_name,

    -- ================== 公司维度 ==================
    CORP_PK                   AS d_corp_id,
    CORP_CODE                 AS d_corp_code,
    CORP_NAME                 AS d_corp_name,
    CORP_SNAME                AS d_corp_sname,

    -- ================== 单位维度 ==================
    UNIT_TYPE                 AS d_unit_type,
    UNIT_PK                   AS d_unit_id,
    UNIT_CODE                 AS d_unit_code,
    UNIT_NAME                 AS d_unit_name,
    UNIT_SNAME                AS d_unit_sname,
    UNIT_LNAME                AS d_unit_lname,

    -- ================== 部门维度 ==================
    DEPT_PK                   AS d_dept_id,
    DEPT_CODE                 AS d_dept_code,
    DEPT_NAME                 AS d_dept_name,

    -- ================== 片区维度 ==================
    TOWN_PK                   AS d_town_id,

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_bd_custsale_nc_2h
taskDefinitionList.description: 客户销售信息 (bd_custsale)

taskParams.sql:
select
    a.billingcust
     ,a.channel
     ,a.creationtime
     ,a.creator
     ,a.currencydefault
     ,a.dataoriginflag
     ,a.discountrate
     ,a.issuecust
     ,a.modifiedtime
     ,a.modifier
     ,a.ordertypedefault
     ,a.paytermdefault
     ,a.pk_customer
     ,a.pk_custsale
     ,a.pk_custsaleclass
     ,a.pk_financeorg
     ,a.pk_group
     ,a.pk_liabilitycenter
     ,a.pk_org
     ,a.pk_paycust
     ,a.pk_receiveorg
     ,a.pk_tradeterm
     ,a.prepaidratio
     ,a.respdept
     ,a.respperson
     ,a.shippingtype
     ,a.stockpriceratio
     ,a.def1
     ,a.def10
     ,a.def11
     ,a.def12 as pk_area
     ,b.code as area_code
     ,b.name as area_name
     ,a.def13
     ,a.def2
     ,a.def3
     ,a.def4
     ,a.def5
     ,a.def6
     ,a.def7
     ,a.def8
     ,a.def9
     ,a.dr
     ,a.ts

from bd_custsale a --客户销售信息
         left join bd_defdoc b --自定义档案:市场区域
                   on a.def12 = b.pk_defdoc

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_bd_custsale_nc_ddl
taskDefinitionList.description: 客户销售信息 (bd_custsale)

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dim_bd_custsale
-- 主题域： 客户销售信息 (bd_custsale)
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2026-01-20
-- 更新策略：全量覆盖
-- ==================================================
-- **drop table dim_bd_custsale;**--
    CREATE TABLE  if not exists dim_bd_custsale
(
    billingcust          String COMMENT '开票客户[客户基本信息]',
    channel              String COMMENT '渠道类型[渠道类型]',
    creationtime         String COMMENT '创建日期',
    creator              String COMMENT '创建人[用户]',
    currencydefault      String COMMENT '默认交易币种[币种]',
    dataoriginflag       Int32 COMMENT '分布式(0=本级产生，1=上级下发，2=下级上报，3=本级产生已上报下发，-1=系统预置， ？)',
    discountrate         Decimal(20, 8) COMMENT '扣率',
    issuecust            String COMMENT '收货客户[客户基本信息]',
    modifiedtime         String COMMENT '最后修改日期',
    modifier             String COMMENT '最后修改人[用户]',
    ordertypedefault     String COMMENT '默认订单类型[单据类型 ]',
    paytermdefault       String COMMENT '默认收款协议[收款协议]',
    pk_customer          String COMMENT '客户基本信息[客户基本信息]',
    pk_custsale          String COMMENT '客户销售信息主键[主键]',
    pk_custsaleclass     String COMMENT '客户销售分类[客户销售分类]',
    pk_financeorg        String COMMENT '结算财务组织[组织_业务单元_财务组织]',
    pk_group             String COMMENT '所属集团[组织_集团]',
    pk_liabilitycenter   String COMMENT '利润中心[组织_业务单元_利润中心]',
    pk_org               String COMMENT '所属销售组织[组织_业务单元_销售组织]',
    pk_paycust           String COMMENT '付款客户[客户基本信息]',
    pk_receiveorg        String COMMENT '应收组织[组织_业务单元_财务组织]',
    pk_tradeterm         String COMMENT '贸易术语[贸易术语]',
    prepaidratio         Float64 COMMENT '预收款比例',
    respdept             String COMMENT '专管部门[组织_部门]',
    respperson           String COMMENT '专管业务员[人员基本信息]',
    shippingtype         String COMMENT '运输方式[运输方式]',
    stockpriceratio      Float64 COMMENT '物料最低售价比例',
    def1                 String COMMENT '自定义项1(预留字段)',
    def10                String COMMENT '自定义项10(日期)',
    def11                String COMMENT '自定义项11(日期)',
    pk_area              String COMMENT '自定义项12（区域or聚焦镇主键）',
    area_code            String COMMENT '自定义表（区域or聚焦镇编码bd_defdoc.code）',
    area_name            String COMMENT '自定义表（区域or聚焦镇名称bd_defdoc.name）',
    def13                String COMMENT '自定义项13(预留字段)',
    def2                 String COMMENT '自定义项2(固定编码)',
    def3                 String COMMENT '自定义项3(固定编码)',
    def4                 String COMMENT '自定义项4(固定编码)',
    def5                 String COMMENT '聚焦镇主键(缺失)',
    def6                 String COMMENT '自定义项6(固定编码)',
    def7                 String COMMENT '自定义项7(固定编码)',
    def8                 String COMMENT '核算单位主键',
    def9                 String COMMENT '分配状态(枚举值：Y，N)',
    dr                   String COMMENT '关闭或删除标志(1未关闭；0关闭)',
    ts                   String COMMENT '关闭或删除时间',
    updtime              String COMMENT '数据更新时间(抽数时间)'
)
    ENGINE = MergeTree()
        ORDER BY (pk_custsale,pk_customer, pk_org)
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
        COMMENT '客户销售信息表（nc.bd_custsale nc.bd_defdoc）';

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dim_fx_organization
-- 主题域： 纷享销客组织架构
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2026-01-21
-- 更新策略：增量实时同步
-- ==================================================
-- **drop table dim_fx_organization;**--
CREATE TABLE  if not exists dim_fx_organization
(
    organization_uid String comment 'OA组织架构唯一主键',
    d_parent_id      String comment '父级OAid',
    d_desc_name      String comment '简称',
    d_name           String comment '名称',
    d_nc_id          String comment '组织NCid',
    d_org_type       String comment '组织类型  1公司 2区域（聚焦镇） 3部门',
    d_crm_corpid     String comment 'crm公司id',
    d_crm_deptid     String comment 'crm部门ID',
    d_crmid          String comment '组织crmid',
    dr               String comment '0：未删除，1：删除',
    ts               DateTime comment 'NC 系统最后同步时间戳（用于增量捕获）',
    insert_ts        DateTime default now() comment '自动生成写入时间',
    d_code           String comment '编码'
)
    engine = ReplacingMergeTree(ts)
        ORDER BY organization_uid
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
        COMMENT '纷享销客组织架构' ;

    -- 客户类型与战略属性
    d_client_type      String,

    -- 预算与预测（视图中存在的字段）
    f_budget_qty       Decimal(18, 6),
    f_forecast_qty     Decimal(18, 6),

    -- 状态与时间
    dr                 String,
    ts                 DateTime,
    this_year          UInt16,
    insert_ts          DateTime
)
PRIMARY KEY d_corp_id, d_client_id
SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(
    HOST '10.113.226.23'
    PORT 9000
    USER 'root'

taskDefinitionList.name: dict_product_cost_ratio_dict
taskDefinitionList.description: 成本系数字典表：公司+物料

taskParams.sql:
CREATE DICTIONARY IF NOT EXISTS dict_product_cost_ratio_dict
(
    d_corp_id              String,
    d_product_id           String,

    manufacture_cost_ratio Decimal(18,6) DEFAULT 0,
    material_cost_ratio    Decimal(18,6) DEFAULT 0,
    packaging_cost_ratio   Decimal(18,6) DEFAULT 0
)
    PRIMARY KEY d_corp_id, d_product_id
    SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(
            HOST '10.113.226.23'
            PORT 9000
            USER 'root'
            PASSWORD 'FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY'
            QUERY '
        SELECT
            d_corp_id,
            d_product_id,
            if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty) = 0, 0, divide(sum(f_cost_01_total), sum(f_cost_total)))          AS manufacture_cost_ratio,
            if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty) = 0, 0, divide(sum(f_cost_formula_cost), sum(f_cost_total)))       AS material_cost_ratio,
            if(sum(f_product_sum12_qty) = 0, 0, divide(sum(f_cost_0203_total), sum(f_cost_total)))         AS packaging_cost_ratio
        FROM dws_product_subject_cost
        WHERE biz_mth = ''2026-01''
        GROUP BY d_corp_id, d_product_id
    '
           ))
    LAYOUT(HASHED())
    LIFETIME(300) ;  -- 每5分钟自动刷新一次，可根据需要调整为 60 / 3600 等

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_material_uat_nc_2h
taskDefinitionList.description: dim_material_uat物料表

taskParams.sql:
WITH TEMP_MATERIAL as(
    SELECT
        A.PK_MATERIAL MATERIAL_PK_V --物料主键版本
         ,A.PK_SOURCE MATERIAL_PK --物料主键（原始）
         ,A.pk_mattaxes MATERIALTAX_PK--物料税率主键
         ,A.ENABLESTATE ASSIGN_STATUS--物料分配状态(1未启用,2已启用,3已停用)
         ,CASE WHEN A.ENABLESTATE=1 THEN '未启用'
               WHEN A.ENABLESTATE=2 THEN '已启用'
               WHEN A.ENABLESTATE=3 THEN '已停用'
        END AS ASSIGN_STATUS_NAME --物料分配状态
         ,A.CODE MATERIAL_CODE  --物料编码
         ,A.NAME MATERIAL_NAME  --物料名称
         ,A.MATERIALSHORTNAME MATERIAL_SNAME--物料简称
         ,CASE WHEN A.CODE LIKE '7%' THEN 7 ELSE 0 END AS MEASURE_FLAG --主单位标记
         ,CASE WHEN A.CODE LIKE '7%' THEN 0 ELSE 7  END AS SECOND_MEASURE_FLAG --辅单位标记
         ,A.MATERIALSPEC MATERIAL_SPEC --物料规格
         ,A.MATERIALTYPE MATERIAL_TYPE --物料型号
         ,A.PK_PRODLINE 			AS PRODLINE_PK   --产品线主键
         ,A.CREATIONTIME
         ,A.MODIFIEDTIME
         ,A.PK_MARBASCLASS
         ,A.TS
         ,A.DEF1
         ,A.DEF2 AS CORP_PK
         ,A.DEF3
         ,A.DEF4
         ,A.DEF6
         ,A.DEF8
         ,A.DEF9
         ,A.DEF14
         ,A.DEF16
         ,A.PK_MEASDOC
         ,A.PK_BRAND
         ,a.latest --是否最新版本
         ,a.version


/*
--SELECT corp_code,CORP_NAME,corp_pk,corp_sname
--FROM dim_unit
--WHERE org_type = '公司'
--  AND CORP_NAME IN (
--               '江门市澳保生物科技有限公司',
--               '南京市澳华生物科技有限公司',
--               '福建澳华农牧科技有限公司',

--               '泰州市澳华农牧科技有限公司',

--               '岳阳澳华农牧科技有限公司',
--               '惠州市澳华饲料有限公司',
--               '洛阳澳华饲料有限公司',
--               '武汉澳华农牧科技有限公司',
--               '赣州澳华农牧有限公司',
--                '广西澳华农牧科技有限公司',
