    d_product_spec    String comment '材料规格',
    d_product_type    String comment '材料型号',
    f_product_qty     Decimal(18, 6) comment '产成品/配方产量',
    f_cost_amount     Decimal(18, 6) comment '产成品/配方成本',
    biz_mth               String comment '更新时间:YYYY-MM -1个月,即业务日期比更新日期延迟一个月'，
    updt                  Date comment '更新时间:YYYY-MM-DD'
)
    engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(updt)
        ORDER BY (updt, d_corp_id, d_product_id, subject_uid)
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
		comment '成品配方各科目成本';

taskDefinitionList.name: 2.8create_table_ddwd_prm_promoteprice_detail_ysnap
taskDefinitionList.description: NC促销价格明细表：按年分区快照

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：ck.dwd_prm_promoteprice_detail_ysnap
-- 主题域：财务-促销价格
-- 来源: NC 促销价格表 prm_promoteprice
--       关联维表：bd_balatype（结算方式）, bd_currtype（币种）
-- 分区：按 year_dt 分区（基于生效日期 dbegindate 的年份）
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-09-15
-- 更新策略：
--   - 每日调度执行
--   - 先删除当年分区 year_dt
--   - 插入今年最新全量或增量数据（按 ts >= 当年1月1日过滤）
-- ==================================================
--※※drop table dwd_prm_promoteprice_detail_ysnap;※※※※※※--
--drop table dwd_prm_promoteprice_detail_ysnap;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_prm_promoteprice_detail_ysnap (
    uniq_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '主键 pk_promoteprice',
    d_corp_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '公司ID',
    d_corp_code String COMMENT '公司编码',
    d_corp_name String COMMENT '公司名称',
    d_corp_sale_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '销售组织ID',
    d_tariff_def_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '价目表ID',
    d_belong_sale_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '价目表所属销售组织ID',
    d_channel_type_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '渠道类型ID',
	
    d_material_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '物料ID',
    d_material_code String COMMENT '物料编码',
    d_material_name String COMMENT '物料名称',
    d_material_inner_code String COMMENT '物料分类内部码',
	
    d_client_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '客户ID',
    d_client_code String COMMENT '客户编码',
    d_client_name String COMMENT '客户名称',
    d_customer_inner_code String COMMENT '客户分类内部码',
	
	
    d_measure_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '计量单位ID',
    d_price_type_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '价格项ID',
    d_curr_type_code String COMMENT '币种',
    d_ask_uni_code String COMMENT '询价优先码',


    -- 指标字段

    f_price_factor Decimal(28,8) DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT '价格指数',
    f_price_prompt Decimal(28,8) DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT '促销价',
    f_price Decimal(28,8) DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT '新价格',

    -- 时间字段
    begin_date Date COMMENT '生效日期',
    end_date FixedString(19) COMMENT '失效日期',
    closed_time FixedString(19) COMMENT '关闭时间',
    create_date FixedString(19) COMMENT '创建日期',
    update_date FixedString(19) COMMENT '更新日期',
    rn UInt8 COMMENT '序号：在未关闭状态下，最近一次更新排前面',

    -- 其他
    vsrcsys String DEFAULT 'NC' COMMENT '来源系统',
    vsrcsysid FixedString(20) COMMENT '来源系统主键ID',
    limit_model_flag String COMMENT '限量模式',
    adj_promote_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '促销价格调整单主表ID',
    adj_promote_b_id FixedString(20) COMMENT '促销价格调整单子表ID',
    is_relate_base FixedString(1) COMMENT '是否与基价相关 Y是 N否',
    is_closed FixedString(1) COMMENT '是否关闭 Y是 N否',
    dr FixedString(1) COMMENT '删除标记 0未删 1删除：过期 dr删除0或者关闭Y均视为删除',

    -- 分区字段
    year_dt UInt16 COMMENT '年份（基于生效日期 begin_date）'
) ENGINE = MergeTree
PARTITION BY year_dt
ORDER BY (d_material_id, d_client_id, d_corp_id, begin_date)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
COMMENT 'NC促销价格明细表：按年分区快照';

taskDefinitionList.name: 2.7create_table_dwd_plcy_discount_detail_ysnap
taskDefinitionList.description: 客户销售政策返利表：年快照

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：ck.dwd_plcy_discount_detail_ysnap
-- 主题域：财务-返利
-- 来源:nc 返利政策 sr_plcy --     物料：sr_plcy_mar主表 sr_marcombine 组合主表 sr_marcombine_b组合子表
--     计算规则：sr_plcy_calrule主表 sr_plcy_caldet返利明细（含阶梯明细数据rn=1则取的为最）
--     其他维表：org_orgs 组织  sr_plcy_cust返利客户 bd_customer客户维表 bd_billtype单据类型 bd_marbasclass物料分类
-- 分区：按 year_dt分区这个是政策表上的业务日期，每年会制定一次返利政策，形成返利政策年快照表
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-09-11
-- 更新策略：
--   - 每日调度执行
--   - 先删除当年分区year_dt
--   - 插入今年最新全量数据
-- ==================================================
--※※drop table dwd_plcy_discount_detail_ysnap;※※※※※※--
--drop table dwd_plcy_discount_detail_ysnap;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_plcy_discount_detail_ysnap 
(
    d_corp_id           FixedString(20) comment '公司id',
    d_corp_code         String comment '公司编码',
    d_corp_name         String comment '公司',
    d_client_id         FixedString(20) comment '客户id',
    d_client_code       String comment '客户编码',
    d_client_name       String comment '客户名称',
    d_plcytype_id       FixedString(20) comment '政策项目id',
    d_plcytypename      String comment '政策项目',
    d_plcy_id           FixedString(20) comment '返利政策主实体id',
    d_plcy_code         String comment '政策编号',
    d_plcy_name         String comment '政策名称',
    d_mar_combine_name  String comment '物料组合名称',
    d_mar_dim_flag      UInt8 comment '归类=物料维度指标设定方式 0=全部物料，1=产品线，2=品牌，3=物料基本分类，4=物料销售分类，5=物料，6=物料组合',
    d_mar_dim_flagname  String comment '物料维度标志名称',
    d_material_dim      String comment '物料维度设定',
    bremoveflag         String          default '' comment 'Y排除 N保留 默认保留，原为Nullable',
    d_material_dim_id   FixedString(20) default '' comment '物料维度设定主键',
    d_material_dim_code String comment '物料维度设定编码',
    d_material_dim_name String comment '物料维度设定名称',
    d_class_id          FixedString(20) default '' comment '2 4 6位分类ID，为空则代表物料（原Nullable）',
    d_material_id       FixedString(20) default '' comment '物料主键，为空则代表分类（原Nullable）',
    f_total_disamt      Decimal(18, 4)  default 0. comment '已返利金额，原为Nullable',
    f_total_max_disamt  Decimal(18, 4) comment '返利金额上限',
    f_min_disqty        Decimal(18, 4)  default 0. comment '下限数量(吨)，原为Nullable',
    f_max_disqty        Decimal(18, 4)  default 0. comment '上限数量(吨)，原为Nullable',
    f_disprice_ton      Decimal(18, 4)  default 0. comment '折扣金额(元/吨)，原为Nullable',
    f_disprice_real_ton Decimal(18, 4)  default 0. comment '实际折扣金额(元/吨)，带负号可以抵消，原为Nullable',
    dmakedate           Date comment '申请日期',
    vnote               String          default '' comment '政策描述，原为Nullable',
    fstatusflag         UInt8 comment '返利政策状态 0=自由，1=审批中，2=审批不通过，3=审批通过，5=关闭',
    dbegindate          Date comment '生效日期',
    denddate            Date comment '失效日期',
    fperiodflag         UInt8 comment '执行周期=返利周期 0=月，1=季，2=半年，3=年，4=非周期',
    fprmtypeflag        UInt8 comment '促销参与返利方式 1=计量计奖，2=不计量不计奖，3=计量不计奖，4=自定义',
    year_dt             UInt16 comment '年度'
)
    engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY year_dt
        ORDER BY (d_material_dim, d_client_id, d_material_dim_id, d_class_id, d_material_id)
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
        comment '客户销售政策返利表：年快照';

taskDefinitionList.name: 2.9create_table_dwd_cust_rebate_actual_m
taskDefinitionList.description: NC促销价格明细表：按年分区快照

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：ck.dwd_cust_rebate_actual_m
-- 主题域：财务-返利
-- 来源：NC 系统 so_arsub（销售费用单）
--   so_arsub_b（销售费用单子表）
--   sr_settle_b（返利结算单子实体）
--   sr_settle（返利结算单主实体）
--    客户 物料 组织 部门核算单位 等维表
-- 说明：客户返利实际兑付明细，基于费用单审核数据生成
-- 分区：按 biz_mth 分区（业务月份）
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-09-16
-- 更新策略：
--   - 每日调度执行
--   - 支持按 biz_mth 覆盖重刷
-- ==================================================
--**drop table dwd_cust_rebate_actual_m;**--
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_cust_rebate_actual_m
(
    prm_uid             String COMMENT '唯一主键 (carsubid)',

    d_corp_id           FixedString(20) COMMENT '财务组织ID',
    d_corp_code         String COMMENT '财务组织编码',
    d_corp_name         String COMMENT '财务组织名称',
    d_corp_sname        String COMMENT '财务组织简称',

    d_billtype_code     String COMMENT '单据类型编码',
    d_billtype_name     String COMMENT '单据类型名称',

    d_client_id         FixedString(20) COMMENT '客户ID',
    d_client_code       String COMMENT '客户编码',
    d_client_name       String COMMENT '客户名称',

    d_unit_id           FixedString(20) COMMENT '核算单位ID',
    d_unit_code         String COMMENT '核算单位编码',
    d_unit_name         String COMMENT '核算单位名称',

    d_dept_id           FixedString(20) COMMENT '部门ID',
    d_dept_code         String COMMENT '部门编码',
    d_dept_name         String COMMENT '部门名称',

    d_material_id       FixedString(20) COMMENT '物料ID',
    d_material_code     String COMMENT '物料编码',
    d_material_name     String COMMENT '物料名称',

    f_rebate_amt        Decimal(18, 4) DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT '返利金额（实际值，元）',
    f_payout_amt        Decimal(18, 4) DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT '兑付金额（实际值，元）',
    f_rebate_price      Decimal(18, 4) DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT '返利单价（理论值，元）',
    f_rebate_qty        Decimal(18, 4) DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT '返利数量（理论值，吨）',
    f_rebate_settle_amt Decimal(18, 4) DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT '结算单返利金额（理论值，元）',

    line_number         Int32 COMMENT '行号',
    note                String COMMENT '备注',

    prm_billcode        String COMMENT '销售费用单单据号',
    settle_billcode     String COMMENT '返利结算单单据号',

    audit_mth           String COMMENT '审核月份 (YYYY-MM)',
    biz_mth             String COMMENT '业务月份 (YYYY-MM)',

    dw_load_dt          DateTime DEFAULT now() COMMENT '数据加载时间'
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
PARTITION BY biz_mth
ORDER BY (d_corp_id, d_client_id, d_material_id,d_material_code,prm_billcode,settle_billcode)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
COMMENT '客户返利实际兑付明细事实表';

taskDefinitionList.name: 1.6create_table_dim_client
taskDefinitionList.description: 物料配方月快照表

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dim_client
-- 主题域：客户维度
-- 说明：客户主数据维度表，整合组织、人员、区域、状态等信息
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 排序：无序（tuple）
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-09-16
-- 更新策略：全量覆盖
-- ==================================================
-- **drop table dim_client;**--
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_client
(
    -- ================== 区域维度 ==================
    d_region_code               String COMMENT '大区编码',
    d_region_name               String COMMENT '大区名称',

    -- ================== 公司维度 ==================
    d_corp_id                   FixedString(20) COMMENT '公司ID',
    d_corp_code                 String          COMMENT '公司编码',
    d_corp_name                 String          COMMENT '公司名称',
    d_corp_sname                String          COMMENT '公司简称',

    -- ================== 单位维度 ==================
    d_unit_type                 String          COMMENT '单位类型',
    d_unit_id                   FixedString(20) COMMENT '单位ID',
    d_unit_code                 String          COMMENT '单位编码',
    d_unit_name                 String          COMMENT '单位名称',
    d_unit_sname                String          COMMENT '单位简称',
    d_unit_lname                String          COMMENT '单位全称',

    -- ================== 部门维度 ==================
    d_dept_id                   FixedString(20) COMMENT '部门ID',
    d_dept_code                 String          COMMENT '部门编码',
    d_dept_name                 String          COMMENT '部门名称',

    -- ================== 片区维度 ==================
    d_town_id                   FixedString(20) COMMENT '片区ID',
    d_town_name                 String          COMMENT '片区名称',

    -- ================== 业务员维度 ==================
    d_salesman_id               FixedString(20) COMMENT '业务员ID',
    d_salesman_name             String          COMMENT '业务员名称',

    -- ================== 客户区域 ==================
    client_aera_id            FixedString(20) COMMENT '客户区域ID',
    client_aera_code          String          COMMENT '客户区域编码',
    client_aera_name          String          COMMENT '客户区域名称',

    -- ================== 客户基本信息 ==================
    client_id_adress          String COMMENT '客户详细地址',
  business_aera_id            String COMMENT '经营区域主键',
    business_aera             String COMMENT '经营区域',
    business_province         String COMMENT '经营省份',
    business_city             String COMMENT '经营市区',

    d_client_id                 FixedString(20) COMMENT '客户ID',
    d_client_code               String          COMMENT '客户编码',
    d_client_stat_code          String          COMMENT '客户状态编码',
    d_client_name               String          COMMENT '客户名称',
    d_client_sname              String          COMMENT '客户简称',
    d_client_mobile             String          COMMENT '客户手机号',
    tax_code                  String          COMMENT '税号',

    -- ================== 标志字段（Int32）==================
    general_flag              Int32 COMMENT '是否一般纳税人标识',
    general_name              String COMMENT '是否一般纳税人名称',
    product_name              String COMMENT '主营产品',
    frozen_flag               Int32 COMMENT '冻结标识',
    frozen_name               String COMMENT '冻结状态名称',
    assign_flag               Int32 COMMENT '是否分配标识',
    assign_name               String COMMENT '是否分配名称',
    custclass_flag            Int32 COMMENT '客户分类标识',
    custclass_name            String COMMENT '客户分类名称',
    regist_flag               Int32 COMMENT '注册标识',
    regist_name               String COMMENT '注册名称',
    del_flag                  String COMMENT '删除标识',
    del_name                  String COMMENT '删除状态名称',
    custstatus_flag           Int32 COMMENT '客户状态标识',
    custstatus_name           String COMMENT '客户状态名称',
    unitbusi_flag             Int32 COMMENT '单位业务标识',
    unitbusi_name             String COMMENT '单位业务名称',
    corpbusi_flag             Int32 COMMENT '公司业务标识',
    corpbusi_name             String COMMENT '公司业务名称',

    -- ================== 状态与时间 ==================
    start_status              Int32 COMMENT '启用状态',
    client_dclass_code        String COMMENT '客户分类编码',
    client_dclass_name        String COMMENT '客户分类名称',

    client_updtime            String COMMENT '客户更新时间',
    regist_starttime          String COMMENT '注册开始时间',
    regist_endtime            String COMMENT '注册结束时间',
    opening_date              String COMMENT '开户日期',

    dept_status               String COMMENT '部门状态',
    town_status               String COMMENT '片区状态',
    salesman_status           String COMMENT '业务员状态',
    client_class              String COMMENT '客户等级',
    first_order_date          String COMMENT '首单日期',

    -- ================== 主营产品分析 ==================
    d_main_prodline_name        String COMMENT '主营产品线',
    f_main_sale_num             Int32 COMMENT '主营销售数量',
    f_main_prodline_name_amounT String COMMENT '主营产品线(金额)',
    f_main_sale_amount          Int32 COMMENT '主营销售金额',
    f_main_sale_num_animal      Int32 COMMENT '主营销售数量(动物)',

    d_main_class_code4          String COMMENT '主营品类4编码',
    d_main_class_name4          String COMMENT '主营品类4名称',
    f_main_class4_num           Int32 COMMENT '主营品类4数量',
    f_main_class_code4_amount   String COMMENT '主营品类4编码(金额)',
    f_main_class_name4_amount   String COMMENT '主营品类4名称(金额)',
    f_main_class4_amount        Int32 COMMENT '主营品类4金额',

    -- ================== 销售组织 ==================
    d_unit_sale_id              FixedString(20) COMMENT '销售组织ID',
    d_unit_sale_code            String          COMMENT '销售组织编码',
    d_unit_sale_name            String          COMMENT '销售组织名称',
    d_unit_sale_lname           String          COMMENT '销售组织全称',


    updtime                   String COMMENT '更新时间',
    original_unit_code        String COMMENT '原始单位编码',
    original_unit_name        String COMMENT '原始单位名称'
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY tuple()
COMMENT '客户维度表：整合客户、组织、人员、区域等多维属性';

-- ==================================================
-- 表名：ck.dwd_sal_so_saleorder
-- 主题域：财务-返利
-- 来源：fr 系统 dwd_sal_so_saleorder
-- 说明：客户返利实际兑付明细，基于费用单审核数据生成
-- 分区：按 billmonth 分区（业务月份）
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-09-16
-- 更新策略：
--   - 每日调度执行
--   - 支持按 billmonth 覆盖重刷
-- ==================================================
--**drop table dwd_sal_so_saleorder;**--
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_sal_so_saleorder
(
    order_id              FixedString(20) comment '订单ID',
    order_uid             FixedString(20) comment '订单唯一标识',
    order_row             String comment '订单行号',
    bill_id               FixedString(20) comment '单据ID',
    bill_code             String comment '单据编码',
    bill_name             String comment '单据名称',
    cbillsrcid            String comment '单据来源ID',
    vbillcode             String comment '单据号',
    vbillsrctype          String comment '单据来源类型',
    d_material_id         FixedString(20) comment '物料ID',
    d_material_code       String comment '物料编码',
    d_material_name       String comment '物料名称',
    d_prodline_id         FixedString(20) comment '产线ID',
    d_prodline_code       String comment '产线编码',
    d_prodline_name       String comment '产线名称',
    d_client_id           FixedString(20) comment '客户ID',
    d_client_code         String comment '客户编码',
    d_client_name         String comment '客户名称',
    client_dclass_code    String comment '客户分类编码',
    client_dclass_name    String comment '客户分类名称',
    chreceivecust_id      FixedString(20) comment '收货客户ID',
    cfreecustid           String comment '自由客户ID',
    custclass_flag        Int8 comment '客户分类标识',
    custclass_name        String comment '客户分类名称',
    d_corp_id             FixedString(20) comment '公司ID',
    d_corp_vid            FixedString(20) comment '公司版本ID',
    d_corp_code           String comment '公司编码',
    d_corp_name           String comment '公司名称',
    corpbusi_name         String comment '公司业务名称',
    d_unit_id             FixedString(20) comment '经营单元ID',
    d_unit_code           String comment '经营单元编码',
    d_unit_name           String comment '经营单元名称',
    d_unit_sname          String comment '经营单元简称',
    d_unit_lname          String comment '经营单元全称',
    d_unitbusi_name       String comment '经营单元业务名称',
    region_code           String comment '区域编码',
    region_name           String comment '区域名称',
    d_dept_vid            FixedString(20) comment '部门版本ID',
    d_dept_id             FixedString(20) comment '部门ID',
    d_dept_code           String comment '部门编码',
    d_dept_name           String comment '部门名称',
    d_town_id             FixedString(20) comment '乡镇ID',
    d_town_name           String comment '乡镇名称',
    vdef3_town            String comment '扩展字段3-乡镇',
    material_spec         String comment '物料规格',
    strategy_name         String comment '销售策略名称',
    product_name          String comment '产品名称',
    class_code1           String comment '分类编码1',
    class_name1           String comment '分类名称1',
    class_code2           String comment '分类编码2',
    class_name2           String comment '分类名称2',
    class_code4           String comment '分类编码4',
    class_name4           String comment '分类名称4',
    class_code6           String comment '分类编码6',
    class_name6           String comment '分类名称6',
    f_num                 Decimal(18, 4) comment '数量',
    measure               String comment '计量单位',

    vdef1_adress          String comment '扩展字段1-地址',
    vdef2_phone           String comment '扩展字段2-电话',
    vdef17_cargoods       String comment '扩展字段17-车辆货品',
    vdef21_id             String comment '扩展字段21',
    vdef22_aera_id        FixedString(20) comment '扩展字段22-区域ID',
    vcooppohcode          String comment '协同采购单号',
    vnote                 String comment '备注信息',
    remarks               String comment '附加说明',
    vrevisereason         String comment '修订原因',

    carsubtypeid          String comment '车辆子类型ID',
    custbank_accid        FixedString(20) comment '客户银行账户ID',
    custbank_id           FixedString(20) comment '客户银行ID',

    barsettleflag         FixedString(1) comment '应收结算标识',
    bcooptopoflag         FixedString(1) comment '协同顶层标识',
    bcostsettleflag       FixedString(1) comment '成本结算标识',
    bfreecustflag         FixedString(1) comment '自由客户标识',
    binvoicendflag        FixedString(1) comment '开票完成标识',
    boffsetflag           FixedString(1) comment '冲销标识',
    boutendflag           FixedString(1) comment '发出完成标识',
    bpocooptomeflag       FixedString(1) comment '协同至我方标识',
    bpreceiveflag         FixedString(1) comment '预收标识',
    bsendendflag          FixedString(1) comment '发货完成标识',
    approver              String comment '审批人',
    creviserid            String comment '修订人ID',
    busiflow_flag         String comment '流程标识',
    cinvoicecustid        String comment '开票客户ID',
    corigcurrencyid       String comment '原币种ID',
    ctradewordid          String comment '贸易条款ID',
    ctransporttypeid      String comment '运输方式ID',
    fpfstatusflag         String comment '发票状态标识',
    fstatusflag           String comment '状态标识',
    iprintcount           String comment '打印次数',
    iversion              String comment '版本号',
    cpaytermid            String comment '付款条件ID',
    first_order_date      FixedString(10) comment '首次下单日期',
    modifiedtime          String comment '修改时间',
    taudittime            String comment '审核时间',
    trevisetime           String comment '修订时间',
    supply_time           String comment '供货履约状态：按期 未按期 空值',
    creationtime          String comment '创建时间',
    dmakedate             String comment '制单日期',
    tsdate                Date comment '日期(分区)',
    tsmonth               String comment '月份(分区)',
    ts                    String comment '时间戳',
    dr                    Int32 comment '删除标识(0=正常,1=已删除)',
    updtime               String comment '更新时间',
    billts                String comment '单据时间戳',
    billdate              String comment '单据日期',
    billmonth             String comment '单据月份'
)
    engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY billmonth
        ORDER BY (d_corp_id, d_client_id, d_material_id, class_code2, class_code4, d_prodline_name)
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
        comment '帆软销售订单表';

taskDefinitionList.name: 4.1create_table_ads_sales_profit_contribution_snap

taskParams.sql:
-- =============================================================
-- 表名: ads_sales_profit_contribution_snap
-- 说明: 客户-产品维度销售分析宽表（按月聚合）
-- 源表: ck.dwd_sal_so_saleorder 销售订单表
-- 		##dwd_cust_rebate_actual_m 返利结算单
-- 		##dim_fact_row_price_snap 原料配方价格
-- 		##dim_formula_product_dictpack 配方包装袋
-- 		##dwd_price_maintenance_snap 价格维护
-- 		##dws_product_subject_cost 成品配方制造成本&材料成本表
-- 更新频率: 每日
-- 分区字段: biz_month (格式 'YYYY-MM')
-- 主键: d_corp_id + d_client_id + d_product_id → 拼接为 fixed(20) 的 rowkey
-- 作者: 蔡青松
-- 时间: 2025-09-17
-- =============================================================
-- ##drop table ads_sales_profit_contribution_snap;## --
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ads_sales_profit_contribution_snap
(

    -- ================== 区域与公司 ==================
    d_region_name      String COMMENT '所属区域名称',
    d_corp_id          String COMMENT '公司ID',
    d_corp_code        String COMMENT '公司编码',
    d_corp_name        String COMMENT '公司名称',
    d_town_id          String COMMENT '所属乡镇ID',
    d_town_name        String COMMENT '所属乡镇名称',

    -- ================== 客户信息 ==================
    d_client_id        String COMMENT '客户ID',
    d_client_code      String COMMENT '客户编码',
    d_client_name      String COMMENT '客户名称',

    -- ================== 产品分类（6级）==================
    d_class_code2      String COMMENT '产品二级分类编码',
    d_class_name2      String COMMENT '产品二级分类名称',
    d_class_code4      String COMMENT '产品四级分类编码',
    d_class_name4      String COMMENT '产品四级分类名称',
    d_class_code6      String COMMENT '产品六级分类编码',
    d_class_name6      String COMMENT '产品六级分类名称',

    -- ================== 产品信息 ==================
    d_product_id       String COMMENT '产品ID',
    d_product_code     String COMMENT '产品编码',
    d_product_name     String COMMENT '产品名称',
    d_measure_name     String COMMENT '计量单位',

    -- ================== 配方信息 ==================
    d_formula_id       String COMMENT '配方ID',
    d_formula_code     String COMMENT '配方编码',
    d_formula_name     String COMMENT '配方名称',

    -- ================== 1.1销售数据（本月）==================
    f_sale_qty                     Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月销量',
    f_sale_gift_qty                Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月赠送数量',
    f_rebate_qty                   Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月返利数量',

    f_list_sale_amt                Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月挂牌销售金额',
    f_sale_amt                     Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月实际销售金额',
    f_discount_amt                 Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月总折扣金额',
    f_base_discount_amt            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月基础折扣金额（负转正）',
    f_prm_discount_amt             Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月促销折扣金额（负转正）',
    f_rebate_amt                   Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月返利金额',
    f_cost_amt                     Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月成本金额（含赠送）',

    f_list_sale_ton                Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月单吨挂牌价 = 挂牌金额 / 销量',
    f_discount_ton                 Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月单吨总折扣 = 折扣金额 / 销量',
    f_base_discount_ton            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月单吨基础折扣 = 基础折扣 / 销量',
    f_prm_discount_ton             Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月单吨促销折扣 = 促销折扣 / 销量',
    f_rebate_ton                   Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月单吨返利 = 返利金额 / 返利数量',
    f_gift_cost_ton                Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月买赠成本 = (制造+材料成本)*赠送数量',
    f_total_dicount_ton            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '本月单吨总折扣 = 买赠+返利+现金折扣（加权）',

    -- ================== 1.2销售数据（今年累计）==================
    f_sale_qty_year                Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计销量（1-本月）',
    f_sale_gift_qty_year           Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计赠送数量',
    f_rebate_qty_year              Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计返利数量',

    f_list_sale_amt_year           Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计挂牌销售金额',
    f_sale_amt_year                Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计销售金额',
    f_discount_amt_year            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计折扣金额',
    f_base_discount_amt_year       Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计基础折扣金额（负转正）',
    f_prm_discount_amt_year        Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计促销折扣金额（负转正）',
    f_rebate_amt_year              Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计返利金额',
    f_cost_amt_year                Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年累计成本金额（含赠送）',

    f_list_sale_year_ton           Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年单吨挂牌价 = 挂牌金额 / 销量',
    f_discount_year_ton            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年单吨总折扣 = 折扣金额 / 销量',
    f_base_discount_year_ton       Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年单吨基础折扣 = 基础折扣 / 销量',
    f_prm_discount_year_ton        Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年单吨促销折扣 = 促销折扣 / 销量',
    f_rebate_year_ton              Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年单吨返利 = 返利金额 / 返利数量',
    f_gift_cost_year_ton           Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年买赠成本 = (制造+材料成本)*赠送数量',
    f_total_dicount_year_ton       Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '今年单吨总折扣 = 买赠+返利+现金折扣（加权）',

    -- ================== 1.3销售数据（去年同期）==================
    f_sale_qty_lastyear            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年同期销量（上年1-8月）',
    f_list_sale_amt_lastyear       Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年同期挂牌销售金额',
    f_sale_amt_lastyear            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年同期销售金额',
    f_discount_amt_lastyear        Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年同期折扣金额',
    f_base_discount_amt_lastyear   Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年同期基础折扣金额（负转正）',
    f_prm_discount_amt_lastyear    Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年同期促销折扣金额（负转正）',
    f_cost_amt_lastyear            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年同期成本金额（含赠送）',

    f_list_sale_lastyear_ton       Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年单吨挂牌价 = 挂牌金额 / 销量',
    f_discount_lastyear_ton        Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年单吨总折扣 = 折扣金额 / 销量',
    f_base_discount_lastyear_ton   Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年单吨基础折扣 = 基础折扣 / 销量',
    f_prm_discount_lastyear_ton    Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '去年单吨促销折扣 = 促销折扣 / 销量',

    -- ================== 2其他数据 ==================
    -- 配方成本
    f_formula_cost_ton             Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '综合单吨配方成本：最新/在途/库存加权',
    f_formula_latest_cost_ton      Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '单吨最新报价配方成本',
    f_formula_stock_cost_ton       Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '单吨库存价格配方成本',
    f_formula_transit_cost_ton_avg30 Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '单吨30天在途平均价格配方成本',

    -- 包装袋信息
    d_packaging_id                 String COMMENT '包装袋主键',
    d_packaging_code               String COMMENT '包装袋编码',
    d_packaging_name               String COMMENT '包装袋名称',
    d_packaging_measure            String COMMENT '包装袋计量单位',
    f_packaging_num_ton            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '包装袋单吨用量',

    -- 产品定价
    f_product_price_ton            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '各公司产品定价（单吨）',

    -- 制造成本
    f_factory_cost_ton             Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '单吨成品制造成本（人工、折旧等）',
    f_material_cost_ton            Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '单吨配方材料成本',

    -- ================== 3基线预留指标（默认0）==================
    f_manufacturing_cost_baseline_ton Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '制造成本标准基线（默认0）',
    f_manufacturing_cost_ton_diff     Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '制造成本差异（默认0）',
    f_gross_profit_ton_computed       Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '计算毛利额/吨（默认0）',
    f_gross_profit_red_line           Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '毛利红线（默认0）',
    f_standard_sale_amt_ton           Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '标准销售收入/吨（默认0）',
    f_baseline_discount_ton           Decimal(18,4) COMMENT '基准折扣/吨（默认0）',


    -- ================== 4主键与分区 ==================
    uuiq_id             FixedString(66) COMMENT '主键: 拼接年月+公司+客户+产品形成全局唯一)',
    month_dt          String COMMENT '业务月份，格式YYYY-MM，用于分区'
) ENGINE = MergeTree()
PARTITION BY month_dt
ORDER BY (d_corp_id, d_client_id, d_product_id,d_class_code2,d_class_code4,d_class_code6)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;

-- ==================================================
-- 表名：ck.dwd_price_maintenance_snap
-- 主题域：采购_价格
-- 来源:nc.prm_tariff 价格维护表
--     多个维度表（渠道、组织、物料、客户、用户、计量单位）详情见抽数sql
-- 分区：按 month_dt（年月）分区，形成价格维护表月快照
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-08-08
-- 说明：客户级价格明细宽表，包含渠道、公司、物料、客户等多维上下文
-- ==================================================
--drop table dwd_price_maintenance_snap;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_price_maintenance_snap
(

    d_channel_name      String,           -- 维度：渠道名称（如 线上/线下）
    d_channel_code      String,           -- 维度：渠道编码
    d_channel_id        String,           -- 维度：渠道主键 ID

    d_corp_id           String,           -- 维度：公司主键 ID
    d_corp_code         String,           -- 维度：公司编码
    d_corp_name         String,           -- 维度：公司名称

    d_material_id       String,           -- 维度：物料主键 ID
    d_material_code     String,           -- 维度：物料编码（SKU）
    d_material_name     String,           -- 维度：物料名称

    d_client_id         String,           -- 维度：客户主键 ID
    d_client_code       String,           -- 维度：客户编码
    d_client_name       String,           -- 维度：客户名称
    client_dclass_code  String comment '客户分类:K1 K2 K3',
    client_dclass_name  String comment '客户分类名称'，
    
    f_price             Decimal(18,6),    -- 事实：价格（主度量值）

    measdoc_name        String,           -- 属性：计量单位名称（如“件”、“千克”）
    enablestate         UInt8,            -- 属性：物料启用状态（1=未启用，2=已启用，3=已停用）
    rn                  UInt64,           -- 属性：行号，用于标识优先级（ROW_NUMBER）
    modify_name         String,           -- 属性：最后修改人姓名
    modify_dt           DateTime,         -- 属性：最后修改时间（业务时间）
    updt                Date              -- 属性：数据入库时间（ETL 时间戳）


)
    ENGINE = MergeTree
        PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(updt)               -- 按月分区，提升查询和维护效率
        ORDER BY (d_corp_id, d_channel_id, d_material_id, d_client_id)  -- 常见分析维度组合
        TTL updt + INTERVAL 2 YEAR  -- 可选：自动过期策略（2年后删除）
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
comment '价格维护表';

taskDefinitionList.name: 0.1create_table_ods_ia_detailledger
taskDefinitionList.description: crm系统架构

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：ck. ods_ia_detailledger
-- 主题域：存货核算
-- 来源:nc.ia_detailledger
-- 分区：按 caccountperiod分区
-- 引擎：MergeTree
-- 创建人：赵力平
-- 创建时间：2025-11-07

-- ==================================================
--10.1create_table_ods_ia_detailledger
--建表ods_ia_detailledger
--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ods_ia_detailledger;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ods_ia_detailledger
(
    `cdetailledgerid` String COMMENT '单据明细表主键',
    `pk_book` String COMMENT '所属账簿',
    `pk_group` String COMMENT '所属集团',
    `pk_org` String COMMENT '成本域',
    `caccountperiod` String COMMENT '会计期间',
    `cbilltypecode` String COMMENT '单据类型',
    `cbiztypeid` String COMMENT '业务类型',
    `cbill_bid` String COMMENT '单据子表主键',
    `cbillid` String COMMENT '单据主表主键',
    `vbillcode` String COMMENT '单据号',
    `dbilldate` String COMMENT '单据日期',
    `dbizdate` String COMMENT '业务日期',
    `dmakedate` String COMMENT '制单日期',
    `cstockorgid` String COMMENT '库存组织最新版本',
    `cstockorgvid` String COMMENT '库存组织',
    `cstordocid` String COMMENT '仓库',
    `cstordocmanid` String COMMENT '库管员',
    `ctrantypeid` String COMMENT '出入库类型',
    `cvendorid` String COMMENT '供应商',
    `casscustid` String COMMENT '客户',
    `crowno` String COMMENT '行号',
    `cinventoryid` String COMMENT '物料',
    `cinventoryvid` String COMMENT '物料版本',

    `cinvclass_sid` String COMMENT '物料小类:6位',
    `class_code6` String COMMENT '物小类编码(最小6位)',
    `class_name6` String COMMENT '物料小类名称',

    `cinvclassid` String COMMENT '物料大类：4位',
    `class_code4` String COMMENT '物大类编码(最小4位)',
    `class_name4` String COMMENT '物料大类名称',
    `cunitid` String COMMENT '主单位',
    `castunitid` String COMMENT '单位',
    `nmny` Decimal(28, 8) COMMENT '金额',
    `nnum` Decimal(28, 8) COMMENT '主数量',
    `nadjustnum` Decimal(28, 8) COMMENT '调整数量',
    `nastnum` Decimal(28, 8) COMMENT '数量',
    `nprice` Decimal(28, 8) COMMENT '单价',
    `nvarymny` Decimal(28, 8) COMMENT '差异金额',
    `vchangerate` String COMMENT '换算率',
    `vfirstcode` String COMMENT '源头单据号',
    `vfirstrowno` String COMMENT '源头单据行号',
    `vfirsttrantype` String COMMENT '源头交易类型',
    `vfirsttype` String COMMENT '源头单据类型',
    `cfirstbid` String COMMENT '源头单据分录',
    `cfirstid` String COMMENT '源头单据',
    `vsrccode` String COMMENT '来源单据号',
    `vsrcrowno` String COMMENT '来源分录行号',
    `vsrctrantype` String COMMENT '来源交易类型',
    `vsrctype` String COMMENT '来源单据类型',
    `csrcbid` String COMMENT '来源单据分录',
    `csrcid` String COMMENT '来源单据',
    `csrcmodulecode` String COMMENT '来源模块编码',
    `fdispatchflag` Int32 COMMENT '收发类别',
    `cdeptid` String COMMENT '部门最新版本',
    `cdeptvid` String COMMENT '部门',
    `vbatchcode` String COMMENT '批次号',
    `vproducebatch` String COMMENT '产成品生产批次',
    `vproduceordercode` String COMMENT '生产订单号',
    `cpsnid` String COMMENT '业务员',
    `dr` Int32 COMMENT '删除标识',
    `ts` String COMMENT '时间戳'
)
    ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree()
        ORDER BY (caccountperiod, cdetailledgerid)
        PARTITION BY caccountperiod
        COMMENT 'NC存货核算单据明细 - 每日更新本月数据';

taskDefinitionList.name: 0.3create_table_dwd_ic_flow
taskDefinitionList.description: crm系统架构

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dwd_ic_flow_new
-- 主题域：库存_出入库明细流水快照
-- 来源系统：NC 财务/供应链模块（ic_flow 及相关维度表）
-- 数据范围：按单据日期（dbilldate）月度分区
-- 更新机制：ReplacingMergeTree(ts)，以复合维度+flow_uid 排序
-- 创建时间：2025-11-24
-- drop TABLE IF  EXISTS dwd_ic_flow_new;
-- ==================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_ic_flow_new
(

    -- ========== 单据与行标识 ==========
    flow_uid            FixedString(20) COMMENT '流水唯一主键（pk_flow）',
    bill_code           String COMMENT '单据编号（vbillcode）',
    first_billhid       String COMMENT '源头单据主键（cfirstbillhid）',
    first_billcode      String COMMENT '源头单据编号（vfirstbillcode）',
    row_no              String COMMENT '行号（crowno）',
    row_note            String COMMENT '行备注（vnotebody）',

    -- ========== 单据类型维度 ==========
    d_billtype_id       FixedString(20) COMMENT '出入库类型主键（ctrantypeid）',
    d_billtype_name     String COMMENT '出入库类型名称（billtypename）',

    -- ========== 公司维度 ==========
    d_corp_id           FixedString(20) COMMENT '公司主键（corpoid）',
    d_corp_code         String COMMENT '公司编码（org_corp.code）',
    d_corp_name         String COMMENT '公司全称（org_corp.name）',
    d_corp_sname        String COMMENT '公司简称（org_corp.shortname）',

    -- ========== 仓库维度 ==========
    d_warehouse_id      FixedString(20) COMMENT '仓库主键（cwarehouseid）',
    d_warehouse_code    String COMMENT '仓库编码（bd_stordoc.code）',
    d_warehouse_name    String COMMENT '仓库名称（bd_stordoc.name）',

    -- ========== 客户维度（出库场景） ==========
    d_client_id         FixedString(20) COMMENT '客户主键（ccustomerid）',
    d_client_code       String COMMENT '客户编码（bd_customer.code）',
    d_client_name       String COMMENT '客户名称（bd_customer.name）',

    -- ========== 供应商维度（入库场景） ==========
    d_supplier_id       FixedString(20) COMMENT '供应商主键（cvendorid）',
    d_supplier_code     String COMMENT '供应商编码（bd_supplier.code）',
    d_supplier_name     String COMMENT '供应商名称（bd_supplier.name）',

    -- ========== 物料维度 ==========
    d_material_id       FixedString(20) COMMENT '物料主键（cmaterialvid）',
    d_material_code     String COMMENT '物料编码（bd_material.code）',
    d_material_name     String COMMENT '物料名称（bd_material.name）',

    -- ========== 物料分类维度 ==========
    d_cinvclass_sid     FixedString(20) COMMENT '物料小类主键（6级分类 pk_marbasclass）',
    d_class_code6       String COMMENT '物料小类编码（6位）',
    d_class_name6       String COMMENT '物料小类名称6',
    d_cinvclassid       FixedString(20) COMMENT '物料大类主键（4级分类 pk_marbasclass）',
    d_class_code4       String COMMENT '物料大类编码（4位）',
    d_class_name4       String COMMENT '物料大类名称4',
    d_class_code2       String COMMENT '物料分类编码（2位）',
    d_class_name2       String COMMENT '物料分类名称2',
    d_class_code1       String COMMENT '物料分类编码（1位）',
    d_class_name1       String COMMENT '物料分类名称1',
    -- ========== 核心指标（f_前缀，Decimal(18,6)） ==========
    f_inbound_auxqty        Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '实入辅数量（ninassistnum）',
    f_inbound_qty           Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '实入主数量（ninnum）',
    f_should_inbound_qty    Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '应入主数量（nshouldinnum）',
    f_outbound_auxqty       Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '实出辅数量（noutassistnum）',
    f_outbound_qty          Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '实出主数量（noutnum）',
    f_should_outbound_qty   Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '应出主数量（nshouldoutnum）',
    f_amt                   Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '金额（出库&入库）：采购入库用 vbodyuserdef7（结算金额），其他用 ncostmny',
    f_price                 Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '单价（出库&入库）：采购入库用 vbodyuserdef8（结算单价），其他用 ncostprice',
    f_settled_qty_cr0       Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '采购入库(CR0)用vbodyuserdef6（结算数量）',
    f_price_cr0             Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '采购入库(CR0)单价（vbodyuserdef10 转数值）',

    -- ========== 计量单位维度 ==========
    measdoc_id          FixedString(20) COMMENT '主计量单位主键（cunitid）',
    measdoc_name        String COMMENT '主计量单位名称',
    assist_measdoc_id   FixedString(20) COMMENT '辅计量单位主键（castunitid）',
    assist_measdoc_name String COMMENT '辅计量单位名称',

    -- ========== 业务属性（无前缀，String） ==========
    bill_flag           String COMMENT '单据状态：1=删除，2=自由，3=签字，4=审核，5=审核中，6=审核不通过，7=已调差',
    is_gift             String COMMENT '是否赠品：Y/N',
    is_returned         String COMMENT '是否退货：Y/N',
    cost_object         String COMMENT '成本对象（ccostobject）',
    source_billhid      String COMMENT '来源单据主键（csourcebillhid）',
    dr                  String COMMENT '逻辑删除标记：''0''=有效，''1''=删除',

    -- ========== 人员与用户维度 ==========
    salesman_id         FixedString(20) COMMENT '业务员主键（cbizid）',
    salesman_code       String COMMENT '业务员编码（bd_psndoc.code）',
    salesman_name       String COMMENT '业务员姓名（bd_psndoc.name）',
    modifier_id         FixedString(20) COMMENT '修改人主键（modifier）',
    modifier_code       String COMMENT '修改人用户编码（sm_user.user_code）',
    modifier_name       String COMMENT '修改人姓名（sm_user.user_name）',
    creator_id          FixedString(20) COMMENT '创建人主键（creator）',
    creator_code        String COMMENT '创建人用户编码（sm_user.user_code）',
    creator_name        String COMMENT '创建人姓名（sm_user.user_name）',

    -- ========== 原始时间字符串（_ts_char 后缀） ==========
    modified_ts_char    String COMMENT '最后修改时间（modifiedtime，格式如 ''2025-10-01 12:34:56''）',
    creation_ts_char    String COMMENT '创建时间（creationtime）',
    bill_ts_char        String COMMENT '单据日期（dbilldate，用于分区）',
    biz_ts_char         String COMMENT '业务日期（dbizdate）',
    ts_char             String COMMENT 'NC 系统最后同步时间戳（用于增量捕获）',
    -- ========== 物化时间字段（自动解析为 DateTime） ==========
    bill_ts             DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(bill_ts_char) COMMENT '单据日期（物化，用于查询过滤）',
    biz_ts              DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(biz_ts_char) COMMENT '业务日期（物化）',

    -- ========== 分区与同步字段（固定放最后） ==========
    month_dt            String COMMENT '分区字段，格式 ''YYYY-MM''（来自 SUBSTR(dbilldate, 1, 7)）',
    ts                  DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(ts_char) COMMENT '业务日期（物化）'

)
    ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(ts)
        PARTITION BY month_dt
        ORDER BY (d_billtype_id, d_corp_id, d_warehouse_id, d_client_id, d_material_id, flow_uid)
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
        COMMENT '库存出入库明细：整合 ic_flow 及物料、仓库、客户/供应商等维度，支持出入库分析';

taskDefinitionList.name: 0.4create_table_dwd_ia_monthnab
taskDefinitionList.description: crm系统架构

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- 表名：dwd_ia_monthnab 
-- 主题域：库存_月度结存
-- 来源系统：NC 财务/供应链模块（ia_monthnab 及相关维度表）
-- 数据范围：按会计期间（yearmth）月度分区
-- 更新机制：ReplacingMergeTree(ts)，以 (d_corp_id, d_material_id, month_dt) 排序
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-11-25
-- drop table IF  EXISTS dwd_ia_monthnab;
-- ==================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_ia_monthnab
(
    -- ========== 公司维度 ==========
    d_corp_id           FixedString(20) COMMENT '公司主键（org_costregion.pk_org → org_financeorg）',
    d_corp_code         String COMMENT '公司编码（org_financeorg.code）',
    d_corp_name         String COMMENT '公司全称（org_financeorg.name）',
    d_corp_sname        String COMMENT '公司简称（org_financeorg.shortname）',

    -- ========== 物料维度 ==========
    d_material_id       FixedString(20) COMMENT '物料主键（cinventoryid）',
    d_material_code     String COMMENT '物料编码（bd_material.code）',
    d_material_name     String COMMENT '物料名称（bd_material.name）',
    d_material_type     String COMMENT '物料型号（bd_material.materialtype）',

    -- ========== 物料分类维度（6级→4级→3级→1级） ==========
    d_cinvclass_sid     FixedString(20) COMMENT '物料小类主键（6级，pk_marbasclass）',
    d_class_code6       String COMMENT '物料小类编码（6位）',
    d_class_name6       String COMMENT '物料小类名称',
    d_cinvclassid       FixedString(20) COMMENT '物料大类主键（4级）',
    d_class_code4       String COMMENT '物料大类编码（4位）',
    d_class_name4       String COMMENT '物料大类名称',
    d_class_code2       String COMMENT '物料中类编码（3级）',
    d_class_name2       String COMMENT '物料中类名称',
    d_class_code1       String COMMENT '一级业务分类编码（原料/添加剂/包装物等）',
    d_class_name1       String COMMENT '一级业务分类名称（原料/添加剂/包装物等）',

    -- ========== 计量单位维度 ==========
    measdoc_id          FixedString(20) COMMENT '主计量单位主键（bd_material.pk_measdoc）',
    measdoc_name        String COMMENT '主计量单位名称（bd_measdoc.name）',

    -- ========== 核心指标（f_前缀，Decimal(18,6)） ==========
    f_qty               Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '期末结存数量（nabnum）',
    f_price             Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '期末结存单价（nabprice）',
    f_price_mth         Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '全月平均单价（nmonthprice）',
    f_amt               Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '期末结存金额（nabmny）',
    f_dif_rate          Decimal(18,6) COMMENT '差异率（nvariancerate）',

    -- ========== 原始时间字符串 ==========
    ts_char             String COMMENT 'NC 系统最后同步时间戳（用于增量捕获，格式如 ''2025-10-01 12:34:56''）',

    -- ========== 物化时间字段 ==========
    ts                  DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(ts_char) COMMENT '同步时间（物化，用于 ReplacingMergeTree）',

    -- ========== 业务属性 ==========
    dr                  String COMMENT '逻辑删除标记：''0''=有效，''1''=删除',

    -- ========== 分区字段 ==========
    month_dt            String COMMENT '会计期间分区字段，格式 ''YYYY-MM'''
)
ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(ts)
PARTITION BY month_dt
ORDER BY (d_corp_id, d_material_id, month_dt)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
COMMENT '库存月度结存余额快照表：整合 ia_monthnab 及物料、公司、分类等维度，支持库存分析';

-- ==================================================
-- 表名：ck.dwd_po_order_detail
-- 主题域：采购_订单
-- 来源: nc.PO_ORDER / PO_ORDER_B 等多张 NC 表
--     维度包括：公司、供应商、物料、物料分类、付款协议、订单类型、负责人等
-- 分区：按 month_dt（年月，格式 YYYY-MM）分区，形成采购订单月快照
-- 引擎：ReplacingMergeTree(ts_dt)
-- 创建人：蔡青松
-- 创建时间：2025-11-19
-- 说明：采购订单明细宽表，包含订单头/行信息、供应商、物料、公司、付款条款、状态等上下文
-- ==================================================
--drop table  dwd_po_order_detail;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dwd_po_order_detail
(

    -- 单据与主键
    d_bill_code         String,
    d_order_id          FixedString(20),
    d_order_b_id        FixedString(20),

    -- 业务属性（无前缀）
    is_basis            String,
    order_status        String,
    contract_type       String,
    is_stock_close      String,
    is_pay_close        String,
    is_closed           String,
    row_no              String,

    -- 订单类型 & 负责人 & 结算方式（维度）
    d_order_type_name   String,
    d_order_owner_name  String,
    d_delivery_method   String,

    -- 公司维度
    d_corp_id           FixedString(20),
    d_corp_code         String,
    d_corp_name         String,
    d_corp_short_name   String,

    -- 供应商维度
    d_supplier_id       FixedString(20),
    d_supplier_code     String,
    d_supplier_name     String,
    d_supplier_class_id FixedString(20),

    -- 物料维度
    d_material_id       FixedString(20),
    d_material_code     String,
    d_material_name     String,
    d_material_type     String,
    measdoc_id       FixedString(20),
    measdoc_name      String,

    -- 物料分类维度
    d_class_id          FixedString(20),
    d_class_code6       String,
    d_class_name6       String,
    d_class_code4       String,
    d_class_name4       String,

    -- 付款协议维度
    d_pay_term_name     String,
    d_pay_point_name    String,

    -- 指标字段（f_ 前缀，Decimal(18,6)）
    f_order_qty         Decimal(18,6),
    f_unit_price        Decimal(18,6),
    f_freight_amt       Decimal(18,6),
    f_payment_days      Decimal(18,6),

    -- 业务日期（String + _dt 后缀）
    order_dt_char            String,
    plan_arrv_dt_char        String,
    creation_ts_char         String,
    order_dt              DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(order_dt_char),
    plan_arrv_dt          DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(plan_arrv_dt_char),
    creation_ts            DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(creation_ts_char),

    -- 分区与时间字段（固定放最后）
    month_dt            String,
    ts                  String,
    ts_dt               DateTime MATERIALIZED parseDateTimeBestEffort(ts)

)
    ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(ts_dt)
        PARTITION BY month_dt
        ORDER BY (d_corp_id,d_class_code6,d_material_id, d_order_b_id)
        SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
        COMMENT '采购订单明细月快照表';

    pk_flow AS flow_uid
    ,ts as ts_char
FROM ic_flow 
WHERE TS>='${FIRST_RUN_TIME4}'
  AND dr = '0'

taskDefinitionList.name: 3dwd_ic_flow
taskDefinitionList.description:
库存出入库明细新
大表OPTIMIZE TABLE 时用最近4个月兜底聚合 如果超过4个月则可能会有数据重复 依赖每天的ck自动聚合机制兜底

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    -- ========== 单据与行标识 ==========
    a.pk_flow AS flow_uid,
    a.vbillcode AS bill_code,
    a.cfirstbillhid AS first_billhid,
    a.vfirstbillcode AS first_billcode,
    a.crowno AS row_no,
    a.vnotebody AS row_note,

    -- ========== 单据类型维度 ==========
    a.ctrantypeid AS d_billtype_id,
    b.billtypename AS d_billtype_name,

    -- ========== 公司维度 ==========
    a.corpoid AS d_corp_id,
    e.code AS d_corp_code,
    e.name AS d_corp_name,
    e.shortname AS d_corp_sname,

    -- ========== 仓库维度 ==========
    a.cwarehouseid AS d_warehouse_id,
    f.code AS d_warehouse_code,
    f.name AS d_warehouse_name,

    -- ========== 客户维度（出库场景） ==========
    a.ccustomerid AS d_client_id,
    g.code AS d_client_code,
    g.name AS d_client_name,

    -- ========== 供应商维度（入库场景） ==========
    a.cvendorid AS d_supplier_id,
    h.code AS d_supplier_code,
    h.name AS d_supplier_name,

    -- ========== 物料维度 ==========
    a.cmaterialvid AS d_material_vid,
    c.pk_source as d_material_id,

    c.code AS d_material_code,
    c.name AS d_material_name,
    a.vfree8 as d_mat_attr8_id, --研发物质属性主键
    k.code as d_mat_attr8_code, --研发物质属性编码
    k.name as d_mat_attr8_name, --研发物质属性名称
  
    -- ========== 物料分类维度 ==========
    c1.pk_marbasclass AS d_cinvclass_sid,
    c1.code AS d_class_code6,
    c1.name AS d_class_name6,
    c2.pk_marbasclass AS d_cinvclassid,
    c2.code AS d_class_code4,
    c2.name AS d_class_name4,
    c3.code AS d_class_code2,
    c3.name AS d_class_name2,
    case when c4.code is null and c2.code='3'  then '3'
          when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '3'
          when c3.code='1'  then  '1'
          when c3.code='4'  then  '4'
		  when c2.code='1' then '1'
		  when c2.code is null then c1.code
          else c4.code 
	   end as d_class_code1,
    case when c4.code is null and c2.code in('3','12')  then '添加剂'
          when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '添加剂'
          when c3.code='1'  then  '原料'
          when c3.code='4'  then  '包装物'
          when c4.code='4' then '外袋配件'  
		  when c2.code='1' then '原料'
		  when c2.code is null then c1.name
		  else c4.name
        end as d_class_name1,

    -- ========== 核心指标（f_前缀） ==========
    COALESCE(a.ninassistnum, 0) AS f_inbound_auxqty,
    COALESCE(a.ninnum, 0) AS f_inbound_qty,
    COALESCE(a.nshouldinnum, 0) AS f_should_inbound_qty,
    COALESCE(a.noutassistnum, 0) AS f_outbound_auxqty,
    COALESCE(a.noutnum, 0) AS f_outbound_qty,
    COALESCE(a.nshouldoutnum, 0) AS f_should_outbound_qty,
    CASE
        WHEN a.ctrantypeid = '1001A410000000005YSX'
            THEN NVL(TO_NUMBER(NULLIF(a.vbodyuserdef7, '~')), 0) 
        ELSE NVL(a.ncostmny, 0)
        END AS f_amt,
    CASE
        WHEN a.ctrantypeid = '1001A410000000005YSX'
            THEN COALESCE(TO_NUMBER(NULLIF(a.vbodyuserdef8, '~')), 0)
        ELSE COALESCE(a.ncostprice, 0)
        END AS f_price,
	TO_NUMBER(NULLIF(a.vbodyuserdef6, '~'))  AS f_settled_qty_cr0,

	TO_NUMBER(NULLIF(a.vbodyuserdef10, '~')) AS f_price_cr0,

    -- ========== 计量单位维度 ==========
    a.cunitid AS measdoc_id,
    d2.name AS measdoc_name,
    a.castunitid AS assist_measdoc_id,
    d1.name AS assist_measdoc_name,

    -- ========== 业务属性 ==========
    a.fbillflag AS bill_flag,
    a.flargess AS is_gift,
    a.freplenishflag AS is_returned,
    a.ccostobject AS cost_object,
    a.csourcebillhid AS source_billhid,
    a.dr,

    -- ========== 人员与用户维度 ==========
    a.cbizid AS salesman_id,
    i1.code AS salesman_code,
    i1.name AS salesman_name,
    a.modifier AS modifier_id,
    j1.user_code AS modifier_code,
    j1.user_name AS modifier_name,
    a.creator AS creator_id,
    j2.user_code AS creator_code,
    j2.user_name AS creator_name,

    -- ========== 原始时间字符串 ==========
    a.modifiedtime AS modified_ts_char,
    a.creationtime AS creation_ts_char,
	COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.dbilldate), ''), '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS bill_ts_char,
	COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.dbizdate), ''), '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS biz_ts_char,
    a.ts AS ts_char,
    a.vfree1 as d_mat_attr1_id, --配件属性主键1
    a.vfree2 as d_mat_attr2_id, --配件属性主键2
    a.vfree3 as d_mat_attr3_id, --配件属性主键3
    a.vfree4 as d_mat_attr4_id, --配件属性主键4
    a.vfree5 as d_mat_attr5_id, --配件属性主键5
    a.vfree6 as d_mat_attr6_id, --配件属性主键6
    a.vfree7 as d_mat_attr7_id, --配件属性主键7
    a.vfree9 as d_mat_attr9_id, --预留属性主键9
    a.vfree10 as d_mat_attr10_id, --预留属性主键10

    -- ========== 物化时间字段（由 ClickHouse 自动计算，此处无需 SELECT，但为占位保留 NULL 或空值）
    -- 注意：MATERIALIZED 字段不能显式插入，必须省略或设为 DEFAULT
    -- 因此以下 4 个字段在 INSERT 中**不应出现**！
    -- 但我们为了字段数量对齐，在 SELECT 最后不写它们（ClickHouse 会自动填充）

    -- ========== 分区与同步字段 ==========
    SUBSTR(a.dbilldate, 1, 7) AS month_dt

FROM ic_flow a --ic_flowaccount_his
         LEFT JOIN bd_billtype b ON a.ctrantypeid = b.pk_billtypeid
         LEFT JOIN bd_material c ON a.cmaterialvid = c.pk_material
         LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c1 ON c.pk_marbasclass = c1.pk_marbasclass
         LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c2 ON c1.pk_parent = c2.pk_marbasclass
         LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c3 ON c2.pk_parent = c3.pk_marbasclass
         LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c4 ON c3.pk_parent = c4.pk_marbasclass
         LEFT JOIN bd_measdoc d1 ON a.castunitid = d1.pk_measdoc
         LEFT JOIN bd_measdoc d2 ON a.cunitid = d2.pk_measdoc
         LEFT JOIN org_corp e ON a.corpoid = e.pk_corp
         LEFT JOIN bd_stordoc f ON a.cwarehouseid = f.pk_stordoc
         LEFT JOIN bd_customer g ON a.ccustomerid = g.pk_customer
         LEFT JOIN bd_supplier h ON a.cvendorid = h.pk_supplier
         LEFT JOIN bd_psndoc i1 ON a.cbizid = i1.pk_psndoc
         LEFT JOIN sm_user j1 ON a.modifier = j1.cuserid
         LEFT JOIN sm_user j2 ON a.creator = j2.cuserid
         LEFT JOIN bd_defdoc k ON a.vfree8 = k.pk_defdoc

WHERE A.TS>'${LAST_RUN_TIME3}'

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    A.VBILLCODE AS d_bill_code,
    A.PK_ORDER AS d_order_id,
    B.PK_ORDER_B AS d_order_b_id,
    CASE WHEN A.VDEF2 <> 'Y' THEN 'N' ELSE A.VDEF2 END AS is_basis,
    A.FORDERSTATUS AS order_status,
    CASE
        WHEN A.VDEF3 = '1001A2100000009LO91B' OR A.VDEF2 = 'Y' THEN '基差合同'
        WHEN A.VDEF3 = '1001A2100000009JEQ3G' THEN '外盘合同'
        WHEN A.VDEF3 = '1001A2100000009JEQ3F' THEN '战略备货'
        ELSE '普通合同'
    END AS contract_type,
    B.bpayclose AS is_pay_close,
    B.BSTOCKCLOSE AS is_closed,
    B.CROWNO AS row_no,
    H.BILLTYPENAME AS d_order_type_name,
    F.NAME AS d_order_owner_name,
    F2.NAME AS d_delivery_method,
    A.PK_ORG AS d_corp_id,
    E.CODE AS d_corp_code,
    E.NAME AS d_corp_name,
    E.SHORTNAME AS d_corp_short_name,
    D.PK_SUPPLIER AS d_supplier_id,
    D.CODE AS d_supplier_code,
    D.NAME AS d_supplier_name,
    D.pk_supplierclass AS d_supplier_class_id,
    C.PK_MATERIAL AS d_material_id,
    C.CODE AS d_material_code,
    C.NAME AS d_material_name,
    C.MATERIALTYPE AS d_material_type,
    -- ========== 计量单位维度 ==========
    c.pk_measdoc AS measdoc_id,--主计量单位主键
    g.name AS measdoc_name, --主计量单位

    M.PK_MARBASCLASS AS d_class_id,
    M.CODE AS d_class_code6,
    M.NAME AS d_class_name6,
    N.CODE AS d_class_code4,
    N.NAME AS d_class_name4,
    A1.NAME AS d_pay_term_name,
    A3.NAME AS d_pay_point_name,
    B.NNUM AS f_order_qty,
    B.NQTORIGPRICE AS f_unit_price,
    CASE WHEN B.vbdef20 = '~' THEN '0' ELSE B.vbdef20 END AS f_freight_amt,
    A2.PAYMENTDAY AS f_payment_days,

	COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.DBILLDATE), ''), '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS order_dt_char,
	COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.DPLANARRVDATE), ''), '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS plan_arrv_dt_char,
    A.CREATIONTIME AS creation_ts_char,
    SUBSTR(B.DBILLDATE, 1, 7) AS month_dt,
    A.ts,
    a.dr as dr_a,
    b.dr as dr,
    a.bislatest as is_latest_version

FROM PO_ORDER A
LEFT JOIN PO_ORDER_B B ON A.PK_ORDER = B.PK_ORDER
LEFT JOIN ORG_PURCHASEORG E ON A.PK_ORG_V = E.PK_VID
LEFT JOIN BD_PAYMENT A1 ON A.PK_PAYTERM = A1.PK_PAYMENT
LEFT JOIN PO_ORDER_PAYMENT A2 ON A.PK_ORDER = A2.PK_ORDER AND A2.DR = '0'
LEFT JOIN BD_PAYPERIOD A3 ON A2.PK_PAYPERIOD = A3.PK_PAYPERIOD AND A3.DR = '0'
LEFT JOIN BD_MATERIAL C ON B.PK_SRCMATERIAL = C.PK_MATERIAL
LEFT JOIN bd_measdoc g ON C.pk_measdoc = g.pk_measdoc
LEFT JOIN BD_SUPPLIER D ON B.PK_SUPPLIER = D.PK_SUPPLIER
LEFT JOIN BD_BILLTYPE H ON A.CTRANTYPEID = H.PK_BILLTYPEID
LEFT JOIN BD_DEFDOC F ON A.VDEF1 = F.PK_DEFDOC
LEFT JOIN BD_DEFDOC F2 ON B.VBDEF2 = F2.PK_DEFDOC
LEFT JOIN BD_MARBASCLASS M ON C.PK_MARBASCLASS = M.PK_MARBASCLASS
LEFT JOIN BD_MARBASCLASS N ON M.PK_PARENT = N.PK_MARBASCLASS
WHERE A.TS>'${LAST_RUN_TIME2}'

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    -- ========== 单据与行标识 ==========
    a.pk_flow AS flow_uid,
    a.vbillcode AS bill_code,
    a.cfirstbillhid AS first_billhid,
    a.vfirstbillcode AS first_billcode,
    a.crowno AS row_no,
    a.vnotebody AS row_note,

    -- ========== 单据类型维度 ==========
    a.ctrantypeid AS d_billtype_id,
    b.billtypename AS d_billtype_name,

    -- ========== 公司维度 ==========
    a.corpoid AS d_corp_id,
    e.code AS d_corp_code,
    e.name AS d_corp_name,
    e.shortname AS d_corp_sname,

    -- ========== 仓库维度 ==========
    a.cwarehouseid AS d_warehouse_id,
    f.code AS d_warehouse_code,
    f.name AS d_warehouse_name,

    -- ========== 客户维度（出库场景） ==========
    a.ccustomerid AS d_client_id,
    g.code AS d_client_code,
    g.name AS d_client_name,

    -- ========== 供应商维度（入库场景） ==========
    a.cvendorid AS d_supplier_id,
    h.code AS d_supplier_code,
    h.name AS d_supplier_name,

    -- ========== 物料维度 ==========
    a.cmaterialvid AS d_material_vid,
    c.pk_source as d_material_id,

    c.code AS d_material_code,
    c.name AS d_material_name,
    a.vfree8 as d_mat_attr8_id, --研发物质属性主键
    k.code as d_mat_attr8_code, --研发物质属性编码
    k.name as d_mat_attr8_name, --研发物质属性名称
    -- ========== 物料分类维度 ==========
    c1.pk_marbasclass AS d_cinvclass_sid,
    c1.code AS d_class_code6,
    c1.name AS d_class_name6,
    c2.pk_marbasclass AS d_cinvclassid,
    c2.code AS d_class_code4,
    c2.name AS d_class_name4,
    c3.code AS d_class_code2,
    c3.name AS d_class_name2,
    case when c4.code is null and c2.code='3'  then '3'
         when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '3'
         when c3.code='1'  then  '1'
         when c3.code='4'  then  '4'
         when c2.code='1' then '1'
         when c2.code is null then c1.code
         else c4.code
        end as d_class_code1,
    case when c4.code is null and c2.code in('3','12')  then '添加剂'
         when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '添加剂'
         when c3.code='1'  then  '原料'
         when c3.code='4'  then  '包装物'
         when c4.code='4' then '外袋配件'
         when c2.code='1' then '原料'
         when c2.code is null then c1.name
         else c4.name
        end as d_class_name1,

    -- ========== 核心指标（f_前缀） ==========
    COALESCE(a.ninassistnum, 0) AS f_inbound_auxqty,
    COALESCE(a.ninnum, 0) AS f_inbound_qty,
    COALESCE(a.nshouldinnum, 0) AS f_should_inbound_qty,
    COALESCE(a.noutassistnum, 0) AS f_outbound_auxqty,
    COALESCE(a.noutnum, 0) AS f_outbound_qty,
    COALESCE(a.nshouldoutnum, 0) AS f_should_outbound_qty,
    CASE
        WHEN a.ctrantypeid = '1001A410000000005YSX'
            THEN NVL(TO_NUMBER(NULLIF(a.vbodyuserdef7, '~')), 0)
        ELSE NVL(a.ncostmny, 0)
        END AS f_amt,
    CASE
        WHEN a.ctrantypeid = '1001A410000000005YSX'
            THEN COALESCE(TO_NUMBER(NULLIF(a.vbodyuserdef8, '~')), 0)
        ELSE COALESCE(a.ncostprice, 0)
        END AS f_price,
    TO_NUMBER(NULLIF(a.vbodyuserdef6, '~'))  AS f_settled_qty_cr0,

    TO_NUMBER(NULLIF(a.vbodyuserdef10, '~')) AS f_price_cr0,

    -- ========== 计量单位维度 ==========
    a.cunitid AS measdoc_id,
    d2.name AS measdoc_name,
    a.castunitid AS assist_measdoc_id,
    d1.name AS assist_measdoc_name,

    -- ========== 业务属性 ==========
    a.fbillflag AS bill_flag,
    a.flargess AS is_gift,
    a.freplenishflag AS is_returned,
    a.ccostobject AS cost_object,
    a.csourcebillhid AS source_billhid,
    a.dr,

    -- ========== 人员与用户维度 ==========
    a.cbizid AS salesman_id,
    i1.code AS salesman_code,
    i1.name AS salesman_name,
    a.modifier AS modifier_id,
    j1.user_code AS modifier_code,
    j1.user_name AS modifier_name,
    a.creator AS creator_id,
    j2.user_code AS creator_code,
    j2.user_name AS creator_name,

    -- ========== 原始时间字符串 ==========
    a.modifiedtime AS modified_ts_char,
    a.creationtime AS creation_ts_char,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.dbilldate), ''), '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS bill_ts_char,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.dbizdate), ''), '1970-01-01 00:00:00') AS biz_ts_char,
    a.ts AS ts_char,
    a.vfree1 as d_mat_attr1_id, --配件属性主键1
    a.vfree2 as d_mat_attr2_id, --配件属性主键2
    a.vfree3 as d_mat_attr3_id, --配件属性主键3
    a.vfree4 as d_mat_attr4_id, --配件属性主键4
    a.vfree5 as d_mat_attr5_id, --配件属性主键5
    a.vfree6 as d_mat_attr6_id, --配件属性主键6
    a.vfree7 as d_mat_attr7_id, --配件属性主键7
    a.vfree9 as d_mat_attr9_id, --预留属性主键9
    a.vfree10 as d_mat_attr10_id, --预留属性主键10


    -- ========== 物化时间字段（由 ClickHouse 自动计算，此处无需 SELECT，但为占位保留 NULL 或空值）
    -- 注意：MATERIALIZED 字段不能显式插入，必须省略或设为 DEFAULT
    -- 因此以下 4 个字段在 INSERT 中**不应出现**！
    -- 但我们为了字段数量对齐，在 SELECT 最后不写它们（ClickHouse 会自动填充）

    -- ========== 分区与同步字段 ==========
    SUBSTR(a.dbilldate, 1, 7) AS month_dt

FROM ic_flow a --ic_flowaccount_his
         LEFT JOIN bd_billtype b ON a.ctrantypeid = b.pk_billtypeid
         LEFT JOIN bd_material c ON a.cmaterialvid = c.pk_material
         LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c1 ON c.pk_marbasclass = c1.pk_marbasclass
         LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c2 ON c1.pk_parent = c2.pk_marbasclass
         LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c3 ON c2.pk_parent = c3.pk_marbasclass
         LEFT JOIN bd_marbasclass c4 ON c3.pk_parent = c4.pk_marbasclass
         LEFT JOIN bd_measdoc d1 ON a.castunitid = d1.pk_measdoc
         LEFT JOIN bd_measdoc d2 ON a.cunitid = d2.pk_measdoc
         LEFT JOIN org_corp e ON a.corpoid = e.pk_corp
         LEFT JOIN bd_stordoc f ON a.cwarehouseid = f.pk_stordoc
         LEFT JOIN bd_customer g ON a.ccustomerid = g.pk_customer
         LEFT JOIN bd_supplier h ON a.cvendorid = h.pk_supplier
         LEFT JOIN bd_psndoc i1 ON a.cbizid = i1.pk_psndoc
         LEFT JOIN sm_user j1 ON a.modifier = j1.cuserid
         LEFT JOIN sm_user j2 ON a.creator = j2.cuserid
         LEFT JOIN bd_defdoc k ON a.vfree8 = k.pk_defdoc

 where A.TS>'${LAST_RUN_TIME3_2}'
   AND C2.code='45'

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_material_rd45

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
    concat(a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id,a.d_mat_attr8_id) AS material_rd45_uid,
    a.d_corp_id,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_code', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_code,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_name', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_name,
    dictGet('dim_unit_dict', 'd_corp_sname', a.d_corp_id) as d_corp_sname,
    a.d_material_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_code', a.d_material_id) as d_material_code,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_material_name', a.d_material_id) as d_material_name,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_id', a.d_material_id)      as measdoc_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'measure_name', a.d_material_id)    as measdoc_name,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'second_measure_id', a.d_material_id)    as second_measdoc_id,
    dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'second_measure_name', a.d_material_id)  as second_measdoc_name,
    a.d_mat_attr8_id,
    a.d_mat_attr8_code,
    a.d_mat_attr8_name,
    sum(a.f_inbound_qty-a.f_outbound_qty) as f_stock,
    toDecimal128(sum(a.f_inbound_qty-a.f_outbound_qty),3)*toDecimal128(sum(if(a.d_billtype_id='1001A210000000S8CWNL' ,a.f_amt,0))/nullIf(sum(if(a.d_billtype_id='1001A210000000S8CWNL' ,a.f_inbound_qty,0)),0),3) as f_amt,
    sum(if(a.d_billtype_id='1001A210000000S8CWNL' ,a.f_amt,0))/nullIf(sum(if(a.d_billtype_id='1001A210000000S8CWNL' ,a.f_inbound_qty,0)),0) as f_price,
    sum(a.f_inbound_qty) as f_inbound_qty,
    sum(a.f_outbound_qty) as f_outbound_qty,
    dictGet('dim_bd_defdoc_uat_dict', 'ts', a.d_mat_attr8_id) as ts,
    max(a.ts) as latest_buzi_ts
FROM dwd_ic_flow_rd45 a
where a.dr='0'
GROUP BY a.d_corp_id,a.d_material_id, a.d_mat_attr8_id, a.d_mat_attr8_code, a.d_mat_attr8_name

taskDefinitionList.description: 回传oa

taskParams.sql:
select
    d_corp_id            as D_CORP_ID
     ,d_corp_code          as D_CORP_CODE
     ,d_corp_sname         as D_CORP_SNAME
     ,d_material_id        as D_MATERIAL_ID
     ,d_material_code      as D_MATERIAL_CODE
     ,d_material_name      as D_MATERIAL_NAME
     ,d_mat_attr8_id       as D_MAT_ATTR8_ID
     ,d_mat_attr8_code     as D_MAT_ATTR8_CODE
     ,d_mat_attr8_name     as D_MAT_ATTR8_NAME
     ,'45'  as D_CLASS_CODE2
     ,42061   as FORMMODEID
     ,11155 as MODEDATACREATER
     ,0 AS MODEDATACREATERTYPE
     ,f_stock              as F_STOCK
     ,f_amt                as F_AMT
     ,f_price              as F_PRICE
     ,f_price              as F_PRICE2
from dim_material_rd45
union all
select
    d_corp_id            as D_CORP_ID
     ,d_corp_code          as D_CORP_CODE
     ,d_corp_sname         as D_CORP_SNAME
     ,d_material_id        as D_MATERIAL_ID
     ,d_material_code      as D_MATERIAL_CODE
     ,d_material_name      as D_MATERIAL_NAME
     ,d_material_id       as D_MAT_ATTR8_ID
     ,d_material_code     as D_MAT_ATTR8_CODE
     ,d_material_name     as D_MAT_ATTR8_NAME
     ,dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code2', d_material_id) as D_CLASS_CODE2
     ,42061   as FORMMODEID
     ,11155 as MODEDATACREATER
     ,0 AS MODEDATACREATERTYPE
     ,f_day_qty              as F_STOCK
     ,f_day_amt                as F_AMT
     ,f_day_price              as F_PRICE
     ,if(measure_ratio = 0, 
        toDecimal128(0, 6), 
        toDecimal128(f_day_price, 6) / toDecimal128(measure_ratio, 6)
     ) as F_PRICE2
from dws_ia_material_day_stock
where bill_dt=today()
and dictGet('dim_material_dict', 'd_class_code4', d_material_id)<>'45'

taskParams.sql:
SELECT
a.uuid,
    a.d_client_attr, 
	a.d_region_name,
	c.d_corp_id,
	c.d_corp_code,
	a.d_corp_sname, 
	c.d_corp_name,
	
	d.d_dept_id,
	d.d_dept_code,
	d.d_dept_name,
	
    a.d_town_name, 
	a.d_town_type, 
	a.d_prodline_name,

	b.d_class_code2,
	b.d_class_name2,
	b.d_class_code4,
	a.d_class_name4,
	b.d_class_code6,
    a.d_class_name6, 
	a.d_client_id,
	a.d_client_code,
	a.d_client_name, 
	
	a.vip_client, 
	a.product_series,
	a.strategy_name,
	a.group_product_proj,
	a.core_market,
	a.product_positioning,
	a.profit_year,
	profit_month,
	f_profit,
	a.etl_create_time,
	
	a.is_client_matched,
	a.d_salesman_id,
	a.d_salesman_name,
	a.d_client_mobile,
	a.d_tax_code,
	a.general_name,
    a.is_strategy,
    a.dr
FROM dwd_fin_profit_detail a

left join (
    select d_class_name2,d_class_code2,d_class_name4,d_class_code4,d_class_name6,d_class_code6 ,row_number() OVER (partition by d_class_name6,d_class_name4 ORDER BY f_sale_amount DESC) AS row_num
    from dim_material
    where d_class_code1='2'
    ) b
on a.d_class_name6=b.d_class_name6
and a.d_class_name4=b.d_class_name4
and b.row_num=1
left join dim_unit_dict c 
on a.d_corp_sname=c.d_corp_sname
left join (
select d_corp_sname,d_corp_code,d_client_id,d_client_code,d_client_name,d_dept_id,d_dept_code,d_dept_name,f_main_sale_num
,row_number() OVER (partition by d_corp_sname,d_client_name ORDER BY general_flag,f_main_sale_num DESC) AS row_num
from dim_client
 WHERE corpbusi_flag = '0'
AND d_corp_code <> '1030'
) d 
on a.d_corp_sname=d.d_corp_sname
and a.d_client_name=d.d_client_name
and d.row_num=1
    ARRAY JOIN
     [concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-01'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-02'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-03'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-04'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-05'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-06'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-07'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-08'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-09'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-10'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-11'),
         concat(toString(a.profit_year), '-12')] AS profit_month,
     [	 a.f_profit_m01, a.f_profit_m02, a.f_profit_m03, a.f_profit_m04,
         a.f_profit_m05, a.f_profit_m06, a.f_profit_m07, a.f_profit_m08,
         a.f_profit_m09, a.f_profit_m10, a.f_profit_m11, a.f_profit_m12] AS f_profit
         where a.profit_year='${profit_year}'

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_fin_budget_detail_frtock
taskDefinitionList.description:
公司预算表：帆软传入ck
MERGE INTO DWD_FIN_BUDGET_DETAIL a
USING (
    -- 这里是你的子查询逻辑 (d 表)
    SELECT
        corp_sname,
        client_name,
        client_pk AS D_CLIENT_ID,
        client_code AS D_CLIENT_CODE,
        SALESMAN_PK AS D_SALESMAN_ID,
        SALESMAN_NAME AS D_SALESMAN_NAME,
        CLIENT_MOBILE AS D_CLIENT_MOBILE,
        TAX_CODE AS D_TAX_CODE,
        GENERAL_NAME AS GENERAL_NAME
    FROM (
             SELECT
                 corp_sname,
                 corp_code,
                 client_pk,
                 client_code,
                 client_name,
                 dept_pk,
                 dept_code,
                 dept_name,
                 main_sale_num,
                 SALESMAN_NAME,
                 SALESMAN_PK, -- 注意：你原SQL选了SALESMAN_PK但没用到，这里对应dept_pk
                 CLIENT_MOBILE,
                 TAX_CODE,
                 GENERAL_NAME,
                 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY corp_sname, client_name ORDER BY general_flag, main_sale_num DESC) AS row_num
             FROM dim_client
             WHERE corpbusi_flag = '0'
               AND corp_code <> '1030'
             -- and general_flag = '0'  -- 如果需要取消注释
         ) sub
    WHERE row_num = 1
) d
ON (a.d_client_name = d.client_name AND a.D_CORP_SNAME = d.corp_sname)
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
               a.D_CLIENT_ID      = d.D_CLIENT_ID,
               a.D_CLIENT_CODE    = d.D_CLIENT_CODE,
               a.D_SALESMAN_ID    = d.D_SALESMAN_ID,
               a.D_SALESMAN_NAME  = d.D_SALESMAN_NAME,
               a.D_CLIENT_MOBILE  = d.D_CLIENT_MOBILE,
               a.D_TAX_CODE       = d.D_TAX_CODE,
               a.GENERAL_NAME     = d.GENERAL_NAME;

taskParams.sql:
select 
uuid,d_client_attr,d_region_name
,d_corp_sname 
,d_town_name,d_town_type,d_prodline_name,d_class_name4,d_class_name6,d_client_name,vip_client,product_series,strategy_name,group_product_proj,core_market,product_positioning,f_budget_m01,f_budget_m02,f_budget_m03,f_budget_m04,f_budget_m05,f_budget_m06,f_budget_m07,f_budget_m08,f_budget_m09,f_budget_m10,f_budget_m11,f_budget_m12,budget_year

from dwd_fin_budget_detail
where budget_year='${budget_year}'

taskParams.rawScript:
#!/bin/bash
echo "======= 因为不是周一0~2点 本次任务直接跳过 ========="

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "======= start: get max(ts) and -60 days ========="

# ================= ClickHouse 配置 =================
CK_HOST="10.113.226.23"
CK_PORT="8123"
CK_USER="root"
CK_PASS="FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY"
CK_DB="alphafeed"
CK_TABLE1="tb_guidance_price"


# ================= 兜底时间 =================
FALLBACK_TIME="2015-01-01 00:00:00"

# ================= 执行 SQL =================
run_ck_query() {
    local sql="$1"
    curl -s -u "$CK_USER:$CK_PASS" \
      --data-binary "$sql" \
      "http://$CK_HOST:$CK_PORT/"
}

# ================= 获取 max(ts) =================
SQL1="
SELECT max(modifytime_char)
FROM ${CK_DB}.${CK_TABLE1}
"

RESP1=$(run_ck_query "$SQL1" | tr -d '\n')

# ================= 校验时间合法性 =================
if [[ "$RESP1" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}\ [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then
    LAST_RUN_TIME="$RESP1"
else
    LAST_RUN_TIME="$FALLBACK_TIME"
fi

# ================= 转时间戳（防 DS / date 崩） =================
BASE_TS=$(date -d "$LAST_RUN_TIME" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

if [ "$BASE_TS" -le 0 ]; then
    BASE_TS=$(date -d "$FALLBACK_TIME" +%s)
    LAST_RUN_TIME="$FALLBACK_TIME"
fi

# ================= 往前推 60 天 =================
LAST2M_RUN_TIME1=$(date -d "@$((BASE_TS - 60*86400))" +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

# ================= 输出给 DolphinScheduler =================
echo "LAST_RUN_TIME      = $LAST_RUN_TIME"
echo "LAST2M_RUN_TIME1    = $LAST2M_RUN_TIME1"

echo '${setValue(LAST_RUN_TIME='"$LAST_RUN_TIME"')}'
echo '${setValue(LAST2M_RUN_TIME1='"$LAST2M_RUN_TIME1"')}'

echo "======= end ========="

#!/bin/bash

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "======= start: get max(ts) and -60 days ========="

# ================= ClickHouse 配置 =================
CK_HOST="10.113.226.23"
CK_PORT="8123"
CK_USER="root"
CK_PASS="FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY"
CK_DB="alphafeed"
CK_TABLE1="rpt_forecast_sale_num"


# ================= 兜底时间 =================
FALLBACK_TIME="2015-01-01 00:00:00"

# ================= 执行 SQL =================
run_ck_query() {
    local sql="$1"
    curl -s -u "$CK_USER:$CK_PASS" \
      --data-binary "$sql" \
      "http://$CK_HOST:$CK_PORT/"
}

# ================= 获取 max(ts) =================
SQL1="
SELECT max(ts)
FROM ${CK_DB}.${CK_TABLE1}
"

RESP1=$(run_ck_query "$SQL1" | tr -d '\n')

# ================= 校验时间合法性 =================
if [[ "$RESP1" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}\ [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then
    LAST_RUN_TIME2="$RESP1"
else
    LAST_RUN_TIME2="$FALLBACK_TIME"
fi

# ================= 转时间戳（防 DS / date 崩） =================
BASE_TS=$(date -d "$LAST_RUN_TIME2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

if [ "$BASE_TS" -le 0 ]; then
    BASE_TS=$(date -d "$FALLBACK_TIME" +%s)
    LAST_RUN_TIME2="$FALLBACK_TIME"
fi

# ================= 往前推 60 天 =================
LAST2M_RUN_TIME1=$(date -d "@$((BASE_TS - 60*86400))" +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

# ================= 输出给 DolphinScheduler =================
echo "LAST_RUN_TIME2      = $LAST_RUN_TIME2"
echo "LAST2M_RUN_TIME1    = $LAST2M_RUN_TIME1"

echo '${setValue(LAST_RUN_TIME2='"$LAST_RUN_TIME2"')}'
echo '${setValue(LAST2M_RUN_TIME1='"$LAST2M_RUN_TIME1"')}'

echo "======= end ========="

taskDefinitionList.name: dwd_fin_gross_profit_frtock
taskDefinitionList.description:
-- 表名：ck.dwd_fin_gross_profit
-- 主题域：DWD - 财务
-- 来源：CK→CK DATAX 查询写入（query_dwd_fin_gross_profit.sql）
-- 说明：毛利粗利配置表，字段与查询 SELECT 完全一致
--       物料维度由查询层 dictGet 解析，公司维度由 LEFT JOIN 解析
--       写入后所有字段均含值，无需后续 ETL 回填

taskParams.sql:
-- ==================================================
-- DATAX Oracle → CK 查询：毛利粗利配置表（dwd_fin_gross_profit）
-- 用途：从 Oracle FR 填报表 + dim_unit + dim_material 维表解析后写入 CK
-- 说明：公司字段通过 dim_unit（org_type='公司'）解析
--       物料维度通过 dim_material（MATERIAL_CODE）解析
--       AS 别名保持 CK 命名规范（d_/f_ 前缀）
-- 数据源：Oracle
-- 目标表：CK dwd_fin_gross_profit
-- ==================================================

SELECT
    -- ==================== 基础 ====================
    a.GROSS_PROFIT_YEAR AS gross_profit_year,

    -- ==================== 物料 ====================
    m.MATERIAL_PK       AS d_material_id,
    a.D_MATERIAL_CODE   AS d_material_code,
    m.MATERIAL_NAME     AS d_material_name,
    a.D_MATERIAL_NAME   AS d_material_name_fr,

    -- ==================== 大小类 ====================
    m.CLASS_CODE4       AS d_class_code4,
    m.CLASS_NAME4       AS d_class_name4,
    a.D_CLASS_NAME4     AS d_class_name4_fr,
    m.CLASS_CODE6       AS d_class_code6,
    m.CLASS_NAME6       AS d_class_name6,
    a.D_CLASS_NAME6     AS d_class_name6_fr,

    -- ==================== 产线 ====================
    m.PRODLINE_CODE     AS d_prodline_code,
    m.PRODLINE_NAME     AS d_prodline_name,

    -- ==================== 利润归属公司 ====================
    pu.CORP_PK          AS d_profit_corp_id,
    pu.CORP_CODE        AS d_profit_corp_code,
    pu.CORP_NAME        AS d_profit_corp_name,
    a.D_PROFIT_CORP_SNAME AS d_profit_corp_sname,
    pu.REGION_CODE      AS d_profit_region_code,
    pu.REGION_NAME      AS d_profit_region_name,

    -- ==================== 生产公司 ====================
    au.CORP_PK          AS d_produce_corp_id,
    au.CORP_CODE        AS d_produce_corp_code,
    au.CORP_NAME        AS d_produce_corp_name,
    a.D_PRODUCE_CORP_SNAME AS d_produce_corp_sname,

    -- ==================== 产品属性 ====================
    a.PARTICLE_SIZE     AS particle_size,
    a.PRODUCT_SERIES    AS product_series,
    a.STRATEGY_NAME     AS strategy_name,

    -- ==================== 指标 ====================
    a.F_GROSS_RED       AS f_gross_red,

    -- ==================== ETL ====================
    TO_CHAR(a.ETL_CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ts_char

FROM DWD_FIN_GROSS_PROFIT a
LEFT JOIN DIM_MATERIAL m
    ON m.MATERIAL_CODE = a.D_MATERIAL_CODE
LEFT JOIN DIM_UNIT pu
    ON pu.CORP_SNAME = a.D_PROFIT_CORP_SNAME
    AND pu.ORG_TYPE = '公司'
LEFT JOIN DIM_UNIT au
    ON au.CORP_SNAME = a.D_PRODUCE_CORP_SNAME
    AND au.ORG_TYPE = '公司'
WHERE a.GROSS_PROFIT_YEAR = '${gross_profit_year}'
ORDER BY a.GROSS_PROFIT_YEAR DESC, pu.CORP_CODE, a.D_MATERIAL_CODE
