taskParams.sql:
select
    a.bom_uid
     ,a.bom_version
     ,a.bom_status

     ,a.d_corp_id
     ,a.d_corp_code
     ,a.d_corp_name
     ,a.d_corp_sname
     ,b.d_corp_id 	    as d_corp_id_defined
     ,b.d_corp_code 	as d_corp_code_defined
     ,b.d_corp_name 	as d_corp_name_defined
     ,case when a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id  then ''
           else a.d_corp_id end as d_corp_joinid
     ,case when a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id  then '自产'
           else '代工' end as d_production_type
     ,a.d_class_code1
     ,a.d_class_name1
     ,a.d_class_code2
     ,a.d_class_name2
     ,a.d_class_code4
     ,a.d_class_name4
     ,a.d_class_code6
     ,a.d_class_name6
     ,a.d_formula_id  as d_product_id
     ,a.d_formula_code as d_product_code
     ,a.d_formula_name as d_product_name
     ,a.d_formula_measure as d_product_measure
     ,a.d_formula_type as d_product_type

     ,a.d_row_code1 as d_formula_code1
     ,a.d_row_name1 as d_formula_name1
     ,a.d_row_id as d_formula_id
     ,a.d_row_code as d_formula_code
     ,a.d_row_name as d_formula_name
     ,a.d_row_measure as d_formula_measure
     ,a.d_row_type as d_formula_type


     ,c.d_row_code1 as d_father_row_code1
     ,c.d_row_name1 as d_father_row_name1
	 ,dictGet('dim_material_dict2', 'd_material_id', c.d_row_code) as d_father_row_id
	 ,c.d_row_code as d_father_row_code
	 ,c.d_row_name as d_father_row_name
	 ,c.d_row_measure as d_father_row_measure
	 ,c.d_row_type as d_father_row_type

	 
     ,case when c2.d_class_code1='3' then c2.d_row_id else dictGet('dim_material_dict2', 'd_material_id', c.d_row_code) end as d_row_id
     ,case when c2.d_class_code1='3' then c2.d_row_code else c.d_row_code end as d_row_code
     ,case when c2.d_class_code1='3' then c2.d_row_name else c.d_row_name end as d_row_name
     ,case when c2.d_class_code1='3' then c2.d_row_measure else c.d_row_measure end as d_row_measure
     ,case when c2.d_class_code1='3' then c2.d_row_type else c.d_row_type end as d_row_type
	 
     ,a.f_ratio_num as f_product_ratio_num
     ,c.f_ratio_num as f_father_row_ratio_num
     ,case when c2.d_class_code1='3' then c2.f_ratio_num else c.f_ratio_num end as f_row_ratio_num

     ,a.formula_date
     ,a.start_date
     ,a.end_date
     ,a.creationtime
     ,a.creator
     ,a.modifiedtime
     ,a.modifier
     ,a.updt
from dim_formula_product_snap a
         left join dim_material b
                   on a.d_formula_id=b.d_material_id
         left join dim_formula_product_snap c
                   on toYYYYMM(c.updt)=${MONTH_DT}
                       and c.rn=1
                       and a.d_row_id=c.d_formula_id
                       and a.d_corp_id=c.d_corp_id
    --and c2.d_row_code1<>'3'
         left join dim_formula_product_snap c2
                   on toYYYYMM(c2.updt)=${MONTH_DT}
					   and c2.rn=1
                       and c2.d_class_code1='3' --表示添加剂
                       and c.d_row_id=c2.d_formula_id
                       and c.d_corp_id=c2.d_corp_id

where toYYYYMM(a.updt)=${MONTH_DT}
  and a.d_class_code1='2' and a.rn=1 and a.rn2=1
  and  a.d_row_code1='5'
  and a.d_corp_code<>'1015'

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_formula_product_snap_nc_1w
taskDefinitionList.description: 每周凌晨0~1点执行1次

taskParams.sql:
with material as (
    SELECT
         c.pk_material 	 as d_material_id
         ,c.code 		 as d_material_code
         ,c.name 		 as d_material_name
		 ,c.materialtype as d_material_type
         ,c.PK_BRAND as d_brand_id
         ,c5.code as d_brand_code
         ,c5.name as d_brand_name
         ,c1.code as d_class_code6
         ,c1.name as d_class_name6
         ,c2.code as d_class_code4
         ,c2.name as d_class_name4
         ,c3.code as d_class_code2
         ,c3.name as d_class_name2
         ,case when c4.code is null and c2.code='3'  then '3'
               when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '3'
               when c3.code='1'  then  '1'
               when c3.code='4'  then  '4'
			   when c2.code='1' then '1'
			   when c2.code is null then c1.code
               else c4.code 
			   end as d_class_code1
         ,case when c4.code is null and c2.code in('3','12')  then '添加剂'
               when c3.code='1'  and c2.code='12' then  '添加剂'
               when c3.code='1'  then  '原料'
               when c3.code='4'  then  '包装物'
               when c4.code='4' then '外袋配件'  
			   when c2.code='1' then '原料'
			   when c2.code is null then c1.name
			   else c4.name
        end as d_class_name1
    --c4.code=1原料 c4.code=2成品 c4.code=4外袋+配件(磨损配件) c4.code=5配方半成品 c4.code=6配方回粉
--c4.code为空  & c2.code in('2','12','16') 添加剂[16为贸易型添加剂 1为动保原料]
--c4.code为空  & c2.code =41 标签

--型号和规格后面需要补
    FROM bd_material C
             LEFT JOIN BD_MARBASCLASS c1
                       ON C.PK_MARBASCLASS = c1.PK_MARBASCLASS
             LEFT JOIN BD_MARBASCLASS c2
                       ON c1.PK_PARENT = c2.PK_MARBASCLASS
             LEFT JOIN BD_MARBASCLASS c3
                       ON c2.PK_PARENT = c3.PK_MARBASCLASS
             LEFT JOIN BD_MARBASCLASS c4
                       ON c3.PK_PARENT = c4.PK_MARBASCLASS
             LEFT JOIN BD_BRANDDOC c5
                       ON c.PK_BRAND=c5.PK_BRAND
)

select a2.cbom_bid as bom_uid
     ,a1.hversion as bom_version --bom版本号 取最高
     ,case when a1.fbillstatus=1 then '审批通过' when a1.fbillstatus=-1 then '自由'  end as bom_status
	 
     ,a1.pk_org as d_corp_id
     ,e.code as d_corp_code
     ,e.name as d_corp_name
     ,e.shortname as d_corp_sname

---配方
	 ,b1.d_material_id	 as d_formula_id
	 ,b1.d_material_code as d_formula_code
	 ,b1.d_material_name as d_formula_name
	 ,b1.d_material_type as d_formula_type
     ,d1.name as d_formula_measure
	 ,b1.d_brand_id
     ,b1.d_brand_code
     ,b1.d_brand_name
     ,b1.d_class_code1
     ,b1.d_class_name1
     ,b1.d_class_code2
     ,b1.d_class_name2
     ,b1.d_class_code4
     ,b1.d_class_name4
     ,b1.d_class_code6
     ,b1.d_class_name6


     ,a2.cmaterialid as d_row_id
	 ,b2.d_material_code as d_row_code
	 ,b2.d_material_name as d_row_name
	 ,b2.d_material_type as d_row_type   --原料型号
     ,d2.name as d_row_measure --原料单位
     ,b2.d_class_code1 as d_row_code1
     ,b2.d_class_name1 as d_row_name1

     ,a2.nitemnum as f_ratio_num_old --表体配方数量
     ,a1.HNASSPARENTNUM as f_parent_num --父项主数量
     ,a1.HNPARENTNUM as f_assit_parent_num --父项辅数量
    ,row_number()OVER(PARTITION BY a1.pk_org,a1.hcmaterialid ORDER BY a1.HFVERSIONTYPE,a1.HBDEFAULT desc ) AS rn --已启用修改时间晚主键排序靠后的排序靠前    
     ,row_number()OVER(PARTITION BY a1.pk_org,a1.hcmaterialid,a1.hversion
    ORDER BY a1.HFVERSIONTYPE,a1.HBDEFAULT desc
	, CASE WHEN b2.d_class_code1 = '5' THEN 1 WHEN b2.d_class_code1 = '3' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END 
	,a1.creationtime) AS rn2 --商品唯一列筛选

     ,a1.tmaketime as formula_date --制单日期
     ,a2.cbeginperiod as start_date --生效日期
     ,a2.cendperiod  as end_date --失效日期
     ,a1.creationtime
     ,f1.user_name  as creator
     ,a1.modifiedtime
     ,f2.user_name  as modifier
     ,a1.HFVERSIONTYPE  as vertion_type  --1有效版本2无效版本
     ,a1.HBDEFAULT as  is_default  --Y N

     ,sysdate as updt

from bd_bom a1  --表头：第一轮为成品 第二轮为配方 第三轮为原料或者添加剂
		 left join bd_bom_b  a2 --表体：第一轮为配方 第二轮为添加剂或者原料 第三轮全为原料
                   on a1.cbomid = a2.cbomid
---物料
		 left join material b1 --表头物料信息
				   on a1.hcmaterialid = b1.d_material_id
			 
		 left join material b2 --表体物料信息
				   on a2.cmaterialid = b2.d_material_id
				   
---单位
         left join bd_measdoc d1 --表头单位
                   on a1.hcmeasureid = d1.pk_measdoc
         left join bd_measdoc d2 --表体单位
                   on a2.cmeasureid = d2.pk_measdoc
--公司
         left join org_orgs_v e --计划组织
                   on a1.pk_org = e.pk_org
--用户
         left join sm_user f1 --用户
                   on a1.creator   = f1.cuserid
--用户
         left join sm_user f2 --用户
                   on a1.modifier  = f2.cuserid
where a1.dr='0'
  and a2.dr='0'
  --and a1.hbdefault='Y'
  and a1.fbillstatus=1  ---in(1,-1)
--and a1.tmaketime>= '2020-01-01'
--and c4.code='2';

taskDefinitionList.name: UF_FORMULA_PRODUCT

taskParams.sql:
select
     concat(d_corp_id,d_formula_id,d_row_id) as FORMULA_PRODUCT_UID
     ,d_brand_name           as D_BRAND_NAME 
     ,d_corp_id              as D_CORP_ID   
     ,d_corp_sname           as D_CORP_SNAME

     ,d_formula_code         as D_PRODUCT_CODE 
     ,d_formula_name         as D_PRODUCT_NAME 
     ,d_row_id               as D_FORMULA_ID   
     ,d_row_code             as D_FORMULA_CODE 
     ,d_row_name             as D_FORMULA_NAME 

     ,42561   as FORMMODEID
     ,11155 as MODEDATACREATER
     ,0 AS MODEDATACREATERTYPE

from dim_formula_product_dict

taskDefinitionList.name: dim_formula_product_dictpack
taskDefinitionList.description: 配方物料表-袋子字典表

taskParams.sql:
CREATE DICTIONARY dim_formula_product_dictpack
(
    bom_uid         String(20),
    d_corp_id       String(20),
    d_corp_code     String,
    d_corp_name     String,
    d_corp_sname    String,
    d_corp_id_defined      	String(20),
    d_corp_code_defined     String,
    d_corp_name_defined     String,
    d_corp_joinid   String,
    d_production_type String,
    d_class_code1   String(1),
    d_class_name1   String,
    d_class_code2   String(2),
    d_class_name2   String,
    d_class_code4   String(4),
    d_class_name4   String,
    d_class_code6   String(6),
    d_class_name6   String,
    d_formula_id    String(20),
    d_formula_code  String(10),
    d_formula_name  String,
    d_formula_measure String,
    d_formula_type    String,
    d_row_id        String(20),
    d_row_code      String(10),
    d_row_name      String,
    d_row_measure   String,
    d_row_type      String,
    f_ratio_num     Decimal(18,6),
    formula_date    String(19),
    creationtime    String(19),
    creator         String,
    modifiedtime    String(19),
    modifier        String,
    updt            Date
)
    PRIMARY KEY  d_formula_id
    SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(
           HOST '10.113.226.23'
           PORT 9000
           USER 'root'
           PASSWORD 'FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY'
           query 'select
    a.bom_uid
     ,a.d_corp_id
     ,a.d_corp_code
     ,a.d_corp_name
     ,a.d_corp_sname
     ,b.d_corp_id 	    as d_corp_id_defined
     ,b.d_corp_code 	as d_corp_code_defined
     ,b.d_corp_name 	as d_corp_name_defined
     ,case when a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id  then ''''
           else a.d_corp_id end as d_corp_joinid
     ,case when a.d_corp_id=b.d_corp_id  then ''自产''
           else ''代工'' end as d_production_type
     ,a.d_class_code1
     ,a.d_class_name1
     ,a.d_class_code2
     ,a.d_class_name2
     ,a.d_class_code4
     ,a.d_class_name4
     ,a.d_class_code6
     ,a.d_class_name6
     ,a.d_formula_id
     ,a.d_formula_code
     ,a.d_formula_name
     ,a.d_formula_measure
     ,a.d_formula_type
     ,a.d_row_id
     ,a.d_row_code
     ,a.d_row_name
     ,a.d_row_measure
     ,a.d_row_type
     ,a.f_ratio_num
     ,a.formula_date
     ,a.creationtime
     ,a.creator
     ,a.modifiedtime
     ,a.modifier
     ,a.updt
from dim_formula_product_snap a
left join dim_material b
on a.d_formula_id=b.d_material_id
where updt >= toStartOfMonth(today()) and  updt<= toLastDayOfMonth(today())
  and d_class_code1=''2'' 
  and vertion_type=''1'' and is_default=''Y''
  and  d_row_code  like ''4%''
  and d_corp_code<>''1015'''
                     ))
    LIFETIME(MIN 3600 MAX 7200)
    LAYOUT(COMPLEX_KEY_HASHED());

taskParams.sql:
CREATE DICTIONARY dim_formula_product_dict
(
    bom_uid         String(20),
    d_corp_id       String(20),
    d_corp_code     String,
    d_corp_name     String,
    d_corp_sname    String,
    d_class_code1   String(1),
    d_class_name1   String,
    d_class_code2   String(2),
    d_class_name2   String,
    d_class_code4   String(4),
    d_class_name4   String,
    d_class_code6   String(6),
    d_class_name6   String,
    d_formula_id    String(20),
    d_formula_uid    String,
    d_formula_code  String(10),
    d_formula_name  String,
    d_formula_measure String,
    d_formula_type    String,
    d_brand_id      String(20),
    d_brand_code      String,
    d_brand_name      String,
    d_row_id        String(20),
    d_row_code      String(10),
    d_row_name      String,
    d_row_measure   String,
    d_row_type      String,
    f_ratio_num     Decimal(18,6),
    formula_date    String(19),
    creationtime    String(19),
    creator         String,
    modifiedtime    String(19),
    modifier        String,
    updt            Date
)
PRIMARY KEY (d_corp_id, d_formula_id)
    SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(
           HOST '10.113.226.23'
           PORT 9000
           USER 'root'
           PASSWORD 'FjGWTNqxvGudqCwY'
           query 'select a.bom_uid,a.d_corp_id,a.d_corp_code,a.d_corp_name,a.d_corp_sname,a.d_class_code1,a.d_class_name1,a.d_class_code2,a.d_class_name2,a.d_class_code4,a.d_class_name4,a.d_class_code6,a.d_class_name6,a.d_formula_id
		   ,case when b.d_production_type=''''  then a.d_formula_id  else b.d_material_uid end as d_formula_uid
		   ,a.d_formula_code,a.d_formula_name,a.d_formula_measure,a.d_formula_type, a.d_brand_id,a.d_brand_code,a.d_brand_name
           ,a.d_row_id,a.d_row_code,a.d_row_name,a.d_row_measure,a.d_row_type,a.f_ratio_num,a.formula_date,a.creationtime,a.creator,a.modifiedtime,a.modifier,a.updt
from dim_formula_product_snap a
left join dwd_fact_product_inbound_snap b
on b.d_production_type=''代工''
and a.d_formula_id||a.d_corp_id=b.d_material_uid
where updt >= toStartOfMonth(today()) and  updt<= toLastDayOfMonth(today())
  and d_class_code1=''2'' 
  and vertion_type=''1'' and is_default=''Y''
  and rn2=1 and  d_row_code  like ''5%''
  and d_corp_code<>''1015'''
                     ))
    LIFETIME(MIN 3600 MAX 7200)
    LAYOUT(COMPLEX_KEY_HASHED());

SELECT
    IF(
        toHour(now('Asia/Shanghai')) in(0,9,10,12,14,16,20,22) ,
        --AND toDayOfWeek(now('Asia/Shanghai')) = 1          -- 周一（1 表示周一）
        '1',
        '0'
    ) AS is_week_begin
